reviews.text: Professional and efficient law firm, I highly recommend The Benton Law Firm
I couldn't be more satisfied with my experience!
Great service   I appreciate  everything you do
Great trip ever for us old folks.
Great law fitm
There awesome got me the money we negotiated fast from the settlement and got me in a new ride ty guys xoxoxoxo

I was a potential client. I was sent a form to sign by text and email but neither one worked. Also, their website didn't work because of a "server failure".

The form they wanted me to sign was to agree to a 40% take for them. I have worked with three other accident attorneys with 33%. The intake specialist said that it depends on the outcome but it could be 30%. If it doesn't say this on the document then it doesn't exist. I find it strange I was required to sign the form before I could consult with a lawyer.

I was hit by a car as I was walking in the crosswalk. They asked if it was my fault or if the police issued a ticket to the driver. Even I know that WA state law says a pedestrian always has the right-of-way in a crosswalk.
I had a wonderful stress free experience with the Benton Law Firm. I definitely recommend this firm! Easy to work with and very professional!
If you need great legal service. I highly recommend them. They went above and beyond to make sure everything was handle in a fast and timely manner.
Jeff is a great lawyer. I wouldn't trust anyone else. His staff is also super supportive and helped me throughout my entire case!
My wife and I had a great experience with the Benton Law Firm.  Jeff and his team are very good at what they do.  You can tell they care about their clients.  I highly recommend the Benton Law Firm.

I was involved in a minor car accident and my insurance company was unwilling to attempt to determine if the the other driver, who left the scene after exchanging our information but before the police arrived, was insured.  Not only did the Benton Law firm find out the driver was insured, they got  their insurance company to pay for the damage to my vehicle!!!  The outcome clearly exceeded my expectations.  I would highly recommend Jeff Benton and his team.

Laurel Anderson has helped me so much going through my claim, she’s very professional, knowledgeable and really took the time to help me navigate everything.  SO thankful I found her and would recommend her to anyone!!!
Very warm welcoming firm. I felt at home and felt accorded maximum information. Please don't hesitate to reach out to them.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words. We're so happy we were able to assist you!

reviews.text: They helped me get a cash settlement.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for trusting us with your claim!

reviews.text: I was very disappointed with my experience. This attorney came across as passive and lacked compassion for my situation. She didn’t take the time to truly hear me out, and when I wasn’t able to respond over a holiday weekend, she abruptly dropped me without warning. I felt no empathy or understanding from her throughout our interactions. Each conversation left me feeling dismissed and belittled. Having worked with several attorneys on large cases in the past, I was shocked by her rigid and impersonal scheduling approach—if you don’t respond the same day, she moves on. I would recommend looking elsewhere for legal support that’s actually client-centered.

I have used this firm twice to help me through the complicated process of work injury law for an L&I claim. They have been kind, very professional and helpful both times, educating me on what to expect in navigating the legal system.  I could not have gotten through any of this without them.  They did all of the confusing paperwork and helped make it clear how to proceed in this complicated and long process.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words and for returning to our firm!

reviews.text:
Laurel Anderson is really the best in the business. Make her your FIRST call if you have been injured and need representation to fight for your rights against L&I or your employer.
Laurel has been in this business for many, many years and knows the laws and how to get you the help you need.
I found Laurel in 2013 after I was injured at work and ended up needing surgery. It was a long road (5+ years) but Laurel was always there supporting me through the multiple IME's, Physical Therapy, Injections, Surgery and Rehabilitation after surgery.
I just can't thank her enough. JM

THANK GOODNESS FOR LAUREL ANDERSON! I had an ongoing workers comp case for 3 years, the first 2 of which I was working with a different law firm and it was an absolute nightmare. When I started working with Laurel she contacted me regularly, made sure I understood what was happening with my case, and genuinely cared about my well being. She was so personal and over the course of working with her she even got to know my daughter, and always asked about my grandkids, little things like that show exactly how much she cares about her clients. I will forever be grateful for her time, and how hard she fought for me. You will not regret working with this law firm. Period!

A friend recommended me to Laurel Anderson to help me with my slightly complicated claim, and my less than cooperative employer... She was able to help me with my statement, and get me the workers compensation I was entitled to! She is kind, compassionate, honest and does whatever she can within her means, to get you the help you need! If I ever run into another work injury complication, she will be the one I call!
Gave me information over the phone and where very helpful.

Laurel was absolutely fabulous to work with. She is there for you fighting all the way, and believe me, my case was no walk in the park.
I wholeheartedly recommend this firm to anyone needing help with a troublesome employer.

Evan and Sunny Oshan are truly caring and professional people! They understood my claim and aggressively handled it! I would strongly recommend them both for a quality attorney and give them 5 stars! Thank you for helping me put this behind me!
Evan and Sunny have been nothing but amazing and professional. I have never felt so comfortable and at ease than I did with them. They were available anytime I needed them. I would highly recommend.
One of the greatest law firms I came across. They have a great team very tentative and assertive. They will win your case. I would recommend them to everyone

If you need a lawyer, this is without question the MAN. If you’re tired of the standard lawyer treatment, not communicating with you, avoiding your calls, at best a Secretery may call you after the contract is signed. This is your MAN! Falling into 2nd rate citizen category after the contract, This is your MAN.
This man represents you as if you where his own family!! He is 6 star and is a machine. 100% honesty through the entire process. And yes actually keeping you the client informed every step of the way. I don’t care if you’ve had legal representatives in the past that you’ve trusted….. I’m saying this man is ethical, moral based assassin. I used to cringe at the thought of obtaining a lawyer it’s like playing yatzi you never know what you’re going to get. Please save yourself the misery simply call EVAN …. It’s that simple,

I cannot speak highly enough about my experience with Oshan & Associates.  Evan and his team went the extra mile to take care of me.  I am 100% certain that no one else could have represented me and achieved even close to the same results Evan did.  My recovery, well being, and outlook are more positive than I ever imagined as a direct result of his compassion, professionalism, and expertise.  There was never any doubt that he was looking out for my best interests throughout the entire process.  Evan and Associates is the first, best, and only firm I would refer friends, family, or anyone who needs attorney services to!

Evan is a brilliant attorney. He knows accidents  and he knows how to strategize to get the best outcome for his clients. Evan is  thorough and most of all dependable. If Evan takes your case he will not stop until you are compensated. Evan kept me abreast  every step of the way. Whenever I texted or called he’s responded promptly. I really admire that. Evan makes you feel like you are his only client.
I wholeheartedly recommend Evan.

I was in a vehicle incident. I got ahold of Oshan & associates. Was the best thing I could have done. I was treated like I was important. There was a lot of things in this case. I was told where we were at all times. I am very impressed with there  work habits. I would definitely use them again if I needed a lawyer. Thank you very much for all your work
Awesome experience with this team and I appreciate the experience with the ,Oshan team to get the best of the best of all of the others to get the job done 👍
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you James! Appreciate your kind words so much!

reviews.text: Evan and his team were helpful, professional and assertive. I really appreciated the time they took to walk me through options. If you want someone who's tough -- Evan is it.

I slipped on a wet floor in a restaurant and the owner did nothing to help. He told other customers I was drunk even though we just got there , hadn’t ordered yet when I was going to wash my hands. Evan became furious when he heard of how the owner behaved and thought the business should be fined on principle. He did not even take a percentage of the settlement.
reviews.ownerResponse: Aggressive legal representation is our middle name :)

reviews.text:
I worked with Evan Oshan after a car accident in 2021, and I can honestly say he was amazing. He helped me find great doctors who really got me back on track to living my normal life. I’m so happy with how everything turned out, especially the settlement he got for me.
Not only did he handle the auto insurance and make the whole process smooth, but he also went the extra mile and helped me clear up some liens I had from child support. That was a huge weight off my shoulders.
Evan was always professional, but also super understanding and supportive. He truly cared about helping me, and I couldn’t have asked for a better attorney. If you need someone who will fight for you and make sure you’re taken care of, I’d definitely recommend him.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Kao,
So happy we got awesome results for you...I am your lawyer for life ! :)

reviews.text:
Excellent Representation from Evan!

As the old saying goes, there is the best and the rest.  Evan is absolutely the Best!  Evan helped me when no other attorney would.  Seriously, too much to list in a review.  If you are fortunate enough to have Evan as your attorney he will be your true advocate. You will be in great hands and can rest easy as he will perform professional work on your behalf that no other lawyer will.  In my case, one of the ways he helped me is he hired multiple top shelf professionals each in their own field of study to interview me to provide expert testimony of my situation.  That's just one of the many!  I have been around quite a while, I have had lawyers represent me over the past decades that never did anything close to what Evan has done for me.  Evan is a high level expert Super Lawyer and at the same time down to earth and easy to talk to.  Evan is a wonderful caring person so a pleasure to work with.  He will always have your best interest at heart.  Evan is now my attorney for life.  If you need representation, look no further.  Do yourself a favor and give Evan a call!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mike,
Your review touched me deeply! I am at your service whenever you need me!

reviews.text: I worked with them, and I couldn’t be happier with the outcome. They walked me through every step of the process and negotiated with the insurance companies to ensure I got compensated. Highly recommend!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for the recommendation :)

reviews.text: After my dog was killed by the neglect of flight attendants Evan promised he would help me and instead he bombarded me for two weeks and then disappeared. Kept promising to get back in touch with me but never did. His office girls are rude and unhelpful all they ever say is that he’s not in office so your SOL but you can leave a message he will never return. Who cares that I’m a healthcare worker who can’t just jump when he says let’s all operate around Evan’s schedule cause no one else matters.
Not sure why its asking for this rating I never went here but when you walk by I guess google counts that.

My father works here. I love this firm. They are really nice people and they are very good at what they do. I sometimes hang out with my father downtown and we see the sights. He has a cool office and they get free snacks and drinks. Yum. The people there know me well enough and it's nice seeing them greet me when I visit. But yeah. A very good legal defense firm with respectable people. They do a good job when presented with a case.

This is a dynamic firm eager to serve with professionalism. I felt heard and immediately knew that I had found the right place to change and update my Will/Trust. I was not disappointed.  Thank you for helping me feel confident through this Covid time.
Follow through is excellent and straight forward

I made the best decision when I chose Catherine Fleming of Fleming Law to represent me in my lawsuit against the city of Seattle. I had a bicycle crash on a poorly marked Seattle street which left me semi-paralyzed and permanently in a wheelchair. Catherine is a personal injury attorney but has a special interest in representing injured cyclists, pedestrians or vehicle drivers who sue municipalities for negligent road design. My case was a complicated one due to a preexisting condition, but Catherine had built a strong case, and the city did not want to risk going to trial. They proposed settling out of court, and during her skillful mediation, I was granted a 7-figure settlement, an amount which far exceeded my expectations and for which I am forever grateful to Catherine. This can only be attributed to her in-depth preparation, knowledge of the law, and prior experience with cases against the city of Seattle.

I found Catherine because of another attorney’s high praise. He is a prominent Seattle attorney, and even though he specializes in bicycle accidents, he said he doesn’t like taking cases like mine, against the city of Seattle, as they were high risk and hard to win. He said there’s only one attorney that he knew of who has won these types of cases, and that’s Catherine Fleming.

It was this referral by another highly  reputable attorney and my initial conversation with Catherine that led me to retaining her for my case. She absolutely proved to be the right choice. Catherine is a hardworking perfectionist who skillfully builds a case with tenacity, thoroughness, and an unwavering commitment to fight for her clients.

If you have been injured, either cycling, walking, or driving, and think it may be the result of poor signage or road design (or any other reason), consult with Catherine Fleming at Fleming Law. She is one of a few who has the expertise to take on these cases and has earned respect for her many wins. She has earned mine, and I am most grateful that this large settlement amount brings us a newfound financial freedom and peace of mind for whatever our future holds.
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Jan - Thank you so much for trusting me with your matter. I'm grateful to represent amazing people like you. Your strength, patience, and tenacity were just a few reasons why you were such a great client. Please stay in touch! Warmest, Catherine

reviews.text:
We are so glad we found Catherine Fleming and Fleming Law!

After my wife’s bicycle crash in Seattle and subsequent spinal surgery, we faced an uncertain future.  Before, she had been a strong cyclist and active hiker, but now was confined to a wheelchair with incomplete paraplegia.

Not only did we experience the loss of the many activities we had once shared, we now faced looming medical expenses, and the possibility of needing long-term care in the future.

We believed that the area where my wife crashed was confusing and dangerous for bicyclists, but were unsure if we had any hope of recovering anything for damages.  Catherine agreed to take us on as clients and worked tirelessly to build our case against the city.  She amassed evidence that the street design at the site of the accident was unsafe, and furthermore that the city had been aware of this fact.

As the case progressed, it became clear that we had chosen the right attorney for the job.  She demonstrated a thorough understanding of the issues and the law surrounding bicycles and traffic safety.  It was also evident that she also commanded the respect of her counterparts in the City Attorney’s Office.

After Catherine guided us through a successful mediation, we were delighted with the settlement.  While no amount of money can replace my wife’s mobility, we now face the future with less anxiety.

-- Bobby Ball
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Bobby, Thank you for your kind words. I'm honored to have met and represented you. Helping wonderful clients is why I love what I do and never want to stop. Please stay in touch! Warmest regards, Catherine

reviews.text: My experience with this law firm could not have been any better. Communication was excellent and they took the time to understand my case. I was made whole in a lawsuit beyond my expectations.  Thank you Cathrine and Jeanne
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Lou! We appreciate your kind words and are privileged to serve such great clients like you. Wishing you all our best! ~Catherine/Jeanne

reviews.text: Catherine and her team help me out when i was in a car accident.Definitely recommend they took well care of me and my family. They where always updating me on what was going on every step of the way.  Especially Jeanne was very kind and always looking for what was best for me and my family .
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Consuela, Thank you so much for your review. I'm thrilled that we could help you. Wishing you and your family all the best. -Catherine

reviews.text: Fleming Law helped us when we were rear ended, a truck had struck our Ford Escort sending us flying into the other lane of traffic. We were  hurt, and Fleming Law went into action. Both insurances didn't want to pay, not only did Fleming Law get both parties to comply, but did it in a very timely matter!  I was referred by a friend who also used Fleming Law, now I am referring Fleming Law to you!!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Ken - Thank you so much for taking the time to write such a great review. You'll always remain one of my favorite clients. You were always so cooperative and willing to do what was needed to resolve your claim ASAP. I wish you and your wife all my best.
Kind regards,
Catherine

reviews.text: Catherine helped me through four years of building and favorably resolving a case that left me with significant physical injury, making sure I am better secure for the rest of my life. I have nothing to espouse but praises for her professionalism, guidance, and personable nature and unequivocally recommend her to anyone who needs legal assistance.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Daniel - Thank you for taking the time to write your review. Your bike crash and injuries deserved the attention of SDOT and Seattle's leadership. Because of your composure and supportive family, my job was made easier.

A case like yours would intimidate the most courageous clients. However unnerving, your poise helped fuel my commitment for fighting for you every step of the way. Even when other attorneys told me that your case was a long shot, I never stopped believing that your claims were righteous. Moreover, I was determined to get the best possible result for you.

As a positive update, the City is finally taking more measures to make that section of Yesler Terrace/C.I.D. a little less treacherous for people on bikes. Please know that my fight continues to make the roads safer for all people who choose to ride their bikes on our streets. Keep in touch and I'll do the same.
Warmest regards,
Catherine

reviews.text: My husband and I chose Catherine Fleming to represent us after we were in a car accident because she is sharp and it was obvious that she was experienced and knew the laws well. We learned of Catherine through word of mouth; she had represented our friend's daughter after she'd been hurt in an accident. Catherine's high level of expertise, professionalism, and her sincerity to satisfy our needs as her clients while meeting her own high personal standards were apparent in her work. She is in her line of work to help people, and this is apparent in her work! We were thankful that all of our medical expenses were paid and that we received compensation for our future needs. She was able to hold the insurance companies accountable--something we learned is extremely difficult without legal counsel. We will forever be thankful, and would highly recommend her to anyone seeking assistance.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Carla - Thank you so much for your great review. I'm so happy that we could get the result you deserved despite the insurers' nasty games. You will always hold a special place in my heart. Thank you for entrusting me with such an important, life-changing matter. It's my greatest honor to serve a genuine and thoughtful client like you. Please stay in touch!
Kind regards, Catherine

reviews.text: After an accident involving an intoxicated driver I reached out to Catherine with Fleming Law for representation. Throughout the process Catherine worked to resolve the issue and secure the settlement I deserved. I was always impressed by the attention and professionalism offered. Most noteworthy was Catherine's diligence and prompt response to my questions and inquiries. Her response times were such that I  was never left uncertain of the next step in the process, my mind was at ease as she managed the case. I highly recommend working with Fleming Law, I was not disappointed.
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Ken - Thank you so much for trusting me with your matter. I also appreciate getting the opportunity to now represent your adult son. You are always responsive when my paralegal or I have questions. This makes our jobs easier to get you the best results. Please stay in touch.  Best, Catherine

reviews.text: Sam is an excellent real estate lawyer and someone you definitely want in your corner when negotiating complex real estate transactions or disputing a contract.

Sam provided excellent legal guidance and communication facilitating a debt settlement matter for us.  He was quick to respond, had great follow up and helped us reach a mutually agreed upon offer resulting in a professionally executed and timely matter.

Samuel is a very dedicated lawyer whom help me to resolve my issue regarding a parking space dispute. I wish I could be able to rate him 10. I greatly recommend him for those having realstate matters.Thanks for your great job Sam and keep doing your great job.

Sam helped us with a difficult contractual situation during a real estate transaction. He clarified it from a legal perspective and negotiated with the other party successfully so that a modified contract was set up. I highly recommend Sam for his legal know-how, availability, and general customer service.
On top of things!!!👍😁

Mr Meyler represented me on a property line dispute with a developer. I appreciated his timely responses to me, his willingness to work virtually when possible. He was thorough and efficient and ALWAYS did what he said he would do expediently. He was very available and would let me know if there were times where he might be less available. Sam provided exactly what an attorney should....legal insight and perspective. He was excellent at outlining options in the process. He kept me informed in all the relevant details of the case. I highly recommend him.

Sam is currently representing my fiance in a complex neighbor harassment and adverse possession scenario and was a referral from a close friend.   My neighbor fraudulently tried to claim he owned a piece of her land parcel after 6 months of ongoing harassment despite a no contact order.  He attempted to build a fence through the middle of my property and planned on building a structure that connected to my garage citing a historical side yard easement agreement with the previous owner.  Sam was extremely responsive on a weekend no less, to stop the neighbor trespassing on her property, blocked him legally from adverse possession and was extremely patient in explaining the legal process.  He's been extremely patient in translating the legal jargon and outlining the legal options, as well as bringing in specialized counsel in fighting this multi-year case.  He's personable, ethical and overall a wonderful person and representation for your legal needs.  He would carefully explain her legal options, costs associated, recommended ways to minimize costs throughout the process and ultimately took her direction in all matters.  She can't recommend a better attorney based on our experience and overall satisfaction, Sam is a true gem!

Samuel assisted me with my legal problems with the utmost respect, integrity and professionalism. He is very good at what he does and always provided me with the most astute legal advice pertaining to all my legal questions and concerns. I will be recommending him to any family/friends I have.

I am a first time homeowner that was surprised with easement paperwork on my move-in day. My realtor immediately recommended Sam and I've had peace of mind ever since. The easement situation was far from simple (required witnesses, threats of litigation, ownership ambiguity) and Sam did not miss a beat. As an insanely busy Amazon employee I appreciated his attention to detail, consistent communication, and professionalism with the opposite side when I was feeling anything but professional. He also helped me weigh my options as I faced multiple important decisions, always approaching the issues in a way that was calculated, considerate and well thought through. I am so glad to have Sam as a resource if I ever face another legal circumstance related to my current or future properties & could not recommend him more highly.

Sam is awesome and I had a great experience with him from start to finish. He was always extremely quick to reply to every phone call and email every single time over the course of several months without fail.  His advice was very strong, his work was very thorough and his ability to explain all the options to me in an understandable way was very soothing. I had his work checked by my other attorney who said  his answers were great and his work was excellent.  Thank you, Sam.

My case is fairly complicated and related to real estate transaction. Samuel is very detail oriented, honest. He not only kept me informed, not also provided me the many potential outcome with options. A great professional that I can trust and count on.

Will keep him for any future legal matters.

Leah is an outstanding insurance attorney who truly stands out in her field. Over multiple conversations, she's demonstrated impressive knowledge and expertise while remaining incredibly accessible. In a profession where getting a callback can take days, Leah actually picks up the phone—which has made working with her refreshingly straightforward. Her responsiveness and command of insurance law make her an excellent choice for anyone needing legal guidance in this area. Highly recommend!"

I had the pleasure of working with Leah Snyder earlier this year. She is a tenacious advocate for her clients. I was impressed by her creativity to overcome challenges in her case and would feel comfortable recommending her to others.

I had the pleasure of chatting with Leah today. She was a breath of fresh air during a hard time. She was clear, knowledgeable and most importantly compassionate. Going through an insurance claim and living in a construction zone for half a year is tough. Leah understood and empathized and provided us with critical information to help us move forward.

Leah is such an amazing person - friendly, a great sense of humor, brave, and an AMAZING command of the law in her practice area. If you need someone to get you through a tough situation with hard to deal with insurers, contractors, or for a personal injury issue, Leah is the plaintiff's lawyer to go to in the Seattle area - hands down.
Leah is amazing and will work with you through difficult situations.

I am extremely grateful for Martin Kreshon for helping me with my personal injury case. He has been very helpful and informative about my case. This was my first time getting into an accident and had no prior experience or knowledge about the legal aspects of car accidents, personal injury, and insurance. However, Martin was there to help me through it all and made it really easy for me. He is very professional, communicates with you as much as possible, and takes great care of you throughout the entire process.  Martin was able to settle and finalize my case in which I am very happy with the end results of everything. I am very thankful for Martin and all the hard work he has done for me. I HIGHLY recommend working with Martin and Ember Law to friends, family, and everyone. Thank you again Martin !!

Martin Kreshon at Ember Law went above and beyond great service in my personal injury case.  Thanks to his knowledgeable and professional help, we were able to settle my case against the at-fault driver and also the insurance subrogation claim without having to proceed to mediation or trial and for a very fair amount.  I was very happy with the outcome, as I had no desire to proceed with a year (or more) of litigation.  Martin was there every step of the way to help me through the PI settlement process and I couldn't be more pleased with the results.  I will not hesitate to call on the firm again at any time in the future should I need further legal help
reviews.ownerResponse: We really appreciate your comments. Thank you!

reviews.text: Attorneys Leah and Martin are very high quality, hard working attorneys. They always do what is in their clients' best interest, and they have what it takes to go up against insurance companies and the government. I would refer my own friends and family to the Ember Law team. I highly recommend!

Ember Law came through for me with competence and kindness when I really needed it.

Lesson learned: consult an attorney of this caliber at the first sign of insurance companies acting in bad faith. Three years ago I was injured in a motor vehicle accident.

The insurers for both the car I was driving (which had Personal Injury Protection coverage) and for the at fault driver "misrepresented the truth" about the process to resolve my claim for medical bills.

Although I have an advanced degree, and many years of experience in life (I am 69,) I did not realize the extent to which I had been misled until a few days before the Statute of Limitations expired.

In my last minute search I had the great good luck of being referred to Ember Law.  In our initial phone call Leah efficiently took detailed information and agreed to take the case.  Leah explained how I had been misled, and demonstrated detailed knowledge of the process for both the PIP claim, and the liability claim. She has two similar cases in litigation at this time.

Fortunately, the same day, the at fault driver's insurance settled with me (they had made no previous offer.)  So although I did not need to use Ember Law's services, I gained a lot of knowledge, and peace of mind.

Had I known about Ember Law and consulted with them when I first began to see red flags, I would have experienced a great deal less stress, and a better outcome.  After settling my case, another attorney confirmed Leah's outstanding capabilities. I hope this review will help another plaintiff in need.

Ember Law  and Martin were really easy to work with and very professional in getting everything done as soon as possible. They guided me in my car accident case and got everything handled surprisingly fast. Highly recommended!
Leah at Ember Law delivers great results and actually cares for her clients. Big recommend.
John Moore is a great lawyer he has kept me well imformed.

Helsell Fetterman managing director, Kam Kirkevold, broke a written residential lease contract.  He then initiated a $26k suit against the landlord on 4 claims for $26k.  Lost all 4 claims and had to pay for counter claims.   I am a web designer and represented myself in a 2 day bench trial and won.  case 21CIV32812KCX.  If Kam can't honor his contract or manage his own legal affairs, how can he help you manage yours?
Paul Drayna very promptly responded to my inquiry and set up a call. He gave me excellent advice and a referral. Professional, prompt, and very helpful. Thanks!

Tyler Jones and Maria Rios Martinez were excellent in their representation of a real estate sale.  This transaction involved, multiple amendments and all sorts of complications.  All issues were expertly resolved and handled efficiently and with a personal touch.  I will absolutely send this firm all of my transactional referrals.  Their billing is fair and significantly lower than the competitors that I have been sending referrals to.

Hire these attorneys with confidence.

Waited for over a week for someone to get back to me, had to call several times and left messages, I used them about a year ago and things went very well. Not anymore. They couldn't find any records of my case, not helpful at all. Not sure what happened with them but I waisted a week for nothing, now looking for a different law firm.
Greg Pittman is fantastic for estate planning

Attorneys we worked with: Laura Hoexler and Greg Pittman, front desk staff Trish Reitan: They did our will and this is the WORST experience I've ever had with a law firm. After being a client of about 10 years and having them draft my will, I cannot recommend this firm. I felt that there was a serious lack of professionalism here. When we came in to sign our will, it was so messed up and not what we had asked for. Important details were left out that had been requested. They then forgot about me and my wife for 7 weeks. We had to finally remind them we existed and that they owed us resolution on our will and trust. Then they tried to bill us to fix the mistakes made in drafting it. This was just a mess and I will never do business with this firm again nor recommend them. Here is some advice: learn how to be accountable and apologize to a longstanding client if they do you the courtesy to tell you about their bad experience. This review comes regrettably after months of back and forth with their administrative staff.
Tyler Jones is phenomenal. Very thorough and cares about you. If you're a dentist or healthcare professional looking for a lawyer, ask for him.
Patient and understanding.

10 out 5 stars overall. Five stars for the quality, sincerity, and confidence in Emma’s legal advice. Another 5 stars for the above and beyond client-service from the entire team.

Without Emma’s legal counsel, I know that I would not have had the best and safe outcome that I had hoped for. She did a phenomenal job laying out the details and explaining the process involved to ensure that I remain protected at all costs.

Emma also understood the urgency of my case; she was relentless in her execution and stayed ahead of our timeline. She stood by every single one of my requests and made herself available to answer my questions or concerns while setting proper and reasonable expectations – she knows her craft and walked the extra mile for me.

Ultimately, Emma’s thorough research provided the pathway I needed to stay safe and rise to victory. I am proud to be a Helsell Fetterman client and will continue to retain them for all legal matters that may arise as I know I am in the best hands. Under Emma’s counsel, I felt that I was working with an attorney and a team that truly cared for me on a personal level.

I am incredibly grateful for Atty. Emma Kazaryan and her team.

reviews.text:
No words can truly describe how grateful I am to Chris Grimes and his fantastic paralegal (Heather). I'm sure Chris and Heather just feel all they did was their job which just so happened to result in a successful win on my behalf. But for me, they helped me through a truly trying time not only physically caused by the accident, but also for my mental well-being. Without Chris's help, the system that is set up against us average folks would have taken advantage of me. I certainly wouldn't have had a chance at the result I was able to get without Chris's help.

*For those who want to be spared from my long-winded details and thank yous to this firm, just know the following:

Chris will not give you false promises of miracles or a guaranteed win. What you will get is an attorney who is a truthful, sincere, pragmatic, and a kind human being you'd least expect to come across in the field of law. He will treat you with respect and above else like a person rather than just a dollar sign. I cannot recommend Chris enough to those who have apprehension reaching out to an attorney. If you have a personal injury, medical negligence, or accident case, it would be well worth your time to at the very least consult with Chris and find out for yourself if my statement here is true.

**The following from this point are some of the details of my case for more context:

To be frank, my accident is comparatively minor, especially to the type of cases that Grimes Law Group normally handles. I was fully aware of this and Chris did not sugar coat this either. But I was scared and desperate in finding help to navigate my first accident that involved another driver. Although the accident was not my fault and all evidence made that clear, I was a nervous-wreck having to figure out what to do next after the next on my own.

The final straw was when my very own insurance company basically told me there was no point in pursuing anything further after repairs and exhausting my PIP. And if I did try to go after monetary compensation for the medical expenses beyond PIP, they said that I would be wasting a lot of time just to get maybe $1,000-$2,000, if lucky. I was so rattled by this call, that all the paperwork I started receiving from both the at-fault driver's insurance company and my own seemed like only ammunition for them to use against me without me knowing how.

In hindsight, my accident left me with permanent damage that I now have to deal with for the remainder of my life and all of that would have been likely downplayed if Chris was not there to advocate for me. He recognized my suffering and immense distress. He was willing to take on my case even though this was far from any "winning" case. It may be hard to believe when I say this for many people, but I truly did not care about winning or losing. It's not that I was not in need of money, but it just meant the world to me (and my sanity) that someone was willing to go up to bat for me in my time of need.

It's really great to know there are still good people out there in this profession. I will never forget what Chris and Heather have done for me. Thank you again and many many times more!

Highly recommend Mr. Chris Grimes and his paralegal Heather Crabb for helping you with legal matters for vehicle accidents.  Thorough, professional, high level of expertise and most importantly the respect for people and the law they both demonstrate at all times.  The determination and perseverance that both of them have is above all.  I cannot say enough of how I appreciated them both during my recovery and the trust that I had in them to do what is right on my behalf. Thank You!

He went out of his way to be extraordinarily respectful of some of my differences, and genuinely fought hard for me. Our opponent on the case was a massive corporation that had first wronged me, then tried to deny their wrongdoing, and finally they brought terrifying and unscrupulous lawyers to their side of the table to muddy the waters with counteraccusations and vile lies.

But unlike 90% of attorneys out there, I believe Steve truly cares about the Little Guy and he really went to bat for me on a case that I thought was hopeless at times- fighting against a dug-in Goliath with limitless resources. But Steve never quit advocating for me, and in the end we eked out a modest victory.

Even though we achieved merely a moderate settlement that was not necessarily lifechanging money, I couldn't have felt more happy and vindicated (and plan to put that couple thousand G's to good use). While I can't speak for how every case goes, or to the ultimate depths and breadths of his legal acumen, this case here did Steve Teller Law some serious credit... And I can't thank you enough, Steve.

In January of 2019 I got some bad diesel at a fuel station causing my car to break down (this is why you should always save your receipt!). Also, if something like this happens to you make sure you take your car to a mechanic immediately and save a fuel sample.

After months of back and forth with the station's supplier I was getting nowhere close to receiving any reimbursement for over $10K of out of pocket expenses to get my car fixed.

As soon as Neil got involved, literally the next day the supplier admitted fault and started negotiating a settlement. Within a week they made their initial offer which was unsatisfactory. I asked Neil to reject the offer and negotiate with them. We managed to get an offer which covered all of my expenses only a few weeks after Neil got involved.

Overall my experience with Neil was fantastic. He is highly professional, a good negotiator and an excellent communicator of complex legal situations. I highly recommend talking with him about your vehicle related legal situation.

Their Intake info, which is not protected by attorney-client confidentiality, requires you to provide all the confidential evidence. You won't get a chance to talk to their attorney. Scott and his team at the Blankenship Law Firm have been the absolute epitome of professionalism and prowess. Long story short, I could not have been any happier with The Blankenship Law Firm, and highly recommend them to any individual or collective seeking expert, knowledgeable counsel.

When I was abruptly terminated without cause, I knew it was grossly unfair and I had to fight it. But I didn’t know where to begin—my reputation was ruined and most people I approached, both professionally and socially, looked at me with suspicion and disdain.  Since I was fired from a large, powerful, popular Catholic healthcare system, colleagues and friends thought that I must have done something terrible to deserve termination. It was an extremely stressful time for my family and me.

Thankfully, we eventually met Scott and his team as a referral from a physician colleague.  Scott listened to me thoroughly and believed in me. While everyone—family, friends, and enemies alike—wanted me to just let it go and leave town, Scott understood my need to clear my name. This was all I needed. It was a great comfort to be heard, but also very empowering to know that a lawyer of his caliber and experience was willing to stand by a ruined individual like me to fight a big institution.

The Catholic Health Initiatives/CHI Franciscan Health was brutal and brazen with its retaliation and harassment, but Scott did not back down. He thoughtfully advised me about big and small decisions. He was always available to talk or meet. He was sincerely concerned about the lawsuit’s impact on my family. His staff was immensely supportive, thorough and efficient. I truly felt that I had a team before me and behind me at all times. They sought out my input constantly. It was a solid collaboration. I no longer felt alone.

I saw Scott in action in many settings—in legal communications, in depositions, in court, in mediation — and he is razor-sharp and relentless.  I was at awe at Scott’s attention to every legal detail.  With his staff, we poured over more than 10,000 pages of documents and more than 40 hours of videos.  Scott and I worked through several lunch hours and even met with witnesses on several Sundays.  His work ethic is exemplary, his devotion to a just cause nothing short of admirable, and his integrity beyond reproach.

Much to everyone’s surprise, just over a week before trial was to begin, we won a $2.5 million settlement from the Catholic Health Initiatives/CHI Franciscan Health.  It was only then that many people looked at me without suspicion and disdain. They began to listen and ask for details. Only then did they believe that a physician could be wrongfully terminated and maliciously framed by a big beloved Catholic institution. This made me appreciate Scott even more, that he trusted me and was willing to defend me when it was too inconvenient and complicated for most. I have no doubt that the successful resolution of my lawsuit was directly due to the great skill and expertise of Scott and his team at The Blankenship Law Firm.

My husband and I were referred to this firm as being THE employment attorney firm in Seattle. After a mishap with my spouse's previous employer we decided to look into pursuing legal action. Once we reached out to Blankenship Law we were paired with a preliminary fact finding attorney to determine the logistics and whether or not we had a strong case or anything worth pursuing from a legal standpoint.

The gentleman we were connected with lacked any follow through and showed no interest in obtaining a new client - the first step was to speak to several witnesses. After numerous failed attempts to connect them we have given up. We have sat with the witness, phone ready at numerous designated times when we were to receive a phone call and got none. This man's inability to make a brief 10 minute phone call at a scheduled time does not speak well of how this firm operates and runs their business.

Each time the phone call never came as scheduled by their attorney, we were lucky to even get a follow up explaining why. At one point we were told it was because he lost his phone. Unimpressive to say the least. We will be taking this very large and profitable lawsuit elsewhere. Their loss.
No compassion is correct. This firm does not want to hear about your case if the case seems like something not obviously profitable. They are very rude and heartless.

HEAVEN SENT

When I first met with Scott Blankenship and his team, I felt like a huge weight had been lifted off my shoulders. For the first time, I truly felt like everything was going to be okay. Finding an attorney is a stressful and mentally draining reality. When I began my search, I didn't know exactly where to start. I sent numerous letters to several attorneys around the area, and after several weeks went by with no responses, I started losing all hope that I would ever see justice done.

Just when I had almost given up, I found The Blankenship Law Firm online, and began reading about the firm and attorney Scott Blankenship in particular. I learned that Scott has been selected as a “Super Lawyer” every year from 2003-2012, was included in "The Best Lawyers in America" for 2012 by Best Lawyers, and was named a Top Lawyer by Seattle Metropolitan Magazine in both 2010 and 2011. Most importantly, when I read that Scott is committed to achieving justice for his clients, and believes that no person, government, or corporate entity is beyond the reach of the law, I knew that I had found an attorney who would vigorously represent me and help right the wrongs I had suffered.

After countless hours of preparing, gathering information, getting witnesses together, phone calls, emailing back and forth, and several trips to Seattle , the matter was resolved. I now have a high level of respect for the justice system. I could not have asked for a better team to represent me. I can honestly say that I have gained new friends for life. Scott Blankenship and his law firm are truly angels from above.

Don't let the areas of practice fool you into thinking this firm has any noble virtues or compassion. My experience was too disturbing and humiliating for most strangers to accept as being realistic.. So I'll just beg anybody who's in trouble to please go to anybody but these guys.

reviews.text: Eric is exceptionally intelligent, ethical, professional, and will do everything in his power to bring justice to his clients.  He was always available to help, even on weekends.  Character traits of empathy and compassion can feel scarce in a legal battle.  Eric's benevolent character and generosity were a breath of fresh air for me and my wife.  I was going through a terrible time related to an employment matter.  A financial fraud I faced held me hostage to my job.  Eric helped me get through this difficult time, helping me with a financial matter that allowed me the freedom and courage to leave the job.  The litigation lasted for two long years due to unbelievably egregious behaviors of the defendants.  But Eric got us the outcome me and my wife deserved.  In fact, I would say we got a lot more in judgement that we had hoped for.  We owe this success to Eric.  Eric got a 7-digit judgement for me and 7-digit judgment for my wife.  Eric knew how to convince the judge, though this did require a lot of work and strategy.  We highly recommend Eric Helmy without any reservations.
reviews.ownerResponse: Eric's dedication and expertise reflect the high standards at Northwest Business Law LLC. Delighted to hear about your successful outcome.

reviews.text: Eric Helmy is an exceptional attorney with expertise in several domains of law including but not limited to business law, employment law, malpractice law.  My wife and I sought Eric’s counsel in the business law domain.  We found Eric to be deeply compassionate, professional, empathetic, and intelligent.  We were dealing with very seasoned and predatory fraudsters who dodged service, avoided depositions, willfully disregarded court order for discovery, and used every legal loophole available to play the court and the legal system.  Eric helped us get substantial judgements (two independent judgements worth millions of dollars - cumulatively worth 10 Million) despite the several challenges involving many defendants across different states.  On other legal matters also, Eric was always prompt to render his professional input free of charge, always availing himself - for hours!  I don’t know of many attorneys that share their personal cell phone with their clients.  Eric was always available when we needed him, and even when we had financial difficulty.  He is a very gifted writer for legal documents/motions.  He is aggressive, strategic, and adaptable to ever changing situations in a highly treacherous legal matter.  I highly recommend him. He is in a regal class of attorneys - he is sophisticated. As a cancer specialty MD physician who is interested in pursuing law school, I can say Eric has many commendable qualities as an attorney and as a human that one can look up to.
reviews.ownerResponse: We're glad Eric Helmy's expertise in business law made a positive impact on your case here at Northwest Business Law LLC.

reviews.text:
Eric has been wonderful to work with during the course of my case and I would definitely recommend him. He has shown immense compassion while also instilling a professional attitude with me at all times.  He is communicative and answers all of my questions, of which there are many, to the fullest.

reviews.text: I had a consultation call with Eric that blew me out of the water. Over almost an hour that I was not charged for, Eric was compassionate to a an enormously painful issues, while being incisive about what was legally actionable and what was not. He broke down costs of any potential legal action in stages, and made suggestions about what exactly I would need to bring as strong a case as possible. The strengths and weaknesses of my case were clearly outlined in a way that allowed me to make a informed decision about whether to proceed. If this is how Eric treats prospective clients, I can't imagine the skill and consideration his paying clients receive.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kindness, Colleen. You've really made my day.  Cheers, Eric

reviews.text:
(Update*) If you don't have bill gates level kind of income don't expect any kind of help from this place whatsoever. This place is not for the middle class/regular folk or if you're poor(due to financial loss being the basis of your case). This company is more concerned with getting paid than winning a case. Thankfully, I've found help from another law firm who agreed to take my case. That don't consider a big corporation committing contempt of court, in the superior court "negligible damages". But, nice to know that your firm does. Future customers, keep that in mind as well. Glad to know Northwest business law firm put so much effort in responding to a Google review, rather than putting that effort in listening to a customer explain their case.

PS: when* and it's pop culture* just so you know.
reviews.ownerResponse: Sadly, popular culture and insurance industry propaganda has convinced many people that they are entitled to millions of dollars in compensation even where they have suffered negligible damages. The system doesn't work that way.

reviews.text: Very good law firm.  Eric is smart and competent.  His communication is excellent.  I will use him again for sure

Eric was not able to represent my husband and I due to many variables but he did provide us with alternative options! He responded to my request for assistance within 10 minutes and took the time to hear our whole story leading up to the unfortunate circumstance and then proceeded to offer alternative options for recourse. So happy I called his office! We now have a clear cut path forward…
Eric is great! He gave my wife and I the legal advice needed to successfully navigate a delicate situation.

Our experience with Eric Helmy was great. We consulted with him and even offered to pay for his services but he declined. He gave us a lot of great information and was honest and up front with us. I would not hesitate to hire him if we ever needed his services moving forward. It's rare to find a lawyer who genuinely wants to help and empower you in unfortunate situations.

I hired Mr. Helmy in four cases. Not only he lost them all, he missed ALL the deadlines for ALL discoveries, witnesses, and depositions. I had to step into trials in the four cases washout any witnesses, deposition, or discovery. He took his fees by flat rate in advance and all he did was lies. I got sanctions in two cases because I gave him the answers for questions asked by the adversary and he forgot to submit them for several months till the judges ruled against me without giving me any opportunity to talk because my attorney was supper moron. Mr. Helmy DID NOT WIN A SINGLE MOTION in the four cases for almost the entire year. In one case against Chase bank, he got the full payment for his fees, and he forgot to submit the notice of appearance to the court. I got a default judgment because of his gross negligence. A huge malpractice lawsuit is coming soon against this quack. We reviewed his history, it's incredibly astonishing that he kept doing the same mistakes for twenty years. Hopefully, this time, he won't get a way without tens of millions of dollars damages and punitive damages.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dr. Wise is not being truthful. We did not lose “all four” of his cases. None of them went to trial or summary judgment on our watch, because his conduct made that impossible.

The public record is clear: Dr. Wise caused an irreconcilable conflict of interest, which forced us to withdraw from representing him and his company as to all matters. This was mandatory per the testimony of ethics counsel.

Contrary to his assertions regarding our competency, Dr. Wise actively fought to retain us as counsel after creating the conflict of interest. In doing so, he publicly testified before the two courts listed below (plus an arbitrator privately) that he retained confidence in Mr. Helmy’s capabilities and wanted to keep NWBizLaw engaged as counsel. Our motions to withdraw were granted on all matters.

To avoid prejudice to Dr. Wise upon our withdrawal, we properly requested trial continuances on his behalf so that he would enough time to secure replacement counsel. This was granted in all cases.

Dr. Wise is also being untruthful in relating that we lost “every motion.” To the contrary, we brought the client’s long-deficient discovery into compliance and defeated our opponent’s discovery motions in German Wise Dental v. Haghighi (in arbitration). Dr. Wise did lose a motion to compel discovery and was sanctioned in Cooper v. German Wise Dental. What he did not reveal is that the plaintiff moved to have him sanctioned for failing to materially participate in discovery, where he had testified in deposition that responding to discovery in the matter was not worth his time.

It is true that an order of default was entered against Dr. Wise on the 4th matter due to a clerical error with the filing of our Answer. However, this was easily reversible under procedural rules. We were in the process of curing that error – at no cost to the client - when Dr. Wise’s creation of the conflict of interest prevented our doing so.

The full records of proceedings – including the plaintiffs’ allegations against Dr. Wise - are publicly available under the following case numbers:

Covington v. German Wise Dental et al., US District Court, W. Dist. WA, Case No: 3:20-cv-06173
Cooper v. German Wise Dental et al., WA Superior Court for Cowlitz Co., Case No: 20-2-00404-08

The third matter, German Wise Dental v. Haghighi, was in arbitration, so its records are not publicly available. Former opposing counsel can be contacted for corroboration of our account upon request.

Thank you for reading.

reviews.text: I am a professional mediator who mediates disputes in the civil justice system.  As a mediator who has mediated numerous cases and an attorney for decades, I encountered Mr. Helmy in a very complex case when he represented one of the parties in the case I was mediating.  I was greatly impressed by his thorough preparation not only for me as the mediator but with his clients who had to understand the substantial difficulties of their case.  It was obvious to me his clients though in a very difficult situation had full faith in him and that he had clearly and honestly  discussed the risks they faced if they could not negotiate an agreed upon resolution.  He worked hard.  He communicated clearly.  And, helped his clients through a very difficult process seeing light at the end of the tunnel.
I worked with Eric, and he was great! Great work, great communication, and a quick turnover time. I highly recommend using Northwest Business Law

I can not express how much gratitude I have for Northwest Business Law. Eric helped me with a business matter and really took the time to methodically handle it. I appreciate his kindness, knowledge, and strong expertise. I would recommend Eric to anyone that is looking for someone that take time and truly cares about their clients. Thanks Eric!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review, Tim!

reviews.text:
In 2013 I was sued for 2.5M on a baseless claim with no evidence to support the claim. I chose to not respond to the courts or the plaintiff. In April of 2017, I contacted Eric Helmy to restructure my business and in doing so, Eric convinced me fighting the case was the correct move. In April 2017, Eric became my friend and attorney.

July 2018, Eric walked into a deposition prepared to end the case. In less than 4 hours of deposing the plaintiff, a full admittance of false statements was achieved. The wizardry Eric has in his craft to problem solve, conductive reason and thoroughly understand his client is phenomenal. Eric had the entire lawsuit dismissed and gave me back freedom over my life.

If you are looking for an attorney to methodically and decisively resolve any legal needs, hire him. I’ve spent $250k on legal fees with other attorneys and never saw an ounce of the passion and drive Eric has to win a case.

There are plenty of lawyers who can win a case, only a handful In the world can do it with such class and articulation as Eric Helmy.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review, Atlas!

reviews.text:
"One overcomes the world with justice."
- Indian philosopher Kautilya (321) BCE.

I have the honor to have Eric Helmy as my corporate litigation attorney.  I want to share my sincere respect for his professional qualities. Eric is a great lawyer protecting my company and family when faced with injustice.

Eric, by far, is one the most intelligent men I have ever met in my life.  He can penetrate quickly into the deepest grounds of the case.  In volatile and confusing matters, I am often surprised by the accuracy with which Eric can promptly give a portrait of the situation.  Indebtedness and conflicts all have ways of compounding if unattended.  In a complex case, desires like weeds can grow thick, intelligence can not flow, and the truth of the matter is hidden.  Eric's clarity with intelligent reasoning runs so strong, sweeping open clogged confusion very powerfully.  The lucidity opens the gate to allow me to see the light through the darkness.

In managing complex legal issues, teamwork is the most important.  One needs self-control, patience, diligence, and calmness.  Eric always brings the sober truth of the matter.  Eric shows excellent strength in respecting facts, applying knowledge creatively, and upholding principles in legal issues.  The heart of litigation matters is to seek the truth.  Eric's great compassion is to bring the reality of the case and protect my team from dangers.  Sober truth may sound bitter at times but paves excellent preparation to endure hardship.

Eric offers his support in the strength of truth in the most challenging times.  As a person without a legal background, my heart often fills with doubts and hesitancy when faced with complex and challenging decisions.  Eric is my guide through the maze of legal matters.  Eric has a vision and holds this vision like the eyes of an eagle while listening to my story.  Eric's advice is a light dispelling the darkness of ignorance in legal analysis.

Eric is courageous.  Courage repels dangers.  He is intelligent, outspoken, and creative when facing challenges, demonstrating inner fortitude without fear of adversity.  Eric has a kind heart, and he always stands by the justice.  Eric is impartial toward truth.  The virtue of truthfulness is that respecting reality may be disagreeable at first but deliver a sweet result.  Eric is objective and fair among all likes and dislikes, biased by faults, errors, and prejudice.

A successful undertaking is a team effort.  To work with a strong and successful lawyer like Mr. Eric, I feel my side's essential requirement is to do an excellent job as a team player. Eric always schedules ahead of time.  It is imperative to meet with Eric prepared. A complex legal case requires a good team dynamic.   I always remind myself to give Eric my best support for his important work and listen to his advice carefully to understand his ideas.

I have so much gratitude for Eric for his defense of my company and family with justice, support of my team, impartiality toward truth, guidance in legal matters, and most importantly, the great kindness of his heart.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review, Yuan!

My case was complicated due to the longevity of the time I lasted while working injured. After surgeries and therapy that lasted a little over 2 years I wasn’t able to return to work. Doug and his firm though went to bat for me. When I say that I mean with all the hope you’d want from having to deal with lawyers. If you’re like me you’re probably very wary of lawyers and the court system.just seems like common sense. Doug, Cher , and Aysha as well as dougs associates whom I didn’t speak to(Doug conferred with them often) made the entire process so pleasant I miss getting their calls. Cher whom I dealt with the most besides Doug is about the brightest ray of sunshine I could’ve asked for. She basically held my hand through all the paperwork and logistics. The things I didn’t understand she made sure I did and only had my best interest at heart. Aysha , who stepped in anytime Cher was unavailable ( which I assume Cher was assigned to my case and Aysha would fill in if Cher was out of the office) knew the ins and outs of my case as if it was hers. I never lacked information or if I had a question someone had an answer. I feel like they are a tight knit family and I became a friend of the family. I’ve never written a review before but I feel like these guys deserve the credit due. I went through depression and many other obstacles since my life was changed and they were there every step of the way. Each one of them is an unsung hero for me. I look back now and feel blessed that I hired doug as my representative. I know of course there’s money involved and blah blah blah but I’ll sincerely say that Doug is one of the few In my opinion that are out there doing what good they can with the tools they have to keep people from getting taken advantage of by the big man. Doug and his crews hard work and diligence paid off immensely. If you’re on the fence about who to hire and you’ve read this far. I’ll tell you now if you go somewhere else I’d have the strong suspicion you don’t like yourself. Doug changed my life in many ways but it wasn’t the money at the end. When I was lost Doug gave me a light in a dark forest and showed me the way.

They were by my side every step of the way and I couldn’t recommend them more! If you are thinking about reaching out to a lawyer, don’t think twice.. Call them!

reviews.text: I highly recommend Stacey and Jacobsen for any maritime case. Their team, including Jim and Nigel, demonstrated exceptional knowledge of Maritime Law and provided professional, ethical, and kind service. They worked tirelessly on my behalf after I suffered a permanent disability from an injury at sea, ultimately securing a sizable verdict that has made a significant difference in my life. Throughout the trial process, they kept me informed and guided me every step of the way, showing genuine care and dedication to my case.

reviews.text: Looking for a lawyer isn’t something you want to do. But when I found Stacey & Jacobson, I found something special. I wasn’t sure what was going to happen to me after I got hurt on a barge. I wasn’t able to work the same job and was faced with not being able to work on the water. I didn’t know my rights when the insurance company started calling me. I am thankful that Nigel Stacey, Joe Stacey, Jim Jacobsen, and Alyta Loupe were able to help me.  They actually listened to me and understood what my family and I were going through and most of all they were there for us every step of the way. They started work on my case right away and  went to trial to fight for me. I can stay in my home and start retraining for a new career.  I strongly recommend Stacey & Jacobsen to handle any maritime injury case. I’m grateful for everyone of them.
reviews.ownerResponse: Our team was deeply grateful for the opportunity to represent you and couldn't be happier that we achieved the right outcome. You were wonderful to work with, and we wish you nothing but success moving forward! Please, stay in touch.

reviews.text: I experienced a life changing injury aboard a tugboat that ended my career on the water that I had worked so hard for. It took some time for the shock and realization of just how uncertain my future was and I needed professional guidance and counsel. I contacted Nigel Stacey. He was able to tell me right away exactly what my rights are. He also explained the process going forward which seemed incredibly daunting for someone who has never experienced anything in the legal system, but he was with me every step of the way to keep my headspace on course. Nigel and his team were incredible to work with. They were attentive to my thoughts and concerns, communicated thoroughly, and responded in a timely manner to calls and emails. Most importantly, Nigel fought on my behalf. I may not have a future in the maritime industry, however much of the stress of my future has been relieved and I am forever grateful.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are all so thankful we could advocate for you and delighted that the outcome reflects what was right. Representing you was a true pleasure from start to finish. Best wishes for everything that lies ahead!

reviews.text: They GET it

I was injured while working as a commercial fisherman. In addition to the physical drama, I was also  put in the difficult position of having to decide whether to return to work after the accident or pursue legal aid. I ended up hiring Stacey and Jacobsen. While there are probably other capable other maritime lawyers in the Seattle area, both Joe and Jake were very good. They delivered the results that they anticipated. However, not being an expert on maritime law, I can't really describe how they acted as legal representatives. What I can attest to, more importantly, was that they treated me with respect the entire time. They were both very sympathetic to the fact that this was a stressful time for me, and never tried to convince me to do anything that I was uncomfortable with. They would lay all of my options with possible outcomes out on the table, and gave me as much information as possible for me to make a decision. They made an incredibly tough situation significantly more bearable. I would recommend them to anyone that was hurt while working at sea.
reviews.ownerResponse:

I feel as though this company is out to take advantage of people , or they are just down right incompetent . Long story short, fell from a scaffolding at work from seven feet onto the concrete, for 8 months my physician has been telling me it's preexisting. When to a surgeon, he looked at my exrays, shows I have a fractured vertebrae. The doctor point blank, said "that's what we call a broken back". Miss Kristen wolf said she looked through my files and said she didn't see anything from my surgeon. When in fact may 29, in my l&I file, I saw that the surgeon did in fact file his notes, stating I should have a fusion done, specifically because of my l-5 vertebrae had been fractured. She then continued to say I can have their counsel for ten percent of my l&I monthly income in top of 30 percent if I get any kind of settlement at the end. Seems as though greed has struck again. They want ten percent of my pay to do what, obviously not work for me if they couldn't find a simple post, which was put in my file not even a month ago. Took me 30 seconds to find it. #notTrustworthy!!!

If you are in need of services from malpractice attorneys, I highly recommend CMG Law.  Life threw my family a curve ball, resulting in a need for CMG’s services.  Gene was referred to me by a trusting source and I am so appreciative of this referral.  I have the utmost respect for Gene, Tyler and Carl-Erich for their knowledge and professionalism.    They have been good listeners, transparent, thorough and treated my family as it is theirs.  Office staff have been respectful, responsive and efficient.  Professionally, I have worked with a number of lawyers in the past, and would have to say that Gene, Tyler and Carl-Erich are top notch! After going through one of the most life changing events as a small family, we could not be more grateful with our experience with CMG Law. We were in a position we never imagined we would be in. Tyler and his team were not only professional, but also personable and genuinely kind. We were treated with so much care as we were so unaware of how to navigate what we experienced. There was so much open communication throughout the entire process, so that we were always fully aware of where we were in the case. It gave us great peace of mind to know they truly cared about our family and our wellbeing , before, during and even after the case. Tyler and the team handled our case with the utmost care and respect.
