Tyler took the time to meet with us and discuss every part of the process assuring we knew exactly what to expect. They guided us but also took our wants and needs into consideration.

100/10 would recommend. Even if you have questions on IF you have a case, the team will help you work through those and make educated decisions.

I have worked with Bill Dussault on numerous cases over the last 30 years and find him to be a knowledgeable, ethical, compassionate and outstanding attorney.  I have referred dozens of people to him over the years and have heard only words of praise for his work and demeanor.  I highly recommend Bill Dussault.
Worst law firm ever. Doesn’t follow up facts and doesn’t support client. Never use them.

Over the past couple of years I've worked with a two-person team of lawyers, Sam Leonard and Morgan Lake, on a civil collections case which has finally concluded in our favor. Not only did I not remember ever being in the hospital who sent collections after me; up until the subpoena I received no indication that these bills even existed. I felt like someone had dropped a piano on my head.

Ultimately the diligence and hard work of Sam Leonard and Morgan Lake resulted in a ruling in our favor on appeal, after a strange initial dismissal of both parties' claims despite finding significant fault with the collections agency's practices. The appeals court released an opinion that is likely to be helpful to the defenses of other people in a similar position as I was. They didn't just do good for me, but their fight had ripple effects that will help other people protect themselves against being taken advantage of as I personally feel that I was. Ultimately an agreement was reached with the parties that took improper legal action against me which left both myself and my lawyers in a better place than when we began our fight.

At every step of the way, both Sam and Morgan displayed a quiet confidence in their abilities and as time went on it became clear why. They communicated thoughtfully and clearly every time we spoke which made it easy for a layman like myself to understand the process, my place in it, and the status of the case. They demonstrated thorough knowledge of the law as it pertains to my case. They're not just competent lawyers, they are *good people* who sincerely care about injustice in the world and are making it their mission to fight against. I went from being alone, panicked, and desperate to having two extremely intelligent and professional men on my side. Men with principles, something that I fear is becoming rare in our age. After going through what was already an extremely difficult experience and painful injuries, being sued for (what is to me) a large amount of money that I believed I didn't or shouldn't have owed was incredibly stressful, and frankly frightening. I am not a wealthy man in the financial sense. ...But because of the honorable efforts and endurance of Sam and Morgan I came out of this awful situation in a stronger position than I started--not something I expected, and more than I could realistically have hoped for... Especially in a world where it seems the odds are stacked against the little guy, no matter how righteous his position might be. I am so thankful for their help that I don't think I could ever adequately articulate it. I'm not a poet. What I can say is that these are good men in a corrupted world. I am grateful that the threads of fate, along with my reluctance to roll over to what I feel were unjust actions against me, brought us together. I know that their hearts are in this kind of work and that they want to do more of it so please reach out to them if you are in a similar position to the one I was in.

If you are dealing with a civil collection claim against you and believe that those bringing the claim have acted improperly, if you dispute that you actually owe the money, if you feel that you have been taken advantage of and need legal help, don't be afraid to reach out to Sam Leonard or Morgan Lake. Even if you are unable to pay them to retain their services, they may offer you a contingency agreement that takes that burden off of you. If you lose, you lose nothing, but if you win, everyone wins, including others in your position. We shouldn't roll over and accept injustice if we have the means to fight it. With these two men, you do have the means, if you are truly being sued improperly. Don't be a victim. Collections agencies need to operate within the law and do their jobs fairly, and they need to know that if they act improperly, unfairly or unlawfully they will be held accountable.

Morgan, Sam: Thank you for standing up for what you believe in and defending me.

Sam couldn't help me with my situation however he happily provided me a referral and sent me in the right direction. Although my review is not based on services rendered, I can't tell you how refreshing it is to speak to an attorney who isn't dismissive and rude! Thanks for being kind, Sam! It goes such a long way.

Tried contacting their offices via their website. After not getting a response after a week I called and left a message. Never received a response. Business must be so good they can just ignore potential clients.
I recommend Sam Leonard completely and whole-heartedly.  He took a difficult situation off my plate and handled it completely.  I felt well represented and protected with his counsel.

Sam is honest, honorable, has great integrity, and researches a case exhaustively. He is incredibly efficient, effective, and prepared when he goes to work on your behalf. He destroyed the opposition with a single letter in my case. You could not be better represented legally. He is a rare man in this day and age. Highly recommended.

Sam Leonard did outstanding work on my case! He was very professional, dedicated, very honest and easy to communicate with. I had a couple of collection attorneys after me trying to  garnish my wages after a debt had been satisfied, they somehow got a Judge to allow the reinstatement of garnishment. Sam Leonard's experience and knowledge not only stopped them from garnishing my wages, but made them pay me!!! He was certain from the beginning there was illegality in their process against me.  If it had not been from Mr. Leonard, they would've taken at least $9k from me. All I wanted from this was to not have to pay them, and for them to pay my attorney's fees, I got that, plus a very nice compensation. If I ever have another problem where I need legal service I will be contacting Sam Leonard for representation. Thanks for your help with everything!!!

I feel very blessed to have had someone as kind and professional as Sam Leonard to work with me in resolving a rather interesting case.
What started as something simple turned into quite the opposite. As I have no background in law Sam guided me to understand what turned out to be a very complex and confusing case for someone like me. He always put my best interests first and gave me every option possible before proceeding with the case. Needless to say I felt incredibly at ease throughout what would normally be a very stressful time. So if your in need of an attorney that treats you like a person instead of a dollar sign then Sam is you guy!!!

I can’t begin to say how grateful we are for being referred to debt defense attorney Sam Leonard at Leonard Law in the Seattle & Tacoma area. One of his specialties is winning. CACH, LLC a collection company who files thousands of collection lawsuits each year against consumers came out of nowhere and served us. Part of their method of operation is knowing many defendants are unsure of how to respond after being served or remain unaware of the legal filings.  Once CACH, LLC receives a default judgment from the courts their next step in most cases is to garnish your wages. Instead of allowing CACH LLC to rail road us we took
action by hiring Sam Leonard to build a case. He knows firsthand after representing many others of how Cach LLC operates. They are a machine that has no care with obtaining accurate information as he skillfully demonstrated to the court. By throwing several legal wrenches into Cach, LLC pursuit the case was dismissed. I strongly recommend Sam Leonard Attorney at Law as the best referral for anyone facing Cach, LLC or another collection company. He can strategically apply the law and turn the tide in your favor against these debt collectors & their abusive practices.  Sam Knows Debt Defense!

It’s like a factory for legal intakes. I’m not sure if they do any of the work they advertise. Will definitely waste your time with 1 million questions and a very rushed phone call. I didn’t feel heard. I would not recommend.

My case?

See following email from hkm

Unfortunately, HKM is not going to represent you at this time.  I wanted, however, to give you an explanation why my firm cannot assist you.  When talking with potential clients about their employment issues, we carefully listen for a variety of aspects in determining those cases that we can move forward with.  This includes the seriousness of the case, the overall legal viability (i.e., given the specifics of the law, do we think together we can prevail?), the potential for the outcome to make a meaningful difference for our clients, the overall capacity of the firm, and whether we consider ourselves qualified in each specific case. At this point, enough of those thresholds were not met in order for us to move forward.  It doesn’t mean you haven’t been treated poorly, nor that you don’t have legal standing - just that we aren’t in a perfect position to represent you at this time.

I understand that you’ve spent a significant amount of time talking with us and sharing some difficult and personal issues.  I’d encourage you to continue to advocate for yourself and consider talking with some additional employment attorneys who may be more well suited for your specific issue.

We wish you the best of luck in the future.  If you have any comments about your experience with HKM, feel free to click here and leave us some feedback.

"The Jacobs" have successfully accomplished much for me throughout my life they've been my voice when I'd had none their bulldogs that have kept things from going to court. I've great appreciation & gratitude for this dynamic duo
Jacobs law group did an excellent job with my case. I am truly grateful for them.

If you are looking for a lawyer team that knows the value of family, integrity, honesty, and will treat you like a human being and not just another "client" then I suggest choosing Jacobs Law Group. This Father's son Duo take to heart quite literally the value of family and will always call you back within the hour, you will always know what is going on with your case and there are no hidden fees. I did not have to pay for representation until the end and I was kept in the loop every single step of the way.

In the early 2000s my brother-in-law was represented by Jacob's Law Firm and won him a case by representing him as the client who was riding his bike in Seattle and he was run over! He won the case and my brother in law was fairly compensated.

From that point on we knew he could be a trusted person to represent my family if anything were to ever happen.

In my mid-20s Jacob's Law Group represented me when cell phones first became popular and an epidemic of  "text and drive" became a neusance. A lady slammed into my new and the. car was completely totaled! I was very young and was not sure what I was going to do so I gave Jacob's Law Group a call. I wasn't aware of my rights back then and he walked me through my rights for proper Medical Care ensuring that I would be represented to the fullest of extent and I was. He won the case.

Fast forward ti 2022. I am in my early 40s and a School Teacher Jacobs law group has represented me yet again providing the best care and representation for my family and I when a driver struck me quite suddenly crossing three lanes of traffic. I was left with hearing damage and he was able to make sure I was properly represented and compensated.

I can't say enough about the representation I received over the years and the countless times I was able to be taking care of.

Forever Grateful,
Jessadiah Rose

Mike and Jeff Jacobs are the best attorneys I could have asked for. I feel so blessed I was referred to them after experiencing a hit and run. They were patient, helpful, compassionate and worked really hard to get me the most compensation for my injuries. I got so much more than I expected from the insurance company. I would highly recommend Jacobs Law Group to anyone involved in an accident. Great team!!! Thank you so much Mike and Jeff!

Mike and Jeff Jacobs are genuinely the nicest people ever, while being sharks when it comes down to taking care of business.  I got into a motorcycle accident and they kept fighting and fighting for the right settlement.  I got WAY more then expected, and they gave me great advice on what to do with it.  Life has been booming ever since!  They would also constantly check up on me, my health, and my well being.  I would 100% trust them if I ever need anymore legal assistance/ advice for the future.  I now, not only consider them my lawyers, but also my friends.

The folks at Jacobs Law Group are not only professional and thorough, they care about your well being. Going through the physical injury and recovery process was horrid enough on its own, so I'm thankful that I was referred to this Group, who guided and counseled me through my legal options.
Truly caring attorneys who worked hard to achieve a great result in my injury case -- thanks so much again, Mike and Jeff.

You know this company came in like they were going to be the knights in shining armor to help me get some of my claims settled with social security administration. The long and short is they won't return your phone calls till they're ready. You can't share updates with them cuz they give you no way to do that and when you do call or leave a message they don't call you back. I'm within a reasonable amount of time. Therefore leaving you in pain leaving you wondering and leaving you. You know worried about what's going to happen next. You know a lack of communication is like one of the biggest peeves in the world. People want to work within their time frames instead of having some type of sense that well. You know what? Let's give this guy a call to see what's important they claim to have teams working on your case. They claim to be able to produce. They claim a lot of stuff they can't deliver and that's probably why they've got three stars. They're definitely not getting. The only reason they even got to start from me is because well Google won't allow me to not put a star out. Anybody else doing social security claims out there? Just do them yourself man cuz you know at least you know where you stand and just being ghosted is not cool. Have a good day

I wouldn't recommend this place to anyone. I had to do a lot of communication & work for them, a lot! They lack on communication & their duties, literally! It's unfortunate that a client has to do all that for them. The whole point of hiring an SSI Attorney's is to have do all the communication with the Social Security Administration people for you & fill any paperwork that's being sent in the mail, but that's not the case & the impression they gave me. And not one Attorneys at this law firm even bother to contact me or introduce themselves to their clients. Rude! The whole time I've been communicating with, is the "Legal Assistance." Really? A third party legal representatives to represent me? Wow! This law firm have wasted my time for almost 2 months for nothing & Paul Warren decided to contact me & said, we cannot represent you anymore, sir! I had to stay on top of them & continue challenged them of why I have to do a lot of work for a firm when clearly I hired an attorney for. They seem to not like to challenged them from their own client's. I was only doing my job, too! One again ladies & gentlemen, I wouldn't recommend this firm to anyone, Period! Good luck!
Great service and great staff that work for you

I have never had a law firm treat me as well as Kerr Robichaux & Carroll. If I had concerns or questions,  they were always there for me. I could text, email or call and have someone to talk to each time. If you are disabled and uncertain who to call for help, I definitely would recommend calling and asking for Rebecca Miller. She was my lawyer and very nice to work with. They will do everything humanly possible for you.

Best attorneys I could ever hope for..they stayed in contact with me always were always very kind especially Ruby Aliment. Amazing lady and attorney I would tell anyone to use this firm they are GREAT!!!!

This law firm is seeking justice for me for what happened to me as a juvenile being award of the state of Washington I was never safe while in the hands of the state,. It was Washington state that allowed horrible horrific things to happen to me . I'm very grateful to know that this law firm will seek justice on my behalf.. For the first time ever I feel safe knowing that I am in good hands ...

Lied to me, texted me instead of calling with no identifier. phishing via text is no way to create a clientele list.

Feeling scammed
reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Craig, we are sorry that we are unable to assist you with your potential legal claim. Our scheduling system sends out an automated text to remind our clients of the upcoming meeting.  However,  our firm does not, and has never, solicited new clients via anonymous text messages.

This fim has been sensitive to my concerns. They also keep me updated without my having to nudge them. It is early in my case, but I have no doubt they will get the reparations I deserve.
Polite, same day responses, kind and knowledgeable.

After about 50 years I came down with stage four metastatic mesothelioma, which is typically a fatal life sentence. I checked with my physicians and they suggested that I contact your law firm, Bergman Oslund Udo Little, PLLC.  I did and I have had an absolutely positive outcome from their efforts to help me in my final stages of cancer.  Everyone has been so friendly and nice. I could not have asked for a better group of lawyers anywhere!.  The results that they obtained for me in my lawsuits have been able to let me know that my family is being taken care of after I’m gone. I can’t ask for a better feeling than that. I recommend them wholeheartedly.
Richard W.

Calling this firm to handle our case was the best decision we could have made. Right from the start, they have been compassionate and kind but also professional and very effective! I honestly can't recommend them enough.

After serving in the Navy during the Vietnam War our father worked shipyards until he retired. He had an active life he loved hiking, fishing, gardening and motorcycles. Tragically our beloved Father died of mesothelioma after working with asbestos for many years. Fortunately we found Bergman Oslund Udo Little. They were so compassionate and helpful in our time of grieving. Thankfully they took our case. Erica Bergman and Venessa Oslund worked so hard and fought so very hard for us in our time of need. We appreciate them so much. Five stars is not enough. They went above and beyond for me and my family. It would be impossible to thank them enough.

The Bergman Law Firm ("Bergman") helped make a devastating situation manageable.  Our husband and father's diagnosis of mesothelioma was potentially caused by exposures to asbestos from his father's work clothes when he was a young child; service in the Vietnam war on a World War II era destroyer; employment in a steel mill and in construction, as well as in personal home construction and car service.  Only Bergman who already had detailed records on asbestos products, the industrial firms and military vessels using those products, their suppliers and producers could have located those responsible for his exposures and identified potential defendants.

And their experience with other victims made them effective as litigators in this area.  Their efficiency in interviewing us, keeping us informed and preparing us for trial made dealing with the stresses of litigation doable for a family already overburdened.

After dealing for some months with work interruptions, medical bills and later leave on disability, the family was close to destitute.  Bergman's completion of a non-litigation claim while trial was pending precluded immediate financial strains, and the abundant settlements and their prosecution of claims have made the years since and to come secure financially despite the loss of the major breadwinner whose employment came with the most favorable insurance and other fringe benefits.   we highly recommend working with Bergman for asbestos and other injury claims.

My brother was diagnosed with mesothelioma in May 2014, and passed away in August 2014.  The Bergman attorneys, Chandler Udo specifically, are our angels.  Chandler, and the others, have a true passion for this cause--with them, it's waaaay more than just a job.   Chandler was with us every step of the way, and he worked his tail off for our family.  Without him, we would have nothing.  My brother has two special needs adult sons whom he took care of, and without Chandler, they'd be living on the streets now.  We were able to pay off the house, and there is a stream of income that takes care of their daily needs.  My nephews and their stepmom continue to receive additional settlements to this day.  These guys are the most compassionate, hard working, dedicated people---you want them on your side.  They are local, and respond to every question and concern with lightning speed.  They know asbestos cases inside out.  Calling them was one of the best decisions I have ever made.  They will ALWAYS have a very special place in my heart.

Chandler Udo represented  us through the complicated process of seeking justice for my husband's exposure to asbestos in the line of duty and resultant mesothelioma.  Every member of Bergman Legal with whom we interacted was responsive to our situation, and tenacious in representing us. The kindness, patience and professionalism  of Chandler Udo and his team is most sincerely appreciated and will never be forgotten.

The attorneys at Bergman Draper Oslund represented my parents exceptionally well. The attorneys are compassionate towards their clients. They are also tenacious in their pursuit of justice for their clients and achieve great results. My family is incredibly happy and thankful for Bergman Draper Oslund's assistance.
These guys really care. The help you through every detail. Probably the best mesothelioma attorney in the country.

His thoughtful approach to our situation and transparent, competitive pricing made hiring him an easy decision. Since completing our incorporation, Mark has advised us on a range of issues including fundraising and employee equity, and has tackled several legal challenges for us, from drafting a detailed service agreement to managing trademark filings. Mark is thorough and responsive to each new problem with throw his way, and having him on our team is a big source of confidence as we navigate the challenges of growing our business. I highly recommend Tyson Law to anyone planning to start a business.

I want to express my sincere gratitude for everything you did to help me obtain my green card. This has been one of the most important milestones in my life, and I truly appreciate the time, dedication, and expertise you put into my case.

Your guidance throughout the entire process gave me confidence and peace of mind. Immigration procedures can be stressful and complicated, but your professionalism, patience, and clear communication made the journey much easier for me.

Because of your hard work, I now have the opportunity to continue building my future here, and that means more to me than words can fully express. I am deeply thankful for your support and commitment.

Thank you again for all that you have done. I will always be grateful for your help in making this possible.

It’s been a pleasure working with Kalab. He’s very professional and always a phone call away. He helped me obtain my green card through marriage. He keeps himself up-to-date with every policy change and helps others by giving good timely advice. I would highly recommend him as your lawyer, if you are trying to obtain a green card or any other services that he may provide.

Kaleab is an amazing person and an exceptional attorney. He was there for me throughout my entire green card process and was always attentive, patient, and highly responsive. I remember reaching out to him even after hours when I was overwhelmed with the paperwork and dealing with anxiety, and he never hesitated to help. He handled every detail calmly and made sure I felt supported and confident at every step. I am truly grateful for his dedication and would highly recommend him to anyone navigating the immigration process.

I’m genuinely grateful for my lawyer and everything he’s done for me over the past two years. He helped me with multiple work permit renewals and the whole green card process, and he was there for me the entire time not just “filing papers,” but actually supporting me through it.
He’s extremely attentive and responsive. Any time I had a question, felt stressed, or didn’t understand something, he took the time to explain it clearly and made sure I felt comfortable moving forward. He always followed up, kept me updated, and I never felt like I was just another case.

You can tell he really knows immigration law, but what stood out to me most is that he truly cares about his clients. That’s rare.
Because of how supportive and professional he’s been, I always recommend him to my friends and loved ones without hesitation. If you want someone who is knowledgeable, dependable, and honestly has your back through the process, I highly recommend him. Thank you much Kaleab!

Kaleab office helped me through the process of obtaining a K-1 visa for my fiancée to join me in the U.S., and the experience was exceptional. He was patient in answering all my questions, ensured that the paperwork was completed accurately and on time, and was always readily available whenever I needed assistance.

I cannot express enough gratitude for the exceptional service provided by Kaleab Law, PLLC in helping me secure my 10-year green card. After enduring a tumultuous journey, Dr. Kaleab Ahmed emerged as a beacon of knowledge, professionalism, and unwavering support. My journey began with the issuance of a 2-year conditional green card through marriage in 2018, which, due to the unforeseen challenges brought about by the COVID-19 pandemic, led to delays in the interview process until March of 2024. Amidst the strains in my marital relationship, I sought legal assistance and was fortunately referred to Dr. Ahmed by trusted acquaintances who lauded his expertise in both divorce and immigration matters. From the outset, Dr. Ahmed exemplified unparalleled proficiency, demonstrating an astute understanding of my predicament and guiding me with utmost care and attention. Not only did he provide invaluable counsel regarding the divorce proceedings, but he also undertook the challenging task of filing all necessary paperwork, alleviating a significant burden from my shoulders. Even while on vacation in another country during a crucial phase of my case, Dr. Ahmed demonstrated an unmatched dedication. He collaborated with USCIS to reschedule my interview, ensuring his presence alongside me during the rescheduled appointment in March 2024. This act of dedication epitomizes his unwavering devotion to his clients' interests, transcending geographical boundaries and personal inconveniences. On the day of the interview, Dr. Ahmed went above and beyond, arriving ahead of schedule and meticulously preparing for every eventuality. His foresight was evident as he provided me with comprehensive guidance on the proceedings, ensuring that I felt confident and well-prepared. With an impeccable attention to detail and a profound understanding of the immigration process, Dr. Ahmed seamlessly navigated every step, culminating in a successful outcome that exceeded my expectations. Throughout this journey, Dr. Ahmed consistently demonstrated not only his expertise but also his genuine empathy and compassion. He recognized the significance of each case to his clients and spared no effort in ensuring a positive outcome. In conclusion, I wholeheartedly endorse Dr. Ahmed for anyone seeking legal representation in immigration, divorce matters or personal injury. His unparalleled expertise, unwavering dedication, and compassionate approach make him a true asset in navigating complex legal landscapes. My heartfelt thanks to Dr. Ahmed for guiding me through this challenging chapter and securing a brighter future.

I cannot thank all the team at Lipcon, Margulies & Winkleman law firm enough for all the work they did both directly with me and behind the scenes to secure the settlement. I would strongly recommend to anyone, passenger or crew, who have suffered some form of injury or been the victim of any allegation whilst travelling on a cruise ship to seriously consider engaging the services of Lipcon, Margulies & Winkleman law firm. They will save you time and greatly reduce, or even remove, any stressful matters you may have around the situation.

reviews.text: This review is long overdue. Mainstreet has been our professional liability insurance broker for 10 years since we started our firm, and each year our renewal has been seamless. They send me email reminders every year about the upcoming renewal. The application process is quick and easy by completing emailed forms. They promptly submit our application and shop for quotes. Payment is also easy through an emailed payment link. They saved my 2 attorney firm $2000 on this years’ renewal. Raji May has been with Mainstreet the entire time and it has been a privilege to receive his stellar service year after year. The fees are more than reasonable and they save me valuable time and money.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks so much for the wonderful review and your continued business!  We've shared your kind words with Raji and the team.

reviews.text: Just now completed my renewal with Mainstreet and I have to say the process was easy and painless. The paperwork seems much more streamlined this time around, everything was on one form that was a breeze to fill out, and didn't take long to complete. After I submitted the completed form I received a coverage quote back almost immediately, and was able to pull the trigger by responding with an email. 5 stars!!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: We are so glad to hear your positive feedback on the renewal process!  We are always striving to make it as painless as possible.  Thank you for your continued business and 5 star review!

If you’re looking for a law firm that will genuinely advocate for you while treating you with dignity, care, and humanity, this is a team you can trust.

If someone I care about was in an accident and needed representation this is exactly who I would tell them to call.

I had an excellent experience with Cafee Law Firm after my auto accident. From the first consultation, the team was compassionate, clear, and incredibly responsive. They walked me through every step of the legal process, handled all the insurance company negotiations, and made sure I received the medical care and compensation I deserved.

What stood out most was how genuinely they cared not just about the case, but about my recovery and peace of mind. I never felt like just another case file. Communication was always timely, and they explained everything in terms I could understand.

Thanks to their hard work and dedication, my case was settled fairly and efficiently. I highly recommend Cafee Law Firm to anyone needing a skilled and supportive personal injury attorney. They truly made a difficult time much easier.

Special thanks to lizett

This was my very first time needing a lawyer after being involved in an accident, and I’m so grateful I found Caffee Accident & Injury Lawyers. From start to finish, they made the entire process feel smooth and manageable. I was nervous and didn’t know what to expect, but their team walked me through every step with kindness, professionalism, and clear communication.

What really stood out was how easy they made things for someone like me, who had never been through anything like this before. They answered all my questions, explained things in plain language, and always kept me updated.

I just moved to the Seattle area and I was on my way to my very first day of my new job when I was hit by another car on the freeway. Insurance basically said they’ll pay out my car because I was 0% at fault but that was it. I was left without a car as a single mom, neck and back injury, no down payment for a new car, And not able to get a new car without a down payment due to my credit having lowered since I bought that car initially. It felt like a really terrible welcoming. I was in a worse position in life and there was nothing I could do about it - and it wasn’t even my fault! My chiropractor told me to reach out to CAFFEE So I did. They worked all year and were super easy to work with. Soon I will receive partial payment from the Settlement so that I can finally get a new car. I’ve never used a lawyer in a car accident and I’m so glad that I did. Bibiana, Angela and Lizett have been super kind and easy to work with.

Caffee law is the best! Very good communication. As an insurance agent if any of my clients are hit by an at fault party I send them to Jeff. He takes care of them. Coordinated their care, represents them through the settlement. Him and his team are very approachable. I get so much positive feedback from the clients I send his way about how comfortable they are working with them.

I was in a pretty bad accident and was getting the runaround. Lizett, Angela, and Bibiana help me navigate through one of the most stressful times of my life. I’ve never had to deal with something like this before. It was extremely confusing, dealing with the insurance companies and the other party involved. I don’t know what would have Happened if it wasn’t for them. I would recommend them to anyone. They were kind they listened to all of my questions and got me as many answers as quick as possible. I’m not sure there’s a better team out there.

100% recommend anyone looking for an amazing attorney. Leticia was on my motor vehicle case, she was extremely knowledgeable, professional, and helpful explaining the whole process to me. She provided me with a chiropractor immediately and as I recovered, she stayed on top of my case and I was able to get a full payout from the insurance company within 6 months. Thank you again for all the help!

I wish I found these guys earlier. These guys are fantastic! Lizzet was so insanely helpful and so was her team. You always hope a lawyer will be proficient at there job. But they legit care about the people they represent. They will go that extra mile... they will go that extra round to get you what you deserve. They are professional, TIMELY, experienced, competent and just amazing at what they do.

I was referred to this firm and I highly recommend Casey & Tracy. They both provided a professional & excellent service. Thank You very much and Job Well Done!  Best of Luck! & continue your amazing work.

Thank you to Lizett, Lyndsy, Angela, Bibiana for taking such good care of me and my mom with our auto accident. This attorneys office and Lizett have been very effective and professional.  Lizett has been patient with me in my times of stress.  I would use this office again and refer to other people.  Thank you to Lizett.

I retained Jesse Wing in 2022 to represent me in a federal retaliation and constitutional rights case in the U.S. District Court for the District of Idaho (Case No. 2:22-cv-00270-AKB). After nearly four years of hard-fought litigation — including extensive motion practice, substantial written discovery, and at least fifteen depositions — the case resolved in February 2026 with a $1.5 million settlement and dismissal with prejudice.

Throughout the case (2022–2026), Jesse demonstrated exceptional intelligence, strategic judgment, and work ethic. His deposition work was particularly outstanding — precise, disciplined, and deeply prepared. He was fearless when necessary but always measured.

What stood out most was his integrity. Billing was transparent and fair. He did not overbill, and every dollar reflected high-quality, substantive legal work. There was no inefficiency — just thoughtful, serious litigation practice.

His entire team at MacDonald Hoague & Bayless was equally professional, ethical, and efficient.

Jesse Wing is one of the best attorneys I have ever known. I would retain him again without hesitation in any complex federal litigation.

— D. Scott Bauer

MHB provided exceptional service. Lola and Hailey are true experts, and their expertise is evident in everything they do. Everything went exactly as planned, and the communication was perfect. I highly suggest this firm to anyone looking for reliable and expert legal help!

If you are looking for a law firm that truly knows how to do its job, I would highly recommend MHB. Despite the long period of time caused by my situation, they continued to work patiently and ultimately achieved the outcome I was hoping for. I would also like to take this opportunity to express my sincere thanks to their team, especially Lola and Hailey.

Kirsten and Sandy helped me on my case - they are very professional, kind, and quick to any inquiries. Just right after gathering the docs on my end, they were able to file the application in a short amount of time. The whole process only takes less than half of the expected time.
The firm also uses a great tool/site keep all the docs organized/accessible for their clients. Highly recommend. Thanks again Kirsten and Sandy!

When I called, an extremely rude lady picked up and immediately started talking down to me while “explaining how it all works.” All I said was that I was interested in a consultation. She went on about how clients get some kind of session with their lawyers. When I asked for a specific lawyer in the firm, she snapped back with attitude, saying, “Well, you know what? We CAN’T help you!” — really emphasizing the word can’t. She didn’t even bother to ask which lawyer I wanted to speak with or why. I’m honestly shocked by such terrible customer service. 😱😱😱

I’m so thankful to Kirsten, Sandy, and the team at MHB for their outstanding support throughout my immigration process. They made the entire process smooth and stress-free.
The team is knowledgeable, thorough, and was always available to answer my questions with patience and clarity. They guided me through each step with professionalism and care.
I highly recommend MHB, especially Kirsten and Sandy, to anyone going through the immigration process!

I recently retained attorney Anna Deal at MHB and she is an exceptional immigration attorney! From our very first consultation, she combined deep knowledge with warmth and reassurance, which made me feel supported during one of the most stressful times of my life. She has strong expertise in removal defense for nonimmigrant visa holders and knows how to navigate complex situations with strategy and care.
Her ability to craft the right legal approach and follow through diligently really stood out. I felt like she genuinely cared about my case and my future, which made all the difference.
I am deeply grateful to Anna for her work and can't recommend her enough!

Working with Hailey Tran and Lola Zakharova at MacDonald Hoague & Bayless was an incredibly positive experience. They combined professionalism with genuine care, making sure I felt supported at every step. They explained everything clearly, responded quickly to my questions, and handled the details with impressive precision. I’m very grateful for their support and would highly recommend their services!

I had an outstanding experience working with Lola and Hailey. From the very beginning, they guided me step by step, ensuring that every document was accurate and every question I had was answered promptly. Lola’s expertise and attention to detail gave me confidence throughout the process, and her professionalism turned a complicated case into a clear and organized path forward. She and her team were always proactive, responsive, and supportive, helping the entire process feel seamless. Thanks to their incredible work, my case was successfully resolved without complications. I am deeply grateful and highly recommend Lola and her team for any immigration needs!

Trust MHB to guide you with humanity in presence of innumerable obstacles. These folks have ton of patience and kind heart as many people with different mindset interact with them with varying level of empathy.
I would suggest have patience as MHB team has the right mix of experience and guidance at their disposal. I want to call out Sandy who followed up to file for gc process over 4+ years and I personally ignored till late last year. Yeah, hated the paperwork required and life got busy with work. She ensured we had confidence to get through the paperwork - which was lot.

She did not give up. She still was same kind person who guided through multiple rounds of document exchange.

She and Kirsten also managed to stay on top despite their personal challenges and churn - and even managed calls when possible.

Once they realized they can also do concurrent filing - they leveraged the same to help expedite with delicate dance for our international travel.
They followed up with guidance as things were churning all across, we are still waiting for physical thing, but hoping just the last mile issue at this time.
Thanks again MHB team.

1n January 1978 Mr Hoague bailed me out of King County jail where I was detained on immigration charges - overstay. Mr McDonald took me in his house on Mercer Island. Bob Free and intern Penny applied for my legal stay.  I returned to my home country Malawi in 1996. Compassionate and excellent team of lawyers.

It was such a pleasure to work with such a competent, empathetic and diligent team.

Our experience with MHB was smooth, timely and without any hiccups. Both Sandy and Kirsten were a pleasure to work with. They guided us every step of the way and made sure the documentation was in order before filing. Not only that, but they were also very proactive in answering any questions that we had over email and sometimes over phone too.

Overall, I give them 5/5 and highly recommend their services.

These folks are just great! I urgently needed to understand my rights. A lawyer friend recommended Macdonald Hoague & Bayless, and I will always call them first. Jesse Wing, Adarsh N. Parthasarathy, and their team were warm, empathetic, generous, friendly, efficient, and extremely competent. I honestly couldn't have asked for better legal advice and support! Working with them solved my issues and empowered me with strategies to advocate for myself! I couldn't imagine going anywhere else for legal representation.

MHB helped me obtain my green card. Sandy Chan was super professional, patient and responsive with all my questions and helped me navigate through a unique personal circumstances. I would definitely recommend MHB to anyone looking for immigration services. Thank you so much MHB team!
Awesome team and exceptional service! Lola and Sandy made the whole process so much smoother and manageable for me! Got approved in just 2 months. Thank you!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words, Ainur and congratulations on permanent residency!

reviews.text: It was a pleasure working for Sandy Chan! She has been very helpful through the entire visa filing process. She is responsive, friendly, and very professional. I recommend working with her!
I highly recommend Lola Zakharova and Hailey Tran. They helped me so much! I’m so grateful for all the work done! And I always recommend them to all my friends. Really the best!

I am thrilled to share my exceptional experience with MHB for handling my marriage-based green card application. From start to finish, their professionalism, expertise, and dedication were evident. Moreover, their deep understanding of immigration law and the nuances of marriage-based applications was evident throughout. They anticipated potential challenges and proactively addressed them, which gave us immense confidence and peace of mind.

I am overjoyed to report that our application was approved without any issues, and I am certain this success is largely due to the outstanding work of MHB. I wholeheartedly recommend them to anyone seeking top-notch legal assistance for immigration matters. Their dedication, expertise, and personalized service are unparalleled. Thank you, MHB, for making our dream a reality!

We wouldn't have been able to accomplish what we needed to do without Lola and her team. Everyone was professional, knowledgeable, and very approachable throughout the whole process. All of our questions were answered in a timely manner and they were always readily available in times of urgency. A kind, genuine team of lawyers that are actually looking out for you. 10/10!

horrible experience, spent 3 weeks for scheduling and the assistant never sent email but claimed that they did and told me need to wait for another 2 weeks for an appointment. the front desk absolutely have no clue of anything.
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Xin, we are very sorry about the experience you had with our firm. If your needs have not been addressed yet, please feel free to email directly to our Managing Partner, Lola Zakharova at lolaz@mhb.com, and we will make sure to promptly schedule an appointment. Very sorry for the negative experience, once again.

reviews.text: I had the privilege of working with Lola and Sandy from MHB during my green card application process. From the initial consultation to the completion of our application, they demonstrated extensive knowledge, professionalism, and dedication. Their guidance was invaluable, and they made the process stress-free for my husband and me. Sandy's clear direction, down-to-earth approach, and meticulous attention to detail ensured that our paperwork was in order. She promptly addressed our concerns and provided reassurance throughout the journey. I highly recommend Lola and Sandy for family-based immigration

We had a fantastic experience with Zsa Zsa (immigration attorney). She is highly knowledgeable in the field of immigration and has extensive experience as a judge. She guided us through the process and helped us prepare a crucial memo for our situation. If you're applying for your green card and need guidance to avoid any pitfalls, I recommend consulting her. Additionally, she promptly resolved my ad hoc questions without charging extra.

I feel incredibly fortunate to have had Zsa Zsa and Rachel assist me with my Adjustment of Status case. Both Rachel and Zsa Zsa are highly knowledgeable and genuinely trustworthy. They always responded to my questions promptly and efficiently. Their support made the process seamless, as all I had to do was gather the necessary documents. I am deeply grateful for their assistance and support. I highly recommend Zsa Zsa and Rachel to anyone in need of immigration help.

I would highly recommend MHB for PR/GC process. Their services helped me through the entire process answering all my queries. It was easy to communicate and navigate through bunch of documents required.

The process was smooth as the instructions provided were clear and to the point. With every step I was provided with a timely updates and next steps.

Thanks to Sandy, Lola and team for doing all the paperwork and I was able to receive my PR in less than 4 months.

i had the best experience with my case not only did it workout fast but all my questions and concerns were answered in a timely manner. I could not be more thankful and would recommend over and over again.

I had an exceptional experience with Hailey, Laura and Lola during my H1B visa transfer and PERM application process. They were incredibly helpful, offering clear guidance and timely support through every step. Their expertise and dedication made a complex procedure feel manageable and less daunting. I am profoundly grateful for their assistance and highly recommend their services to anyone navigating similar immigration issues. Thank you, Hailey and Lola, for all your hard work and support!

Sandy and the team at MHB have helped my through my L1 and Green Card process over the past 3 years and have always been helpful and knowladgeable to get our family through the process. I couldn't recommend them enough!

The team helped me during the relocation process from Japan to the US. They are super responsive and knowledgeable. They made me feel very comfortable with their advice, otherwise, it could have been a very stressful experience. I really appreciate their professionalism. Highly recommend.

I am extremely grateful for the exceptional support and guidance provided by Lola and her assistant Hailey throughout my immigration journey. Their expertise and dedication made the process incredibly smooth and stress-free. The attention to detail in preparing the waiver documents was impeccable, and their professionalism ensured that every step was handled with care and precision. Thanks to Lola, I received my green card without any complications. I highly recommend their services to anyone in need of immigration assistance. Lola helped me upload my waiver 2 months ago, and I got my green card yesterday. Lola and her team are the best!! Thank you so much!!

Lola, Hailey and Laura have been great to work with from the start. They're immensely knowledgeable about the immigration process, prompt and keep you informed at every step of the way. Thank you for all your hard work!

I rarely write reviews but Lola and her team provided exceptional service! She is professional and knowledgeable to the immigration process. Their guidelines are very clear and responsive in email. I would highly recommend Lola to anyone who needs immigration service. I really appreciate your hard work and dedication!

Our organization worked with MHB on getting a Visa for one of our employees and they were supremely knowledgeable about all of the myriad processes involved. We are so grateful we chose to work with them. They are the real deal!

I really appreciate the help I got from the MacDonald Hoague & Bayless team, especially my attorney Lola Zakharova, Hailey Tran, and Laura Hentges.
From day 1 of my H1B visa journey, they consistently looked into my case and did their best in each and every step.
They are very professional, have high problem-solving skills, good communication at each step, and are more transparent.
I highly recommend MacDonald Hoague & Bayless for any immigration related work.

Worked with Cam Taylor and Andrew Chan for my immigration needs, and they were wonderful to work with. They were available when needed and promptly completed the work, which lead to a smooth immigration process for me. Would absolutely work with them again.
An outstanding, caring, efficient, detail-oriented, attentive, and compassionate group of immigration lawyers. Thanks Kirsten and team!

Working with Lola and her team was an exceptional experience. They provide not just legal expertise but also significant support to my family throughout our immigration journey. Her ability to handle complex matters quickly and comprehensively is remarkable. She has always been available for questions, offering clear and helpful guidance. I wholeheartedly recommend Lola to anyone in need of reliable and effective immigration legal assistance. She truly goes above and beyond.

I have to absolute pleasure of hiring Jesse Wing (an attorney at this law firm) for assistance with some unique legal support/protection. Jesse is truly outstanding. He is cool, calm, and collected. Jesse is a subject-matter expert, is a great listener, is able to identify unique legal arguments, and is able to achieve case objectives with all involved in a very professional yet firm manner. If you are looking for an attorney that you can trust, that is dedicated, respected, respectful, and is able to win cases, I cannot recommend Jesse Wing enough. You will not be disappointed.
5 stars, reputable, strong, skilled, firm. Lauren Freidenberg is top notch and highly recommended.

I must say this law firm is a cut above the rest. They are very very hard working and I can call them anytime I have a question.  They respond quickly.  Many thanks to Joseph Schaffer, Rebecca singleton Nathaniel Flack,Rebecca Talbott and Anika andes.

Lola was a savior angel for me, when I entered America I didn't know English and Lola and her team patiently listened to my words and guided us in this difficult way. I finally got my green card. I definitely recommend Lola and his team

The two consultations with Lola Zakharova were essential in getting my fiance and her son set up to come to the US. We now have airline tickets for November 14th of 2023. I will add a photo here when we are finally all together.
I had been floundering trying to access the USCIS website for over a year. I got some help from my congressional representative. But that was not enough. I found Lola on a Google search and noted that she also speaks Russian. That ability was essential in assisting us with the last steps in the process. She conducted a Zoom call with both of us, speaking Russian with my fiance in Ukraine.
Olga is very professional but also very friendly and sincere. She could have easily forgotten about us, but she did not. Also her fees are ver reasonable. She has many years of experience working on immigration from that area of the world. I look forward to working with her more in the future.
Wonderful service! Can't be more satisfied
I have used this firm and they have been so wonderful to work with! I have used them multiple times and each time they managed my cases expertly and successfully. I would recommend them to anyone!

This firm handled our case with care, urgency, and professionalism. We are very satisfied with, and appreciative of, the work they have done for us. We will always choose them for every step of our immigration journey.
Esther and Sandy were wonderful with applying for my marriage based green card. I got my case approved in record time and we were able to file really quickly, would highly recommend their services :)

I had the pleasure of working with MHB Law Firm for my O1 visa petition, and I cannot recommend them enough. Hailey and Lola, the lawyers assigned to my case, displayed exceptional professionalism and expertise throughout the entire process by meticulously compiling an abundance of evidence showcasing my extraordinary abilities.
Not only were lawyers at MHB highly skilled, but they also provided excellent communication and support. They were prompt in addressing my concerns and providing timely updates, ensuring that I felt informed and reassured throughout the process.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words, Mr. Tan! It was a pleasure assisting you!

reviews.text: Hi, I just want you to know that this is a bad lawyer who doesn't do his job. I hired him to help me with a case, but he did nothing. Now I have an arrest warrant because he didn't notify me of the courts where he was supposed to represent me. This man is the worst.

This guy talks about justice and dignity… and that's what he lacked to have been able to get a lawyer. He owes me $3500 and the best thing he did was block me. I wouldn't recommend his calls or messages one bit; a very bad experience.
I called to get advice and find out if I was calling the right place, and I was answered by a very rude young lady.

This man knows what he's doing, don't think twice and trust attorney Pablo! I'm very happy with his service; he guided us down the right path and told us exactly what to do to be prepared for court. He was always one step ahead, and thanks to him, there was no jail time.

This team is responsive, concise and professional.
Working through an unemployment issue when you're already down from lack of work, confusion, stress and money is running out on your own is daunting. Having the support of an attorney who checks in on your court hearing, your documents, and just is there for you through the appeal or hearing process can make the world of a difference. An invaluable resource for Washington residents.
They are very kind, they helped me to find information

They DO call back. It might take a few days but they're the only free resource regarding UI in the Seattle area don't you think they're probably swamped with calls? Do you know any other lawyers/advocates that would even possibly take your case on a free/donation (albeit a very small one) basis? Give them a break, if they DIDN'T call back maybe you're the reason? Would you call back someone who blew you up everyday? Or left multiple rambling messages? Would you want to call that person back? These are people trying to do the most amount of good with limited resources. They're a charity, not a state / tax funded program, They don't OWE you anything. Be clear, be respectful, and be short with questions and long with listening to the answer. You should be ashamed of you left them a 1, 2 or 3 star review. Didn't your mother teach you beggars can't be choosers? If you don't like the way a charity Acts don't put yourself in a position to need a charity...

No one ever answers the phone. No one called back after my intake when I left messages. I was told to call and despite knowing I only had a week left they ghosted me. Highly unprofessional and I wonder if this is allowed by the Bar.

had a great experience working with Andy. He makes sure to walk you through everything and that you understand the process and the legal arguments he plans to use.  After months of having this stress, my case was overruled (in my favor) the same day.  thank you Andy!!!

only issue is the communication process of getting through to the service.  you have to call and leave a message for a call back every time.  so if you miss their call, you have to call back and leave a message again.  I nearly missed my intake call because that call is from a blocked number (rather than their normal line), but my phone automatically directs blocked calls to voicemail. that's really my challenge with using ULP.
Andrew P was our attorney and was great.  So helpful, helped us prepare and be ready for our court date with the judge.  Would highly recommend this group of people!!!
These people care about their clients.

My unemployment law attorney, Meg Bridewell, was truly exceptional in every way. Her deep understanding of unemployment law, meticulous attention to detail, and courtroom skills secured a positive outcome for me. Her support and communication offered me reassurance throughout the process, and thanks to her efforts, I won my case. I highly recommend her for her unmatched professionalism and commitment to her clients. Thank you, Meg!
My representative was overworked and therefore ineffective. I felt as though I was just a number and that I was under-serviced. Think twice before accepting free legal services.

I left several messages with several different people, never heard back.
I decided to call until I was able to talk to somebody, when asked, she had no answer for lack of correspondence. With my hearing the next day, she asked if I would like to consult with someone, but that I wouldn’t be able to have representation and they would need me to postpone for 3 to 4 weeks until that would be a possibility. So, I told her I would appreciate a consultation before my hearing. I received a phone call from A woman who sounded like she had nothing but contempt for having to speak with me. Needless to say, she and I did not get anywhere, she was so rude that I was never able to have discourse. And how about the unprofessional voicemail guy. this place is a joke, Don’t waste your time!
Never respond back to customers on time.

I highly recommend the ULP to anyone having issues with unemployment benefits. Andy and the rest of the staff I have been in contact with have been exceptionally helpful and understanding.
Thanks to you all for helping me get the results we were hoping for.

Thank you so much to Andy he was professional, knowledgeable, organized, and truly cared about my situation. He was able to help me and assist in a favorable outcome. I highly recommend the Unemployment Law Project to anyone looking for assistance with unemployment.

First of all, one of the reviews said that ULP "charges you".  This is not my experience.  A donation of one week's benefits is requested for their service and they made the request clear to me right off the bat, without making me feel obligated.

Given everything, I had a positive experience with ULP.  My case was very complicated and it was easy for even me to get lost in the mess of it.  The director John Tirpak represented me.  He was optimistic and helped me to keep things simple.  The whole process took two hearings, and I was supported the entire time.  Even though there were several months of waiting in between, I felt good knowing that ULP was there to do what they could when it was time to fight my case a second time.

Three years of pandemic unemployment mess and stress and I have finally found some relief.
Always reliable

A huge thank you to Unemployment Law Project. Genuine professionals. An even bigger thank you to the incredible Hyun-Ji Lee. The handling of my case was made painless because of her hardwork, courtesy and knowledge! Hyun-Ji Lee. Amazingly helpful, Bilingual, and Friendly. Thank you for making a really difficult situation/time in my life much easier to deal with and understand.
They actually contacted me back. Have confidence they will represent me whenever they schedule me a court hearing (going into a year after I filed for appeals!).
Thank you very much Unemployment Law Project for helping me out. You are the life saver.

I received exceptional help from the unemployment law project!! I called as soon as my claim was denied, and once it became close to the hearing date, they called me and set me up with an attorney that helped me win my case. The attorney that was assigned to me helped me organize and prepare for the trial by preparing a script of possible questions. I wouldn't have won the case if it weren't for the unemployment law project, and I am truly grateful for their assistance. The only thing I would recommend is to make sure and call them early and to continue to keep in touch, as this is a free service, and they are very busy.

Thank you so much Unemployment Law Project!!!
So helpful! Saved me thousands and were really expedient with the process once I had my hearing date.
Never returned any of my 5 calls. Not even to tell me they are too busy or anything. I assume they are a bad business.

Got a call back within 2 working days from the time they received my message. They heard me out concerning my questions about my issues with the Employment Security Department. They gave concise instructions and made sure I knew what to ask for when I called the Office of Administrative Hearings back.
I feel they will be able to help me with my cases, under two separate docket numbers. They are helping people, which is a lot more than I can say for the Employment Security Department. The employees there have said,
We are not allowed to tell you what you need to ask. I can't help you.
These cases should be figured out soon and I will be receiving a phone call back from Andy once the information is sent to the Unemployment Law Project and he reviews it.

Meg Bridewell was amazing. And to think she represented us for free?? Unbelievable. We could not have asked for a better attorney. Always supportive, constantly informing. We would have given up long ago, but she saved us $1600. And this was well over the course of a year, perhaps two. I cannot say enough good things about her. She deserves any and all accolades that come her way. Thank you, Meg!
Never responded to my email

When I finally got a hold of someone, I received very good information and procedural advice.
When it came to my hearing, I felt under represented. My attorney listened a lot and talked very little on my behalf. He was most unpleasant after I told him what I thought of his representation.
Then it occurred to me you get what you pay for and his services were pro Bono.  Another life lesson...

This place is worth a try if you're having to fight for unemployment benefits that are due to you for legitimate reasons.  One thing to note is that they are extremely backlogged, so will not attend to your case until very close to the hearing date, and the time it takes for WA State UE to send information to OAH takes longer than normal due to the pandemic.  It took a lot of persistence to get through and finally reach someone at the organization, and schedule my intake.  I had an hour intake in which I described my case, then afterward they provided follow up with an assigned attorney.  My attorney was sharp and helpful, but also realize they are doing this work for free, so you are at the bottom of their priority list.   I had a somewhat complicated case, and had to be very vocal, persistent, and proactive about getting the information to the attorney.  In one instance I was called by the attorney the night before the hearing and it was clear the information I previously provided had not been read thoroughly.  I was patient however, and worked with them realizing this is time they are working for free.  The lawyer was helpful in each phase of the process, and helped me understand the best route forward in my defense.  I ended up winning the case and was paid the additional amount owed by unemployment, and did not have to pay back the 6 month's worth of unemployment already paid.  This was a total lifesaver, and I couldn't be more thankful or appreciative or her work (the attorney).

If you are organized in your defense and have a just cause against your employer, this is well worth it.  My only hesitation is that it is difficult to get a hold of this organization, and legally you do have to do a lot of the heavy lifting yourself (obviously) as this is a free service.  Be prepared to help your assigned lawyer as much as possible, and meet them where they stand.  Don't come into this with a bad case, or expect the lawyers to do the work for you.  They are there for guidance, representation, and advice and not much more as they are doing this for free.  If you do win your case, please donate to this organization.
Have yet to help. If they do hellp I.will update

I will change my rating once I get a call back from them. I've called 2x now and left a message and still no call back and if so no voicemail. Well my 1 star is due the no call back not their services. I will change my review once I get that call. So if your reading this U. L. P. PLEASE CALL ME. (Update)
So I finally get the call and at the time was driving so I told the nice gentlemen I will call back and he can call me back if busy. Well I just saw this and remembered that I didn't call him back... (Mental note, Call ULP ASAP!?)
Amazing, professional, easy to work with. Could not have done it with out you!!!
The manager is a useless person without thinking  maintenance guy does his job after you bother them 3 times about the same problem
Still need to contact the lawyer

I have had the pleasure of working with a very nice man at the Unemployment Law project John Tirpak. As soon as ge got ahold of my case him and his assistant Erin jumped right in and took the stress away. I cant say anything but kind words about  John. He has helped me in so many ways. He has worked with me for months and I appreciate all his hard work and dedication. If you are ever fighting unemployment John is the attorney to turn too.
Sincerely,
Leilani
This place saved my life when I needed an unemployment lawyer, attentive, knowledgeable, amazing!

Hyun-Ji Lee assisted me and exceed all expectations! It was an absolute privilege to work with Hyun-Ji Lee,  my issue was resolved promptly and professionally, and I couldn’t be more appreciative to have worked with the Unemployment Law Project.

Abigail Maurer was an absolute standout to work with! She represented me with so much care and precision, and truly exceeded every expectation. She was timely, incredibly communicative, and consistently went above and beyond to make sure I was fully supported throughout the duration of my time with her. It’s obvious she’s not only smart, but genuinely great at what she does. I’ll 100% be using her again for any future legal needs, and I’ll be recommending her to every colleague and friend who needs an attorney they can trust and feel confident with. Thank you so much, Abby!

We are lucky to have Evan Loeffler handle our eviction case. He is very patient with me and approachable. He is very experienced and thorough. His team is also helpful. I can’t disclose too much as the case is going on. But I think we are in good hands. We wish we could have get referred to him much earlier so we wouldn’t have wasted too much of our time. I just feel for long term landlords like us, it is very important to have a great lawyer by our side, when it comes to leases, contracts, professional renters etc…

Williams Kastner is a full service law firm with a personal touch.  The attorneys care about and take care of their clients, including Fortune 500 companies, small businesses, and individuals.  I can't recommend the firm enough.

In late June of this year 2024, I was contacted by Eddy Silverman regarding a small claims case against one of the most horrible Wal Marts in the country here in Yakima WA.  I countered with just five hundred dollars more from this awful behemoth of a "corporation" that gets sued roughly five thousand times a year........and this so called "great attorney", does not reply/let me know what WM thought, which of course left the door open for me to draw up the Complaint and Summons to take WM to Civil District Court OR Superior Court. I know how to draw up these forms myself, saving hundreds of dollars.  Although Eddy Silverman didn't represent me, he did let me know by his inactions and words, that, even if its a pro se litigant in SMALL CLAIMS cases,  WE WILL TAKE ADVANTAGE OF AND SCREW WITH.  The crux of the matter?  I am disabled and let WM know of the extreme traumatic events I had to endure over the course of the recent years.  Hmmmm...........quite.......sadistic. Too bad I look how I Iook.......................and am not like others.
Excellent Experience!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you!

reviews.text:
Billy Kinkaid is 200% competent.
Billy specializes in complex cases.
Billy Kinkaid maintains deadlines and communications with explicit timing.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for the kind words Kammie!

reviews.text:
Kaitlyn Jackson just completed a successful eviction for us. We cannot begin express our gratitude for how well Kaitlyn handled our case. Before we found her, we had used the services of 3 other attorneys and were very frustrated with their poor performance and lack of professional knowledge of Seattle Landlord/Tenant laws.

When we first contacted Kaitlyn, she was very organized and put together clear path for us to follow that had a good chance of success. It was a long drawn out process where the tenant used every resource to stay in the rental unit for several months. Kaitlyn was available for us every step of the way and made sure that we understood what we had to do in a very detailed manner. Kaitlyn's persistence, knowledge of the law and experience with the court were key to us finally being able to get our rental unit back.

For anyone in need of legal eviction services, we give Kaitlyn Jackson a 5 star plus rating and highly recommend her services.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hello Jim! We are so happy to hear Kaitlyn left such a good impression. Thank you for taking the time to leave us such a kind review!
Thank you Bradley!

reviews.text: .so last night digging around here was occuring

I agree with the previous reviewer...Over the last several months I've left emails and several phone calls inquiring about the status of a claim for which they are supposed to be my contact.   Their lack of professionalism is disheartening.

I was involved in a car accident in September 2024 and retained this firm shortly after. At first they made things seem easy, and it felt like I was in good hands. It's now nearly 2026, I’ve had to reach out several times for updates, and I've received almost no meaningful updates on my case. Last time was in September. I’ve been passed from rep to the other, I've sent multiple emails, two recently, and have been left completely out of the loop.
I waited two weeks from my last email before leaving this review to see if I would have any contact back. As a client, I expected transparency, responsiveness, and at the very least, periodic check-ins. Instead, I've felt ignored and sidelined. If you value communication and want to feel supported through a legal process, I would reconsider before choosing this firm.

*UPDATED*

After expressing my concerns, I did receive a call directly from Jason. When given the options after my accident, my doctor advised that Murphy Law would have a more personal approach with their clients over some of the more corporate firms out there.  His direct call gave me reassurance in why I went with Murphy Law to begin with. Thank you, Jason and team.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Isaiah, Thank you for sharing your experience and for updating your review. I apologize for the lack of communication you encountered, which is not the level of service we strive for. I'm glad we connected directly and addressed your concerns. Your feedback is invaluable, and we are committed to improving our communication to provide the personal attention you deserve. If you have any more questions or need further assistance, please don’t hesitate to reach out. We appreciate your trust in Murphy Trial Law and are here to support you. Best regards, Jason Murphy

reviews.text: I am very thankful to have had the pleasure of working with Jason and his team! They helped me in so many ways I could never be enough thankful to thank them a lot more. They made this process so easy going and always informed me about everything. Lisa was great as well for helping me get the right settlement for my case! Very thankful to have had worked with them and help me thru gut this process and get the stress off my shoulder thank you Jason and your team! Happy holidays (:
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Maite for your kind words! We're thrilled to hear our team could take the stress off your shoulders. It's wonderful to know that you felt supported and happy with our service. We aim to provide exceptional assistance to all our injured clients. If you know anyone else who needs help, please feel free to refer them our way. We're always here to lend a hand. Thanks again for choosing us and sharing your experience!

reviews.text: Lisa and the staff at Murphy Trial Law went above and beyond for my case! They were professional, caring, and always kept in communication throughout the year long process. I would recommend them for any type of personal injury claim. Thanks again!
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Antonio, Thank you so much for your kind words! We're thrilled to hear that you had a positive experience with Lisa and our team. Keeping clients informed and providing compassionate service is at the heart of what we do. It's gratifying to know you felt supported throughout your case. We're grateful for your recommendation and are always here for you if you need us.

reviews.text: Murphy Trial Law worked on my person injury case from a car accident.  Everything was smooth and hassle free from beginnig till the end.  The service was complete and managed every detail, and very professional which anyone would expect from a law office. I would recommend this law office to anyone.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Joe ,

Thank you so much for your kind words and for sharing your positive experience with us. We're glad to hear your personal injury case went smoothly. Your recommendation means a lot to us! If you ever need anything in the future, please don't hesitate to reach out.

reviews.text: I cannot recommend them enough. From start to finish, they were incredibly helpful, professional, and supportive during a very difficult time. Lisa, in particular, was exceptional. She graciously answered all of my calls and questions, no matter how often I reached out, making the process feel much less overwhelming. While I sincerely hope I never have to go through anything like this again, if I do, they would be the first ones I turn to. I would wholeheartedly recommend them to anyone in need of legal assistance.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for your kind words. We're thrilled you felt supported and well-guided during such a difficult time.

We agree Lisa is amazing. Lisa and the rest of our team are dedicated to providing the best service, and we're glad that it made a difference. We are truly humbled by your recommendation. If you ever need assistance in the future, know that we are here for you.

reviews.text: “I engaged MURPHY TRAIL LAW for my personal-injury facing difficult family matters I contacted MURPHY TRAIL LAW case and I couldn’t be more pleased. The attorney was thorough, responsive, and explained everything in plain English. My settlement came in faster than expected and with better terms than I dared hope. Thanks to them I now feel ready for the next chapter of my life I highly recommend them.”
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Nahum, for your wonderful review! We're thrilled to hear that our team at Murphy Trial Law could assist you effectively with your personal-injury case. It's great to know that our attorney’s thoroughness and clear communication made a positive impact, and that the settlement terms exceeded your expectations. We’re delighted to have played a role in helping you move forward confidently. Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we're here for you anytime you need further assistance. Hello John,

Handed everything with the insurance company and also helped me gain understanding with other issues related to the car accident.  The final resolve was a nice settlement from the insurance company (who tried to avoid me) but Jason made sure my health was restored and now I can get my finances back into order.  I am now happy again and healed, resting well at night.  I highly recommend Murphy Trial Law for the entire Seattle area!
