reviews.text: John and his team are awesome! They were able to get me a new start with the IRS. They filed my returns and reduced my total debt substantially. Their team was very professional and punctual. I wouldn’t trust anyone else with my tax matters.

I came to Seattle Legal Services scared to death December 23rd after seeing a 2018 tax year I wasn't aware of that I owed a lot on. IRS was ready to levy, my notices from them were sent to the wrong address. The very next day, John took time on Christmas eve morning via zoom, and we talked. That's right, John took time on that day usually reserved for family time to talk. He calmed me down and made things clearer. Since, I have paid 100 percent of that 2018 tax year and the team got my last 6 years in order. John set up a plan for us, to keep me on my feet with a strategic plan in place going forward. Am I still scared?  Absolutely!  I made a mess of my taxes! But knowing I have a team like Seattle Legal Services there for me helps. I own every bit of this tax mess. Listen, if you are looking for someone to sugar coat things, probably look elsewhere. If you are looking for someone to tell you the truth, even if you don't like it, Seattle Legal Services is the place. John told me straight up what's probably going to happen and he was right. I needed honesty and truth. John is every bit of that. I have been a big baby throughout this whole process, and John has patiently walked me through it. This has probably been the toughest thing I have ever faced in my life financially,  and having Seattle Legal Services has made things better. I will probably use Seattle Legal Services every tax year going forward. Even though we still have work to be done, and it will probably take time, I felt comfortable leaving a review now.
reviews.ownerResponse:

Thank you for being so open and honest in sharing this. We know how overwhelming that situation must have felt, especially around the holidays. reviews.text:
The issues and money owed that I have with the IRS were my fault. I fell for the “we can help” from the first company I tried. Needless to say, I was 100% refunded for the payment through my bank – it was fraud. I tried one more time with another all talk company and after paying the 11K and it taking almost 3 years, I come back owing about 30K more in taxes. Needless to say, I emailed the owner of the company and the CFO sharing my experience and what the next steps would be and I was refunded 100% for what I paid coming directly from the CFO. Tax problems were much worse. I was at my wits end with all of the advertising/marketing mail promising to help me out. After much thought and talking to different people about the issues I was having, I was advised to actually go to a law firm for the help.
I made the decision to go with Seattle Legal Services PLLC and could be happier and more relieved. I worked directly with John Georvasilis and his team for the help I really needed and it actually paid off. Seattle Legal Services PLLC was able to get more done in 3 months than in the 5 years with the other companies I tried. John was very direct and to the point on the steps/process in which to go and it could not have been better for me. I have a 2-year window where I don’t have to worry about paying the IRS a dime. I paid Seattle Legal Services PLLC there one-time fee and it was handled, they aren’t all of a sudden coming back asking for more money. In 2 years, there will be a very small fee to go over and update my information with regards to the money I have and the money I owe. I recommend Seattle Legal Services PLLC 1000%. If you want a company and team of people to actually care and do the work needed to make things better for you, I couldn’t recommend Seattle Legal Services PLLC more. If you have problems with the IRS, these are the people to talk to and work with. Highly recommended.

From our first call, Alex had already read everything I'd sent him and thought about it. He walked me through the reality of the situation -- what might work, what was unlikely -- and proposed a strategy. The haze around me started to lift, and I knew I was in safe hands.

Throughout, Alex kept me up to date, building trust and explaining the strategy behind every move. When things felt terrifying I could confidently press ahead with this unflappable ally; whether things looked hopeful or harrowing, he was coolheaded at every turn.

Alex didn't just win my case. He gave me my life back.

If you're reading this, you might be where I was: scared, overwhelmed, and not sure if it's even worth the fight. It is. Call Alex. You're going to be okay.

Alex is an incredible lawyer and I was fortunate to be represented by him. His skillful maneuvering showcased his intelligence and pro level experience.

It's an unjust world out there. If the world had more Alex Higgins, it would be a better place. He was my Equalizer and I am truly grateful that he helped me reclaim my agency. With a huge win. SO SATISFYING.

Alex was the man. I had a do-not compete in my contract that we figured out a way around. He is a straightforward guy. He knows his stuff. He gave me a kick in the butt before I got a raise that would compromise my ability to open a competing business. I just wish I could continue using his services as a business owner somehow. Highly recommend him. Best money I have ever spent.

Alex is an incredible attorney! Of the several attorneys I contacted during my search, he was recommended again and again by colleagues that were unavailable to take my case. Alex's ability to navigate these situations effortlessly is what impressed me most. He answered my call (on a Saturday!) and got to work quickly. He responded within days and settled within weeks (not months as other attorneys quoted). He was efficient and effective, which saved me time and money.  Not only is Alex highly experienced and intelligent, he is kind and laid back. His demeanor eased my mind in what I consider the most stressful time in my life. He is known as the best in his field for a reason. Call him now!

I hired Alex years ago for a legal matter pertaining to my employment at the time. My case was a very small case, comparatively speaking, and it was still treated with the highest degree of care. He was always professional, informative and direct with me. He was easily accessible via email or phone, including weekends as needed. He did not waste my time or money, and was very easy to work with. If you have an employment related matter, this is the attorney you want at your side.

Alex Higgins cannot be recommended highly enough.

From the moment you meet and talk with him, there is no doubt that you are working with someone who is intelligent, thoughtful and very skilled as a lawyer.  He is highly organized and has an astute attention to detail yet doesn't get so lost in the details that he misses the broader picture.

I never expected to find myself in a situation where I would need to find a lawyer.  I'm not sure anyone really ever does.  As a physician, I had no idea where to start and felt completely out of my element, until I met Alex and we reviewed the case.

In our initial discussion, I immediately knew that Alex was someone I could trust.  He was respectful and professional but also made it very clear he wasn't going to tell me what I wanted to hear.  He was able to explain complicated law in a way that I could understand.  During our meetings, it was clear that he was listening and had truly taken the time to understand the details.  Never did I feel rushed or dismissed.  I felt heard and taken care of like I imagine my patients want to be heard and taken care of.

As my case progressed, Alex had the insight and professionalism to recommend that I continue my case with a more specialized firm instead of attempting to keep the work for himself and potentially do a lesser job.  Regardless, even with the more specialized firm taking over my case, I continued to go back to Alex time and again with questions and concerns.  I felt that his judgement and honesty could not be rivaled and it was comforting knowing Alex was still there.  Ultimately, Alex and I decided to bring him back onto my case as co-counsel because I trusted his skill and expertise too much to not have him on the case.

No one wants to go through this experience, but I feel incredibly lucky to have found Alex.  It is in the rough times that the great people show themselves.  Alex is one of the great ones out there.
Alex was very responsive and worked to get the best results for me.

Alex is one of the most skilled and effective employment attorneys I have ever met.  And I know a few. Alex quickly and directly responded to my initial inquiry. He got better results than I expected against a large employer with a lot of resources to fight my case. I appreciated his kindness and encouragement during this stressful event in my life.

reviews.text:
Was in an accident on March 9, 2024.
Was rear ended in a roundabout by someone not paying attention.

Looked at several attorneys online and called a couple, decided to go with Phillips law firm because they sounded fair for their % of the case money.

Their follow up is OK. Not stellar and had to follow through. Never did once talk with an actual Attorney, just assistants and/or Paralegals, which is fine if I'm kept informed and in the loop.

Which they did, they gave me their best advice on when to settle, sent me the settlement breakdown....

And it does take time with insurance companies, over a year for me to conclude this.

My settlement check was mailed out on July 2, 2025.

So that was from March 9, 2024 to July 2, 2025, for a time frame.

Overall I'd say Philips Law Firm did a fair. Good job. Only the people answering the phones (Assistants/Paralegals) seem to be not happy about talking to clients.

I do understand they probably get yelled at ALOT by unhappy, impatient clients wondering where there money is, but I knew it would be a long haul.

Like I stated, I thought they were fair and processed my settlement as agreed upon, had me go through some massage therapy.

I was satisfied with their results and follow up.

Could have been a little more timely getting back to me, but when I asked they did follow through.

Thanks 👍 again for helping me with my case.

reviews.text:
Search Labs | AI Overview

A fiduciary is a person or entity, like a trustee or financial advisor, who is legally and ethically obligated to act in the best interests of another person or group. They manage assets or make decisions on behalf of someone else, with a duty of loyalty, care, and good faith.
I was not in the trust of a fiduciary until I switched from Dubin Law Group to Phillips Law Firm to handle my accidental claim.
After being struck by a USPS van on December 29th, 2024, I contacted Daniela at Dublin Law Group on December 30th.
I was assigned to Josh Campbell and his case manager Jordyn Brantley.
From December 30th to March 14, 2025, I received no communications from Jordyn Brantley. I was not contacted nor briefed about My case every 30 days.
In the course of that 3-4 months, I spoke to Josh Campbell once, and that was in April to terminate Dublin Law Group's services.
I contacted Charles at Phillips Law Firm in April.
When Phillip Law Firm finally received my case information from Dubin Law Group, I was informed that Josh Campbell never filed an official claim form with the USPS.
From December 2024 to April 2025, My fiduciary, My Attorney, Josh Campbell and Dubin Law Group, never filed an official claim?
I was flabbergasted!
Phillips Law Firm has updated my claim, and I'm on the road to immediate recovery and compensation.
In a 1 month time span, Phillips Law Firm has given me expedient, effective and practical support.
Kamryn and my case manger, Robyn, provide me with timely and informative case updates.
The truth needs to be told. The Dubin Law Group advertisements are false, and Dubin Law Group is a negligent Fiduciary.
As a client, we are laymen in legal mitigations, however,
Phillips Law Firm has shown me trust that I will not be marginalized in the process.
Phillips Law Firm shares the same winning attitude as me. The marathon continues 🏳️🏁🏆
Thank you Phillips Law Firm 👏🏿🎉
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your experience and kind words about our team. We’re glad to hear you’ve felt supported and informed throughout your case. Feedback like yours reinforces the importance of clear communication and client trust in everything we do.
We appreciate your 5-star review! It means a lot to our team.
Thanks so much for the rating! We’re glad you had a positive experience with our firm.
Thank you for taking the time Adan!

Exceptional Legal Support with Genuine Care

I cannot express enough gratitude for the dedication and professionalism shown by Philips Law Firm specially Noemi . From the very first consultation, their team demonstrated unwavering commitment, expertise, and a sincere desire to help. They took the time to understand my concerns, explaining every step with patience and clarity, ensuring I felt confident throughout the legal process.

What truly sets Philips Law Firm apart is their compassion. They don’t just see cases—they see people. They fight for justice with integrity and diligence, making sure their clients feel heard and valued. Knowing they had my best interests at heart gave me peace of mind in a challenging time.

If you are looking for a law firm that combines legal excellence with genuine care, Philips Law Firm is the team you need by your side. Their professionalism, responsiveness, and dedication to their clients are second to none. I wholeheartedly recommend them to anyone seeking trusted legal representation!

reviews.text: This firm was a recommendation that was given to the person I was in a car accident with back in 2023. Our situation was tough and the attorney we were working with let us know that. I appreciated the transparency and the effort that was put into the case. Towards the end the communication faded and I was left in the dark. When I brought up my concerns/confusion, Angela and Jeffrey stepped up to help fill in the gaps and assist with my concerns. My attorney unfortunately left the firm which explained why things got patchy but I got back up to speed with their help and was left feeling heard and satisfied with my total take home. They were a great balance of friendly and professional. I believe if you got the opportunity to work with them that you would feel taken care of and be satisfied with their exceptional services 🙂 Thank you all so much for helping me through this frustrating and unfortunate event!

Lizett and the rest of the team at Caffee did an amazing job with my case. Responses were prompt and professional. And they were able to secure a really solid settlement on my behalf. Thank-you to the whole team!

Caffee Law has been a complete waste of my time and money. Their communication is absolutely terrible—I constantly had to chase them down for updates on my car injury case. Every time I called, I either got no response or vague answers that didn’t help at all. They promised results but did nothing but drag things out, making everything more stressful than it already was. If you want a law firm that actually cares about your case and keeps you informed, look somewhere else. Would not recommend!

Glad I fired him!
If you have any serious injuries like mine, ( TBI - Traumatic Brain Injury ) do not hire this lawyer or his firm for representation.

I hired Jeff after my car accident in 2021. He talked a good "game" about my case and how he'd fight for me. That was further from the truth. I spent a little over a year in rehabilitation just for him to pass my case off to two different lawyers, one of which who didn't inform me of important developments like I asked. Almost filed my lawsuit in the wrong court, failed to obtain all of my medical records by the time of pre-trial and failed to tell me that for one of my trial hearings I didn't need to show up. I was hours away from waking into a court room I didn't need to be in. I would've never hired Christa on my own, she's not a fighter for tough cases and she lets her personal issues cloud her judgement towards her clients.

If you want a lawyer who tells you to take the first offer because they don't feel like fighting, sure- hire him. If you want a lawyer who gives you an amount for your case, but changes 4 more times over the next 2 years and then backtracks, then sure, hire him. If you want a lawyer who tells you "You have a better chance of winning at the Casino" then sure, hire him. If you want a lawyer who can't answer questions or a lawyer who in 2 years couldn't get your vehicle fixed, made you get your own medical records, and insults you, then sure- hire him.

If you want someone who respects you as a person and not just another case, find someone who specializes in your condition. I fired them once they dropped the ball. Found a lawyer who specializes in TBI and I couldn't have been happier. Not only did he do more for me and my case in 2 months than they did in 2 YEARS but he got me more than expected, had my truck fixed and I didn't have to see a court room!

Caffee Law has done a very good job with the post accident process. Lizett, the paralegal assigned to my case has done a tremendous job with keeping me informed and helping me. If you are ever in a car wreck and get injured, don't hesitate to give Caffee Law a call!
Workin with Ryan was amazing he took the time too really look into my case and go full throttle results I'm a happy camper what a amazing team Caffee Accident & Injury Lawyers.

All I got was the run around. And no I didn't receive an email. I did receive a welcome email that would take my case. that was over a month ago. Had I not called I probably would have never known that they decided to not take my case. There are too many attorneys out there to choose from and to be left in the dark, not cool. Please run and don't look back. Io'Sefa/Joseph

After my car accident it felt like I was getting nowhere with my insurance company. I reached out to CAFFEE and was assigned my Lawyer Christa. She took all of the anxiety and stress off my shoulders. She listened to me and made me feel heard. She kept me updated every step of the way and got me a settlement way more than I was expected. I am forever grateful for her helping me during one of the most stressful times of my life. Thank you.

reviews.text:
My initial consultation with Angela was truly remarkable. I have never encountered a paralegal who exhibits such dedication, empathy, and proficiency. She introduced me to their unique firm model: "We hope you don't need our services, but if you do, we aim to alleviate your distress by managing the paperwork and the interactions with the insurance company, ensuring a smoother claims process ."

Navigating the complexities of my claims was far from straightforward. My previous experience as an insurance agent made dealing with standard insurance practices somewhat familiar, yet being out of the field for several years and facing disabilities complicated matters significantly. I faced executive function challenges that transformed what was once an easy task into a daunting one.

Many individuals underestimate the necessity of legal representation until they find themselves in a critical situation. I highly recommend reaching out to this firm, especially if you are a Washington State employee or affiliated with the University of Washington SEIU925. I've contacted several long-term disability firms before, only to find them dismissive and focused on profitability, where communication is limited to operators rather than legal experts.

As a military veteran who has struggled with medical claims in the past, this firm stands out as my sole recommendation. I believe their expertise could extend beneficially into areas such as Privare-STD and LTD. I feel fortunate to have connected with Angela; knowing that the Roy Law Group will advocate for me in case my claims are denied or face challenges provides significant peace of mind. My endorsements are selective, and I don't easily offer my recommendations, but this team has truly impressed me. Vietnamese, and refugees or immigrant, friendly business. #ltd p.s. This is not a paid review.

reviews.text: First and foremost, my wife and I are extremely appreciative of the Roy Law Group. They are now family to us and we could not have dealt with the insurance company alone. The people that work for Roy Law Group took us on and walked us through every step of the long process. I wish we could recommend them higher than this review. Our story of "why" we recommend Roy Law Group. My wife suffers from Traumatic Brain Injury (TBI) as a result of a horrific automobile accident and epilepsy. At first, her short term employment disability kicked in without any issues. We noticed a change in the disability insurance as my wife's treatments continued past the six month mark. We were told by the insurance company she was not going to receive long-term disability. The insurance company lied stating long-term disability was not selected for her at time of employment. Being she has TBI it was very difficult for her to understand what was happening. I had to do the work to find her original employment signing paperwork showing she had signed up, checked the box, and paid for this service. This was the first time we realized the insurance company was not here to "help" my wife. During this stage we received many complicated paperwork assignments from the insurance company and threats she was going to be dropped from coverage. You could feel the insurance company just wanted us to give up so they could save money. They do not care about your actual wellbeing. We did not give up like they wanted us to do. Months prior to the one year mark the threats became real as the insurance company randomly sent my wife a denial of coverage letter. They gave a ridiculous reason stating they felt she was fine now and was dropping her from long-term coverage again. Mind you, she had only been on long-term disability for a few months. Even though she was still receiving medical services and had multiple doctors stating the opposite. We did not accept the insurance games anymore and looked for help. Thankfully we talked with the Row Law Group. They are amazing people from the start and tell you up front what they will do. No false promises, as they walk you through realistically if they were able or not able to help and why. Luckily for us they saw what the insurance company was doing and had dealt with this same company many times. I love the fact they listen to your situation and you know they are in the fight with you. I have never seen complete strangers be an advocate for the truth and justice like the Row Law Group is. Over the process I could not imagine anyone else doing such an amazing tailored job to our situation as them. We have now had my wife's long term disabilities reinstated and now moving forward the insurance company has to still deal with our protectors the Row Law Group. If you are going through the ringer and fighting with an insurance company over short/long-term disability just stop the stress and fight alone. Don't delay like we did just CALL Row Law Group now. I wish we had called them earlier and my wife would not have had to cry or worry as much during the earliest stages of the fight. Our family is so grateful to the Row Law Group.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you. We strive to be a firm you can count on through the entire process and I’m glad we could deliver for your family.

reviews.text: It has been a journey but with out this wonderful team we would not have prevailed.  They are professional, hard working and an absolute pleasure to work with.  I recommend 1000%

reviews.text: I had no hope of ever winning my wrongful denial of benefits from my long-term disability insurance provider. I’m in the medical field as a Respiratory Therapist for 24 years(lifting Patients, heavy equipment, very demanding job)  and I paid into an Insurance Company for at least 15 years in LTD. Post surgery complications with continuing back/hip more pain, adhesive capsulitis, months and months of Physical Therapy. I also have a history of chronic Migraine’s which I’ve had since the age 10 and take multiple medications for and currently see a Neurologist regularly. After a little less than 2 years I received a notice that my LTD has been discontinued. That’s it? They found that I can not do my job but to be a desk clerk? What?  I went online to find an Attorney because I just knew I couldn’t do this on my own. I saw Row Law Group reviews and the clients cases sounded a lot like me!  I called them and I am so happy I did!!  We just won our case!! The Insurance Company even tried to appeal us twice!!
Do not hesitate to call Roy Law Group!!  I went with my gut calling these guys and I’m so glad I did!  Easy to work with and fast response time!

reviews.text: Patrick and Jason (and the other people I talked to) were great to talk to and helped really walk me through the steps.
Live it
Ok

Jennifer was recommended to me by a trusted colleague of a friend who is also an attorney, and I’m very grateful I found her. I was initially hesitant about the consultation fee because I did not have much experience with legal matters, but she quickly stood out as extremely knowledgeable, professional, and not at all pushy.

She is clearly very smart, highly organized, and takes her work seriously. She set expectations clearly from the beginning, including how much material she would review before a consultation, and I could tell she truly read and digested what I sent her beforehand. I would much rather have that kind of clarity and follow-through than vague promises.

I also consulted with another attorney to explore my options, and that experience made me appreciate Jennifer even more. Even though he did not set a page limit, it seemed clear that he had only skimmed the materials I sent, and the consultation felt more sales-driven. Jennifer, on the other hand, was prepared, practical, and genuinely focused on helping me, which is why I went back to her.

She also understood how expensive it can be to hire an attorney and never pushed unnecessary services. Instead, she was honest about when I could handle things on my own and even suggested practical options like using her template instead of paying her to draft everything for me.

I ended up relying on her for consultations and guidance throughout the process while doing much of the work myself. With her help, I was able to get a protection order granted, and the court also ruled that the harasser had to pay my attorney’s fees. I highly recommend her. Thank you Jennifer!

I had a pretty poor experience in my consultation with Jennifer, especially relative to another firm that I will be retaining. First, she narrowly engaged on only the ~20 page pre-read limit she imposes (not enough to capture most individual case documents) to then inform her advice. Despite being informed before the consultation that there was a lot of context that needed to be discussed outside those documents, she didn't seem at all interested in understanding the full picture to make more insightful strategic advice and instead jumped right into opining. She gave a generic recommendation on resolution approach that depended on multiple parties' discretion and was thus a nondeterministic path, but didn't offer any strategic advice for how to approach things (especially based on her prior case experience) if things didn't play out the way she was advising. Can be summarized in terms of 'lack of caring', which when contrasted against others' reviews makes me question how high of a bar she holds on her service relative to her biases/how she feels about a case. Lastly, her command on basic court facts lacking. She believed something to be impossible that in fact was possible and how I came prepared to the consultation (upon free advice from the legal assistant at another firm). Overall, it seems she made up her mind on the case before the consultation began and gave the bare minimum during it to collect her fee. The email follow-up provided no useful insights or materials that couldn't be found online with more than 10 minutes of research.
reviews.ownerResponse: In each consult, I give the best, most useful advice that I can based on over 30 years of experience.  I am always happy to review more than 20 pages of material, if my time is paid for, but a review of up to 20 pages is included in the consult.  I offer my input on possible ways to deal with each case and situation I consult on and provide any useful materials I can after the consult.  Most people find their consults with me very helpful and I strive to provide useful information to each person I consult with.

reviews.text: Finding Jennifer Horwitz was an absolute blessing. She’s the kind of attorney who truly cares  compassionate, incredibly responsive, and deeply knowledgeable. Even when she wasn’t feeling well, she still took the time to help me and answer my questions. In a court system that can feel confusing and overwhelming, Jennifer made me feel safe, supported, and confident every step of the way. I’m so grateful I found her and hope others who need that kind of help are able to find her too.

I highly recommend her for anyone seeking dedicated and professional legal guidance.

reviews.text: Jennifer helped me with a 1hr consultation for a protective order. Her preparation and edits helped me in getting that order approved. It was a really rough hearing, but because of Jennifer's advice it went so much smoother on my end. Thank you Jennifer!

I had a one hour consult with Jennifer regarding a domestic violence protective order.

Her keen attention to detail, ability to organize and articulate was critical in my case. She reviewed all my documentation, made great recommendations and was well worth it.

We didn’t use the entire hour, so she even credited me the leftover time for additional consultations as they came up, mainly document review and advice.

I consulted with Jennifer about a personal complex and dysfunctional relationship which I had legal concerns about. I was impressed with Jennifer’s ability to listen, comprehend, digest, and provide a sensible problem-solving solution on a practical level that keenly addressed my situation. We were able to speak about my situation and concerns without my feeling judged. Jennifer’s assistance was counseling in nature and outside of legal issues and helpful assisting me to come to peace with my situation.

I have worked with Jennifer on cases for years and we also consult often about our cases. Jennifer and I tried a complex criminal case together in a trial that lasted a month. I saw up close her tenacity, meticulousness, and razor-sharp analytical skills. She considered every possible investigative strategy, case theory, and legal issue. Her courtroom and writing skills are exceptional.  Through exhaustive legal research, she finds the relevant cases and legal arguments and then crafts motions to persuasively apply them to the facts in her cases.  Jennifer is also one of the most ethical people, both professionally and personally, that I know. She always considers costs to her clients and holds herself to a high standard of doing exceptional work as efficiently as possible.  This includes how she approaches her consultation practice, where she works hard to bring her practical, problem-solving skills to bear on a variety of situations so that she can help clients.  As with her cases, in her consults, she strives to deliver value-for-dollar for each hour that she works.  Jennifer balances tremendous advocacy with her duty of integrity to the courts, as lawyers are barred from bringing frivolous motions.  Her reputation for over 30 years in this community has earned her abiding respect from judges and adversaries – in part because she knows which battles to fight and what motions are worth litigating.  The quality of her work and her reputation live up to her Harvard education.

Jennifer is a good listener and very efficient. We used her both for consultative services and also full representation. In the consulting context, she met with us for one hour to guide us through the needed legal process and provide suggestions for how to prepare our papers, we then prepared them on our own and had good success. In particular, she had very good advice and insights into the organization and structure of our papers. Separately, we retained her for a matter and again, she was very efficient and also got us excellent results. We were very pleased with her services.

Jennifer was an invaluable resource for us as we went through the process of filing a petition for a protection order. From validating our feelings about the situation to her guidance on navigating the process, Jennifer's time was worth every dollar. She is professional, empathetic, quick to respond, and direct with her intention. With her help we were able to successfully obtain a protection order. For anyone in a similar situation, I would 10/10 recommend her for guidance, even if it is just a one hour conversation.

I had the opportunity to consult with Jennifer during a challenging legal situation recently. Jennifer's support and commitment were unwavering. Her attentive listening, insightful questions, and genuine empathy made a significant impact during this uncertain time. While my case didn't proceed formally, I am so grateful for the guidance and reassurance Jennifer provided. Anyone looking for the best criminal defense lawyer in the area should look no further, Jennifer is truly outstanding
Jennifer advertises that she offers “Pro Bono Representation” ,   When in fact she does not.  More than likely added to her Google business listing to look more appealing to the public.
reviews.ownerResponse: I do not advertise pro bono representation on my web site.

reviews.text: I hired Jennifer for a consultation on my case and I’m so happy I did. Her knowledge and expertise was not only helpful in gaining a protection order, but she also gave calmness while dealing with a stressful time in my life. I would definitely recommend her services.

We consulted with Jennifer for an hour in preparation for a civil harassment protection order against our neighbor. It was among the best $500 we've ever spent! Her counsel enabled us to focus on the right elements when presenting our case in court, resulting in a ruling in our favor. Hopefully we won't need her services in the future, but if we do, we will call her again.

Jennifer provides a unique service which gives you access to legal counsel without the often significant expense of fully retaining an attorney. I consulted with Jennifer for a protection order case and she gave me the tools and framework to be able to prepare everything myself. She then reviewed everything I had prepared and provided invaluable feedback before I submitted everything. Without her advice I would have been completely lost navigating the court system and she made me feel empowered and assured that my filings were accurate and thorough. She was also quick in her communication and flexible in accommodating consultations on relatively short notice. While I didn't formally retain her, I would recommend her for both representation and consultation. Additionally, she's well known and respected by her peers and was able to refer me to another highly regarded firm when my case went in a different direction that was outside of her particular area of expertise.

I’m glad I found Jennifer when I needed legal advice. My first impression of her was that she reads fast! I sent her pages of my case documents and I wrote several confusing paragraphs of what happened with my case but she was able to capture exactly what I was trying to say in just a couple of minutes. Immediately she was able to give me succinct advice on how to go about the case and the court system. This helped relieve a lot of stress I had dealing with the case. I was all over the place but she was able to guide me through and pointed out exactly what needed to be done – she doesn’t waste any time! When I asked her questions via email or sms, she has always responded very quickly which I think was really important because the justice system can be overwhelming to folks not familiar with it. Jennifer is smart, efficient, polite, and compassionate. Definitely 5 stars!
Sharp, to the point, direct regarding chance of success,  very good experience. Gives you faith in the profession.

I have only superlatives for Jennifer.  She was very professional,   very clear in her advice and suggestions, used our time together very efficiently and responsibly and was  extremely prompt in her response to emails. On a more personal level, she seemed genuinely interested in understanding our case, remembered details and  clearly wanted to help us with what we needed help with.  I would enthusiastically recommend her to my friends and family.

Jennifer Horwitz is a rare breed: smart, responsive, compassionate, honest, quick, and cost-effective. She helped me and a group of neighbors navigate a difficult and unfamiliar legal situation — coaching us, reviewing our work, making multiple helpful suggestions, and pointing out potential pitfalls. Though the underlying situation we were dealing was no fun, working with her was an absolute pleasure. I recommend her in the highest possible terms.

I was part of a group of condominium owners seeking protection from an abusive neighbor and had submitted a petition to that effect.  When the respondent's lawyer, on a Friday afternoon, issued a motion to deny our petitions, with the hearing already scheduled for the next Monday morning, one of us found Jennifer Horwitz willing to meet with us on Saturday morning.  She was completely honest with us and said that she could not represent us on such short notice, but agreed to coach us as we filed for a continuance and then prepared our own responses.  Over the next 2 weeks, she met with us several times and helped us prepare and file our paperwork. She was extraordinarily good at remembering details of 6 people's grievances, finding times that fit our 6 schedules, and was knowledgeable and efficient in helping us prepare our filings and navigate the court system.  In addition, she showed empathy and a genuine interest in our predicament.  I can't recommend her highly enough.

I have known Jennnifer Horwitz and her work for more than two decades.  She is easily one of the very most tenacious, intelligent, and all-around best attorneys I have ever known.  She has an uncanny ability both to understand and strategize issues quickly for a one-time consultation, and to sink her teeth into more complicated issues and cases in cases sometimes requiring years-long litigation.

Ms. Horowitz is a competent, compassionate, responsive, and professional attorney. I hired Ms. Horowitz to renew a protection order and I am incredibly happy with her work on my case.  In my case, I was the petitioner. I really wanted a compassionate and responsive attorney who also gets the best possible outcome for their clients. She did a stellar job! I was familiar with her work in criminal defense, DV casework and especially her work with the Seattle Clemency Project and she has many excellent reviews and it shows through her work. She is a very competent and thorough attorney. She really takes the time to review everything thoroughly and addressed all my questions and concerns. I was also pleasantly surprised that she responds in a timely manner and went the extra mile to work with my schedule.

Ms. Horowitz is very knowledgeable, and she made sure to catch even minor details.  She was a very strong advocate, and I was very impressed that she was eloquent, concise, and ensured that every relevant detail was brought up and addressed in court.  Everything she filed was well thought out and clear.  Even if we had lost, I would still feel like she had done everything in her ability to represent me and would have been worth every penny.

Lawyers and legal fees can be expensive and add up quickly and I was impressed that Ms. Horowitz was very mindful of the costs and made sure that I was comfortable with the costs and aware of everything going on in my case. She was very diligent in managing her time and resources wisely and I never felt rushed to make a decision or worried about the costs. I’ve hired a few attorneys for business and personal purposes and sometimes it feels like a long-drawn-out process of interviewing attorneys who just don’t seem to care or just are there to do a job.  Ms. Horowitz made me feel like she was really listening and on my side.   I would highly recommend her to anyone in need of an attorney whether you are the victim/petitioner or in need of a defense attorney.

Jennifer was clear and concise in her analysis and her representation of how I should respond to my court hearing brought in Seattle when I lived out of state. And Jennifer did so for less cost than she estimated. I gladly would hire her again if I ever need her services.

Jennifer was amazing for the time I held her as my counsel. She really understood the situation and my feelings. Having her guidance helped to put my mind at ease. She is meticulous and thoughtful. She felt like a huge asset to have in and out of court, and I know a lot of the good things that happened in the case were because of her assistance. Do not hesitate to call her!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, it was a privilege to earn your trust and to represent you.

Worked with team at Pendergast law for my motorcycle injury, and the process was very smooth. What went well for me:

* Besides bodily injuries they handle all property claims related to the incident, communicating on my behalf with other parties' insurance company
* In Communications they meet you were you are, happy to hop on the phone if necessary, but using texts or emails as well. When day is packed with meeting asynchronous communication is important to keep the process going. They also provide timely and detailed case status updates.

All-in-all, I'd definitely recommend working with them

Northwest Elder Law initially did our wills and other documents in 2018. When we decided to update our will recently, we knew we wanted to go back to them.  Rebecca King took our questions and requests for updates seriously and patiently. We just went in and signed our new wills which have updated language to protect our wishes even if the Supreme Court ever invalidates our marriage.

the folks at the northwest elder law group were such a pleasure to work with when my mother passed on. They were professional, real easy to approach, and amazing at helping me do the arduous task of settling my mother‘s estate. I can’t recommend them highly enough for all your elder law needs.
Chris and Shehana took care of us, and were very responsive in managing the guardianship filings with the court for my disabled son.  Super happy with their service.

We had a great experience with NW Elder Law. Rebecca is extremely knowledgeable and made the process very easy for us. She explained all of our options in a way that was easy to understand. She’s an excellent lawyer and advocate, and I can’t recommend her, and NW Elder Law, highly enough.

My disabled brother had an IRA at an investment firm that refused to honor my Power of Attorney to access his account. Rebecca King and her team were able to send a letter explaining Washington law and advising them of further legal action. The investment firm promptly reversed their stance and honored my POA so I was able to maintain my brother's account on his behalf. Rebecca and her team were professional, prompt, and responsive. And they got results!

Julia and her team were incredible to deal with, as our step father neared the end of his life. It was a very complicated situation, his girlfriend was changing his will, health care directives, abusing the workers at his AFH, and trying to subjecting him to surgeries his doctors said he would never survive. She not only helped us navigate these complex waters, but she jumped right into them, and really saved the situation, allowing him to die as he originally wanted, and not what his lunatic girlfriend wanted. Her team was also so helpful - sending documents, walking us through them, and being generally supportive. Highly recommended in any VAPO and Estate matters. Highly.
Easy to deal with, professional and knowledgeable.
Rebecca and her team were wonderful to work with. As a retired attorney myself I am able to appreciate the knowledge, skill, and professionalism of the Northwest Elder Law Group

Very pleased with the quick service and detailed explanations of the "Durable Power of Attorney" updates for my wife and myself. It feels good to have everything updated now that we are in our mid-eighties and new grandchildren have come into the picture.

Dont be fooled by the Google reviews. I spoke with Rebecca King about my father with huntingtons disease.

Long story short - they only take clear cut cases after someone with an illness actually hurts someone. You have to wait until the person you love and are trying to protect actually does something you were trying to prevent.

And they charge 450 per hour only after its a clear cut win because your loved one is in legal trouble.

Do yourself a favor and find another lawyer that's willing to do the work to present a compelling case before shet hits the fan.

If you're looking to update an estate plan, revise or fill out some paperwork, and you have tons of money to spare - Rebecca King will be your huckleberry. If you need a lawyer - look elseware.
Friendly, fast, knowledgeable, answered all our questions.
Friendly folks. Fast, efficient service.

I highly recommend these estate planning experts!

I met with Rebecca King and we talked through key components of my will to ensure that it would be executed precisely to my wishes.  The entire process was painless and thorough and I came away with exactly what I needed at a price that was very fair.  I highly recommend this firm and am so glad I chose Northwest Elder Law Group for my estate planning needs.

Great experience and so helpful!! Would highly recommend their services.

Each and every time the kind and professional staff and separate attorneys have addressed my needs and concernes, and have explained to me in great detail the ramifications, both positive and negative, of the consequences of the choices I made.   At each step in the process I was kept completely informed, either by email or by telephone calls ,of the status of my document preparation.  I very highly recommend the Northwest Elder Law Group for any and all estate planning needs.

I had been having a very difficult time trying to find an Elder Law Attorney for my parent, earlier this year.  I called Northwest Elder Law Group and left a message to see if someone could help me and my sibling with an unusual situation in regards to our parent.  I understand that practically every law office had been busy with either guardianship/conservatorship cases or just overloaded with clients.  My sibling was able to connect with Northwest Elder Law Group a week later and we were so lucky that Ms.Julia Lindeman decided to take on our case for our elderly parent.
I cannot say enough about this hard working individual.  Ms. Lindeman took on our case, with the time that she had (which to me, did not feel like a lot of time), and prepared herself well with the assistance of her paralegal.  Ms. Lindeman and her paralegal are thorough at what they do.  She took time to talk to each person that she felt could actively & positively play an important role for our situation regarding our parent.  She took time out of her busy schedule to talk and really listen to what my sibling and I had to say when we needed to explain our situation.  She's efficient and effective.  I was very impressed on how well she represented us in court for our parent.  If any of my friends need an Elder Law Attorney to assist them with their parent(s), I would immediately refer them to see Ms. Julia Lindeman.  Thank you!

I am so thankful for Julia Lindeman!   I submitted a Temporary Vulnerable Protection Order and naively thought I could finish the process myself.  When I realized I was in over my head, I called the NW Elder Law Group and Ms. Lindeman listened, gave me up-front advice, was kind, empathetic, and explained everything so well without making me feel stupid.   I felt she was very smart absorbing all the people in our situation, thoroughly understood the law, helped us cull the most important data in our case, and knew how to build our case in court.  The office is well organized and very professional.  The results were very good and I'm so thankful I called.  Now Julia Lindeman is our lawyer for all the elders in our family.

Rebecca King and her entire team at Northwest Elder Law Group were stellar in helping us navigate the process of preparing our estate documents; answering our many questions, helping us make choices that are right for us, and generally guiding us at every step along the way. He and his team immediately took over all communication with insurance companies and medical providers, which meant I didn’t have to make another frustrating or time-consuming phone call.

Ron was personable, genuinely concerned about my well-being, and guided me through every step of the process with clarity and professionalism. Maggie worked hard behind the scenes to keep everything moving efficiently. Their compassion, diligence, and prompt communication made a real difference — and they ultimately secured the full amount we demanded.

I highly recommend Ron Unger and his team to anyone looking for competent, responsive, and caring legal representation.

reviews.text: Sunny is an excellent advocate and lawyer.  She is professional, diligent, responsive and has a sharp understanding of the insurance industry. I was grateful to have her help and Bridge Law’s support to resolve a dispute with an auto insurance company, after my car was hit by another driver.  She was able to get the other driver’s insurance company to accept full fault and agree to a fair settlement, including covering medical expenses.

I had a very positive experience with Soyong. She was extremely kind, professional, and helpful throughout the entire process. She guided me step by step and made sure I understood everything clearly. Thanks to her support, the whole process felt much smoother and less stressful. I’m very satisfied with the service and truly appreciate her dedication. I highly recommend this office.

I was introduced to this firm through a friend, and this is my second time using it.
Both cases were handled by Dave, the manager, and I can once again say that he is truly trustworthy.

At first, I had many questions and concerns, but he kindly explained everything to me and provided detailed updates on the current progress, allowing me to wait with peace of mind.

Furthermore, he contacted me occasionally throughout the case, carefully checking on my health and the progress of my medical treatment. I could have felt that he was truly caring, not just handling the case.

In this case, after several rounds of negotiations, the case was almost finalized, and it could have been finalized as is. However, Dave, drawing on his extensive experience, persevered and continued negotiations until the very end. As a result, the final compensation amount was increased by approximately 2.5 times, which was truly impressive.

If it had been anywhere else, it would have been resolved at that point.
I highly recommend this firm, and especially Dave, the manager. If you have been in an accident, don't hesitate and contact us right away.

After I was rear ended driving home one night, I talked with the team at Bridge Law. Chong Byun and Dave Yang handled everything for me and helped me focus on getting better. From working with the other person's insurance, getting me in touch with medical specialists and setting up rental car while my car was down. Highly recommend the team as they made it low stress and allowed me to focus on getting back to where I was before the accident.

When another driver hit me, their insurance harassed me and tried to screw me over. Attorney Chong Byun took my case and he and the team at Bridge Law really helped me out. He stopped the insurance from bothering me so that I could focus on recovery, and helped me win a large settlement. Thanks Chong and Bridge Law!

Bridge Law & Associates is great. We worked with Chong Byun, and he made the entire process easy and stress-free. He walked us through everything, provided frequent updates, and kept us informed the whole way.

Chong went above and beyond for us and fought on our behalf. He was able to settle our case with compensation that exceeded our expectations. We truly felt supported throughout the entire process.

Highly recommend Chong and Bridge Law & Associates.

So thankful for this law firm who help me with my car accident. They were able to provide legal support and resources, Chong Byun is who we had and he walked us through the process and gave us a weekly update. We were never worried throughout the process. Chong was super informative and was able to settle our case with great and more than we could imagine compensation. Will be going to Chong for all our future automotive cases.

I was in a really difficult situation after my car accident. My first attorney told me the crash was my fault, even though I knew it wasn’t. A friend recommended Bridge Law, specifically Chong, and I’m so glad they did. Chong reviewed everything, explained that I should not be at fault, and took on my case when others wouldn’t. Within a month, I was paid out for my totaled car and we had a successful outcome.

Chong was honest, confident, and truly fought for me. I am so thankful from beginning to end for how much he helped. I would recommend Bridge law, specifically Chong to anyone.

Special shout out to Chong Byun and his team! they were professional, knowledgeable, and easy to communicate with. They explained everything clearly and kept me posted. I felt confident knowing my case was in capable hands, and the outcome reflected their expertise. Highly recommend!
I got the best experience here to resolve my car accident. Thanks for all!

I’ll be honest, before my accident, I had only ever seen lawyers on TV. I had a bias that they were intimidating, expensive, and maybe not really there to help. After my accident, my car was totaled and left at a shop for parts. While I was there collecting my things, the gentleman helping me commented that it looked like a really serious crash. He told me to reach out to his family friend who helps people in these situations. I was wary, but he reassured me over and over that it was free and that she was truly just there to help.

Eventually I decided to reach out to Soyong at Bridge Law & Associates, and I am so grateful I did. From the very beginning she was incredibly kind, knowledgeable, and reassuring. She explained everything in a way I could understand and handled the entire process for me. She knew all the ins and outs of the legal system and used that expertise to my advantage. One of the first major wins was her helping me hire a private evaluator, covered by the settlement, to reassess my totaled car. Because of her I received thousands more than my insurance initially offered and was able to replace my car right away.

As time went on, Soyong not only managed all the communications with insurance but also connected me with caring, skilled practitioners to address the pain I was dealing with after the accident. All I had to do was make it to my appointments, she took care of the rest. I felt safe, supported, and like I was genuinely in good hands.

When we reached the settlement stage, the initial number was good but not quite reflective of how severe the accident had been. This is where I had the privilege of working with Michael Carbonneau. Speaking with him felt like talking with a kind uncle, patient, understanding, and honest. He explained why the first offer was reasonable, but before we hung up he said, “Let me see what I can do.” And sure enough, thanks to his (and SoYong’s) effort and extreme generosity, Soyong later called me with an updated settlement that completely blew me away.

Bridge Law & Associates, especially Soyong and Michael, went above and beyond for me. They were not just my legal team, they were people who genuinely cared about my well-being and success. They exceeded every expectation I had, and I will forever be so so grateful for the way they showed up for me during one of the hardest times in my life.

If you’re hesitant, if you’re unsure, or if you’ve only ever thought of lawyers the way I used to, I cannot recommend Bridge Law & Associates enough. ♥️
Bridge law team has been working on my collision case for almost a year now. They are very helpful and take care of the whole process and do all the heavy lifting.

Recovering from a car accident injury is hard and finding the right group of people to legally represent my case made it even harder. I consider it a blessing to find Bridge Law to help me. After talking to Jimi Kim, their Senior Paralegal, and she accepted my case, i felt a huge relief. She was extremely friendly, focused to detail and explained everything i needed to know. Her team is exceedingly knowledgeable, responsive, passionate and gave their very best for me.  Soyong Soun, Paralegal,was in constant communication with me, guiding me along the way and making sure that all requirements were met, for a fair and favorable outcome. Soyong was awesome. For anyone seeking legal representation, that is efficient, reliable, compassionate and client-focused, Bridge Law is higly recommended and undoubtedly the perfect choice. Thank you Bridge Law for such a great experience.
I am grateful to Micheal and team for thier positive contribution to my life.

Excellent firm!! They are very professional and handle everything, all paperwork with the upmost care. They take care of everything you need, I wouldn’t go anywhere else. Great people and professionalism.

Michael Charbonneau aka Charb is one of the most active attorneys in his community. He spends time every single day helping fellow lawyers improve their practice and increase their knowledge, both substantively and procedurally. The Washington Plaintiff's Bar is simply better because he is a part of it. So are his clients' lives. I can't recommend him enough.
They were incredibly helpful and kept me informed, making sure I understood what was happening. I highly recommend them to anyone in need of a personal injury attorney!

Soyong was spectacular in her engagement when my daughter got rear ended on the freeway near Seattle.   Soyong was very responsive and efficient how she handled the various aspects of our case.   I very much appreciate how she defined every step of the way to insure each legal step was communicated to my daughter and myself.   I definitely admire and recommend Soyong and Bridge Law going forward.   Thank you so much!!!

As a driver who was the victim of a car accident for the first time, I felt completely confused and overwhelmed, not knowing what to do. However, Bridge Personal Injury Law, PC provided incredible support, making me feel reassured throughout the entire process. Paralegal Soyong went above and beyond, always providing clear and prompt answers to any questions I had.
Accidents are an unexpected part of life, and while this experience was stressful, I am truly grateful for how well they handled my case and brought it to a successful resolution. I would highly recommend this office to anyone dealing with the aftermath of a car accident.

I got help with my accident case through Bridge Law, and I want to express my gratitude to Dave, the case manager, who assisted us. From the day of the accident to the day the case was resolved, he supported us with genuine care and dedication. Thanks to his efforts, we were able to successfully resolve a case that we would have struggled to handle on our own.

If you have any issues related to car accidents, I highly recommend Bridge Law.

Once again, I would like to extend my heartfelt thanks to Bridge Law, their staff, and especially to Dave for all their help.

Soyong and her team helped me exceptionally. She kept in contact, always answering any questions I had with no fuss or stress. They really made dealing with my accident way better than anyone else could have. Thank you Soyong and everyone at Bridge Personal Injury Law!

I suffered physical and mental damage due to the negligence of an unlicensed party, and was introduced to Soyoung Soung, the office manager at Bridge Law, through a friend. Thank you for helping me win my case, especially with all the legal hurdles, hospitalization, physical therapy, and insurance issues. I was especially impressed by the professionalism and dedication to my client's well-being during my consultation with Attorney Michael Chardonneau. I also deeply appreciate Soyoung's meticulous explanations, attention to detail, and constant communication with me about the progress of my case. Once again, I sincerely thank everyone at Bridge Law for their time and effort. 👍👍👍

I got into a bad car accident with my parents out of state and everyone at the Bridge Law Firm were extremely helpful, supportive, and assuring. I appreciate the help, it was a blessing!
reviews.ownerResponse: Our pleasure.

reviews.text: Evan Loeffler is an outstanding attorney — very experienced, knowledgeable, strategic, and reliable. Even while transitioning firms, he kept everything on track and filed on time. He explains things clearly, brings a smart strategy, and knows how to handle tough situations with confidence. I strongly recommend him for anyone dealing with eviction, lease issues, or other landlord–tenant matters. His dedication and professionalism truly stand out.

I was referred to this firm by a client and 2 weeks later not a si gle response from them.
Perhaps changing your automatic messged to say we are to busy and will not respond would be better. I let my client who highly recommended them that I was never contacted.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Jean — thank you for taking the time to leave this feedback. You’re right to expect a timely response, even when we’re not the right firm for a matter.

We missed closing the loop here, and that’s on us. Our standard is to acknowledge every inquiry and let people know where they stand, and we didn’t meet that standard in your case.

I’m sorry for the frustration this caused you and for the position it put you in with your client. If you’d like, you’re welcome to contact me directly so I can follow up personally.

— Paul Veillon, Galileo Law

reviews.text: Having an incredible attorney when you are fighting for what is right is crucial. I was referred to Galileo by a client and will definitely recommend them to anyone that needs attorney. The communication and feedback was at a perfect cadence and I got everything I asked for and some. Thank you for being the best!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Jamie — that means a lot! It was a pleasure working with you, and I’m glad the communication and pacing felt right throughout the process. Wishing you nothing but good things ahead.

reviews.text: I am extremely grateful to Paul for his outstanding work handling my car accident case. He was professional, knowledgeable, and attentive throughout the entire process. Paul clearly explained every step, handled all communications with the insurance company, and made the whole experience smooth and stress-free. The outcome exceeded my expectations. I highly recommend Paul to anyone who needs legal help after a car accident.

Paul and his team worked miracles with my case. They helped me establish care with a myriad of medical specialists, handled all communication with insurance reps, managed my case aligned with my goals, and kept me up-to-date with regular check-ins. Because of their expertise, I was able to focus on healing from my injuries, and my case resulted in the highest payment I could've received from the insurance company. I would highly recommend Galileo Law, PLLC, to anyone experiencing personal injury after an accident.
Trusted this law firm for help and they excellent.
