The Galileo Law team, Paul and Kamber, expertly navigated a complex case that I faced; and through their efforts, we were able to get a surprisingly happy outcome despite how hopeless I felt the situation was before I reached out to them.

Thank you Galileo Law!

Although my case wasn't the right fit, Galileo was quite kind in their specfic actions and resources to resolve my matter.  The most telling thing was in their email, "you don't need to pay us to do this."   While I never hope to be in the situation of having a totaled car, if I ever did, I would engage Galileo.  Thank you!

Paul managed my diminished value claim to resolution, dealing with the at-fault party's insurance (which was under insured, making things more challenging) and my own insurance and got them to settle. The process, save for some initial homework and the outcome was pretty much the best case scenario for me.

I fully recommend Paul's services. Just beware that you need to be armed with patience to see a DV claim through.

Cannot recommend them enough. The entire team was incredibly helpful and answered all our questions throughout the process no matter how big or small. Through a difficult and complicated situation they were always on top of the shifts and turns and stood by us every step of the way. If you are looking for a reliable and on top of it law team they are it.
Paul and Kamber make an amazing team! I was in a motorcycle accident and luckily stumbled upon them on Google. I hired them right away, and they were incredibly helpful in handling my case.

When I was involved in a car accident in 2019, I was referred to Galileo Law. Paul and his staff took the stress out of dealing with insurance post-accident and made sure I was heard and knew of my options. They helped advocate for my best interests and made sure I received the necessary care for my injuries. It was a long 4-year process due to the medical treatments I required, but the outcome exceeded my expectations, having never gone through something like this before. Paul was great to work with and I’ve already referred a friend to him and would recommend his firm to anyone who needs use of his services.

Earlier this year my son was in a major accident with his vehicle that was immediately determined by the police to not being his fault. His insurance company was not being timely or cooperative when it came to dealing with repairs/replacement. We felt like we were being completely stonewalled. When we contacted Paul, he responded promptly to us. His advise to contact the State Insurance Commission, as well as suggesting appropriate wording and terms to use, resulted in a prompt response back from his insurance company and eventually brought our case to a mutual close. Paul was very timely working with us and his knowledge of the insurance profession and his professional advise helped us reach a successful resolution of our issue with the insurance company. I would highly recommend Paul at Galileo Law if you are dealing with vehicle accident insurance issues.

Paul helped me back in 2015 when I got in a collision with a person running a red light. It was the very first time I had to hire an attorney for a car accident. I wasn't sure what to expect, but after my first consultation and first in person meet with him I knew I was in good hands. He told me to focus on my recovery and he will handle the rest, and we did just that. So when I was, yet again, hit by a reckless driver last year, I knew who to call and just like the las time he took care of my case with care and compassion. I highly recommend Paul for his above and beyond approach in handling my case.

Paul was recommended to me by another attorney that I know.  He said he believed Paul was one of the best in the State at the type of law he practices.
I was able to get an appointment to meet him right away.  He was honest and clear with how he thought I should proceed.  It was always easy to reach him when I had questions.
I am very happy with the results I got while being his client.  His advice is excellent and to be trusted.

Paul was very communicative and thorough and we are so very thankful for the expertise and time spent helping my 91 year old father with his personal injury claim.  We are very glad that we chose Galileo Law and we recommend Paul highly.

Paul was very professional and knowledgeable about motor vehicle damage, diminished value, navigating opposing insurance claims, and estimator/body shop contacts in the Seattle area. He is able to take cases that only involve property damage without medical claims, unlike some other offices; however Paul actually was able to cleanly map out the steps to resolve my issue on a new Mercedes AMG GT, with the other party completely at fault but their insurance unwilling to fully cover, entirely within the initial free consultation meeting without taking on the case.
Impressive, highly recommend and would work with again.

I decided to hire Paul after a free consultation for my case where I was a victim of an accident by a drunk driver. I am very happy with the decision. Most attorneys only took cases involving a bodily injury but Paul took the case even without bodily injury.
He was very professional, responsive and communicative throughout the case. He answered all my questions patiently.
This guy just never responds.  Maybe he's too busy?!
reviews.ownerResponse: Matt, we apologize for not having gotten back to you. Your assessment is accurate. We have an exceptionally high demand for our services and a commitment to communicate with our current clients and diligently and expeditiously prosecute their cases. From time to time that limits our ability to respond to potential inquiries. We regret that, we do not accept it, and we appreciate your frustration. Again, my apologies.

reviews.text: If you are looking for a lawyer to fight a diminished value case, Mr. Paul Galileo should be a top candidate on your search list. When it comes to legal service, specialty and experience is of vital importance. Paul is one of the few attorneys in Seattle area who knows how to file a claim for your property damage (in my case it was a very new sport car) and get the best of it. On top it, Paul has been very responsive and communicated each major update throughout the entire process. I am content with the outcome and would recommend Paul.

After being injured in an auto accident, my choice to call Paul was clear. My girlfriend was represented successfully by Paul and Galileo Law after an auto accident in the past. Paul, with his associates led me toward the proper medical attention to start my healing. I’m very thankful to Galileo Law for easing my stress from not being able to work and guiding me in terms that were understandable. In the end, the settlement Paul was able to obtain for me exceeded my expectations. I would not hesitate to hire Paul and his team to represent me in the future.
Filed a diminished value claim after my Porsche was involved in a fender bender.  Was pleased with the level of service, and professionalism from Galileo in explaining my options.

I found Paul and his team to be incredibly professional, thorough, and responsive. Paul's effort to keep me up speed on the progress of case was fantastic. I don't know how he does it,  I guess he must not sleep but he is always so prompt and informative. I would 100% recommend Paul. You'll be lucky to experience someone with such professionalism.

Paul and his staff were amazing. My case had some complications, but they continued to fight for me. We received the best possible outcome and I would highly recommend them to anyone who is in need of their services.

Paul and team provided responsive service and advice during a diminished value and loss of use claim and were able to work with all parties to find a decent outcome. I appreciated their help navigating this complicated situation.

Am very pleased with Paul Veillon and his team.  Very professional, responsive, and provided realistic expectations.  My claim was for Loss of Use and Diminished Value, and the outcome was exactly as he predicted.

Paul's meticulous attention to detail, sincere belief in making sure that his clients are taken care of, and principled approaches to personal injury claims are assuring to the extent that I believe once he takes on an accident/injury claim, the client will be well advised and well represented.
My experience with Paul and staff was all positive.  I quickly learned insurance companies do not help you and you need a good attorney and Paul is one I will refer others to in the future.

Couldn't be happier with the outcome of my case!
These guy's are a class act!
Paul and all his staff were extremely helpful with my case. I am very happy with the outcome and would highly recommend their services.
Paul and his staff at Galileo Law did an amazing job for me. The communication was great and Paul always made himself available for questions about my case. I highly recommend them.
Your whole team has been awesome, diligent and persistent through the entire process. Outcome was better than expected

I had questions regarding a diminished value auto claim and spoke to attorney Paul Veillon.  He took the time to give me advice on the process and in talking to him I realized I also had another claim I could pursue.  In pursuing the other claim I reached out to him again and he gave me excellent advice once again, all free of charge.  It's so refreshing to talk to an attorney who is honest and helpful.

I had recently used Paul and his team w/ my automobile that had taken place in January 2018. I bought the car brand new 2 weeks prior to getting in the accident and the auto body shop that I took my car to (Paramount Centre in Fife) highly recommended his work. They had nothing but good things to say for Paul and I knew that was a great lawyer due to how well the shop was known. Paul always kept me up to date on the process of everything and if I know anyone in need of a lawyer for any kind of accident I will recommend him no questions asked. Also he has great references for diminished value claims as well. Will use him again if anything in the future happens.

I'm very impressed with Paul and his team... My new sedan which I had saved up for several years to purchase was rear-ended in less than a few months of owning it. I attempted to work directly with the other party's insurance to recoup my losses, but was unsuccessful. I sought Paul out based on a personal recommendation, and he delivered results much faster than I anticipated. I will say it can be intimidating seeking out council, however I never felt pressured in my decisions, and was well-informed of everything pertinent to my case. I'm very satisfied with the results and to be moving forward.

My case was tricky and had mounds of medical paperwork to review. Paul and his epic team sorted it all out and put what they needed together in order to get the end goal I was hoping for. It took longer than expected, start to finish, but very well worth it. All of my questions were answered in a timely manner, I was guided through the process and am excited my chiropractor gave me his card!

I recently was invloed in an auto accident. My car was rear ended by a van in I-5 freeway. I bought my car new and it was only 4 months when the accident happened. The insurance Co. was being difficult and I was very sad because my new car was damaged. I contacted Paul and He was very helpful. He explained all my options.  I have to say he is very patient and understanding person and excellent communicator. He helped to get an excellent settlement from the insurance Co.  I am very glad to have such an attorney. I recommend Paul to anyone whom is involved in an auto accident and needs a great attorney.

Paul Veillon is very professional.  After the trauma of a car accident in which another driver was at fault the LAST thing I wanted to do was deal with the insurance adjusters.  Paul took over for me and handled everything professionally.  He settled the case in a timely matter and communicated very clearly along the way.  I highly recommend Paul and Galileo Law.

Last year I was in an accident that badly damaged my 2 month old SUV.  After significant repairs it was clear that the value of my vehicle had been greatly reduced by the severity of the crash.   On the advice of a friend I asked Paul to review my diminished value claim.  He clearly explained the process to me, and advocated on my behalf.  In short order he was able to extract a settlement that was easily 3 times what I would have received if I had worked alone.  During this process he answered my questions promptly and kept me informed as things progressed.  If you have a vehicle that has been damaged in an accident and seen the residual value decrease, I would strongly recommend you contact Paul.  He is one of the foremost experts in this area of the law.
Refreshing to get honest advice from an attorney and not feel like you need to take a shower afterwards. Paul is a stand up guy and I certainly appreciated speaking with him.

I was so impressed with how Paul and team handled my first case, that when I was hit a second time it was a no-brainer who I was going to call for personal injury representation. He was so good that I followed him from his old practice to his new one. Personal injury claims can be a long drawn out process and it is very important to have an attorney that clearly lays out a timeframe (we are human, we want a sense of time) and educates you on what is fair and what a reasonable expectation of outcome might look like. I was fortunate enough to have hit the expectation mark twice with Paul’s team so to say I am very satisfied with his services would be an understatement. While I hope to never need his services again, in the event I do, I will have Paul and team on speed dial. Thank you Paul for your consistentcy and for your availability. I never felt out of the loop.

PS - Paul lowered his attorney fee to ensure we hit my target before we even discussed final numbers. This is a gesture that has gotten lost in today’s world. We never had a “This isn’t fair” conversation because being fair is whats most important to Paul. Thank you again Paul and team.

Darrnell

I had a great experience with Paul and his team at Galileo Law.  My new GMC Sierra Denali was broadsided by an inattentive driver pulling out of a strip mall.  After extensive damage repair, which took over almost 2 months, I claimed diminished value against the other parties insurance company.  However, the offer they made was nowhere near the diminished value amount that was assessed by a qualified expert.  I contacted Paul and he took the time to explain the process to my satisfaction.  He answered emails promptly, followed up phone calls and took care of all the details necessary to prepare the case for a favorable verdict.  In the end, he was able to get a settlement for more than double their original offer without ever going to court.  I highly recommend Paul and his team and have no reservations about recommending him to all my friends or to anyone that asks.

Nothing but negative experiences from this lawyer. Doesn’t care about his clientele and wants them to suffer in the process of their auto accident injury claim. Paul Veillon didn’t have compassion that comes necessary when a person has lost everything from two car accidents. His method is take his sweet time for settlements and not an action based lawyer. He thinks that people need to wait forever to get a fair settlement. I highly recommend staying away from this law group as they can’t deal with clients that are disabled and living on fixed income. Expecting them to wait for answers or not even asking what settlement is possible at this exact moment is something a lawyer should be trying to contact the claims adjusters. I now am in the process of finding another lawyer who wants me to feel like I matter instead of complaining I bring up these concerns everytime I get bad news from doctors. I do what is asked and rack thousands of medical bills and for what an attorney thst isn't talking to my claims adjusters to get money for me. What's the point of a lawyer that sits around and does nothing anyone can do it. Paul's efforts are as lazy as a sloth and the most uncompassionate greedy lawyer I have ever met.
reviews.ownerResponse: I acknowledge Sean’s perspective. Without breaching confidentiality, I can only say that our firm was not a good fit for his case. We’ve made a good faith effort to help him find another attorney who may be a better fit. I can say that we care deeply about his pain and circumstances. I can say the same thing about everyone we try to help. I regret that Sean feels that our firm is “lazy” and “greedy.” I take ownership for not communicating well enough with him about how much we valued his confidence to engage our services. We honestly wish him the best in both his recovery from his serious injuries and his pursuit of justice from the insurance carriers responsible for compensating him for his losses. I have a duty to say no more - precisely because I value his pursuit for justice.

reviews.text: My Tesla got squished by an airport shuttle car driver. His insurance company was a pain to deal with, but In the end I got paid for my diminished value and loss of use. They got the job done, simple as that.

I tried to negotiate with the insurance company myself and got nowhere it was getting stressful then I contacted Paul he handled my case keeping me informed of any changes he also got my more money for my diminished value on my truck then I would have expected. I will use him any time if  I have another accident.
Excellent team! The staff at Galileo Law were very thorough. They provided great advice and preparation as well as quickly answering my emails and phone calls. They truly care about their clients.

My Ferrari got in a small accident 1 month after I purchased it. I am so glad I contacted Paul at Galileo Law. He took my phone call and gathered all the information. Everything from that point on he took care and kept me informed every step of the way. He cared about my vehicle and made sure it was put back even better then before with genuine Ferrari parts and the newer clear bra protection. During the repair he had my vehicle picked up and delivered back to my home. He also won diminished value and loss of use. If I could add an additional star I would since my experience was better then 5 of 5 stars.

Paul and his team at Galileo Law are excellent! I was kept in the loop through the whole process. My emails were answered quickly, and I truly felt like Paul understood and CARED about my situation. I highly recommend Galileo Law!

Corrie was so quick and responsive throughout our case.
She fought for our rights and without her help we would still be struggling to seek justice.  Her diligence, understanding and swift actions are unmatched and we are eternally grateful for her help in resolving our case.

Words will never express my gratitude to Corrie and her team. I had a complex case that took 5 years to settle with a doctor and several manufactures. Corrie and her team through the years kept me informed at all times; through email, phone calls and mail. They are “NOT” in it for the money as most law offices are, you become family. If you are looking for someone to hold your hand every step of the way, which I am assuming we all are or we wouldn’t need an attorney, then Corrie and her team will be your best choice hands down. Thank you Corrie for guiding me through my life changing event, I truly appreciate you all.
She's great.  Extremely competent, responsive, and efficient.  Very easy to communicate with.

I’m not sure how I got so
Lucky to have Corrie as my attorney but she is a diamond in the rough. Not only did she fight for me, she went above and beyond by attending every hearing even if not required. She answered my questions all time of the day because she knew how stressed out I was. We finally won our case thanks to her. She truly cares about her clients and not the money. I owe her tons. Hire her if you need a personal injury attorney. You can’t go wrong.
When you want the very best, hire Corrie.

Jay and Janet are amazing people and exceptional attorneys. Jay is very patient, stays in constant communication, and is swift at addressing issues with your claim manager. I would absolutely recommend Kinney Law Group to anyone needing an attorney. Thank you Jay and Janet for allways making me feel heard and important. Along with successfully navigating my LNI claim to the end.

Mr. Kinney went above and beyond the call of duty to speak with me, almost immediately, and answer my very time-sensitive questions.  He also took the time to speak with my husband and I, multiple times, to provide us with an appropriate referral.

I want to thank you Kinney Law Group
For helping me with my case and being able to earn a pension for life. My family and I are deeply grateful for your support
Thanks Jay C. Kinney and Janet E. Usellis

Thank you, Jay Kinney for taking the time to help me with my disability questions!  After speaking with many attorneys who wouldn't give me the time of day, you actually took time to talk with me!  Your help was incredibly valuable to me!  I appreciate you so much!  Thank you for your human kindness and treating me with respect!  I highly recommend you!
Annette Limbo

Over Christmas I was looking for a local BI attorney to help me condo tenant issues. Mr. Kinney opened his office and sat down with me to hear  me out about the tenant problem, and offer his insight about how to proceed. Although tenant issues was not his area of legal practice, I very much appreciated the pro bono general advice toward finding other legal representation.

Mr Kinney is a super good guy. He works as a moral, caring, human and never strayed from that. He was always available and got back to me when he said he would. I find this trait admirable in not only an attorney but in the majority of professionals today. I was so fortunate to have him on my side!
Mr. Kinney has been a great attorney. He's experienced, he has does what it takes to win my case and is empathetic towards me and my disability making it a priority to win for me.
He is the very best attorney I have ever had.

Mr. Jay Kinney is one of the Best Attorneys in the state of WASHINGTON and probably the USA. I have extraordinarily good reason to state this, after a several year battle with the company that I was with. He is a Professional at this.It just doesn't get any better. Always communicating; either by phone, email or; a good old fashion letter.

Thank You
Sincerely,
Ron Alger

I was very pleased with the outcome of my personal injury lawsuit. Kinney Law Group is so professional and experienced that it made the process manageable for me during a very stressful time.  I highly recommend the firm and the partners.

Called this group regarding a friends concern with their disability benefits, and not only did I get one of the named partners, I was given a consultation that helped me with my friends case. Thank you for not just answering your calls but going above and beyond and helping folks in need.

This firm can help  you.

My husband Frank  was injured badly 15 years ago, We would highly recommend Mr. J Kinney . Frank says, I had no worries after Mr. Jay Kinney  Took my case. I really get a loss for words to try and tell you how much security and such a safe feeling I had knowing Jay is there to help me with anything that  that came up  .Even to this day if I get a letter from Social Security,Disability he is right there to take care of it all.   I give him over  And  above. a. 5 STAR +

Mr. Kinney has been my attorney since 1997. He has always been very professional and available throughout the years.

Having had 17 different surgeries Mr. Kinney was always there working on my behalf. I always felt confident that if I had questions or doubts,
Mr. Kinney would have answers and be reassuring .

He gave us , my Wife and I, the Gift of peace of mind.

He is deeply appreciated and will always be considered a friend.

Thank You

Rich and Paula Baker

Jay Kinney came into our Life in 1983.  My Husband Mike had suffered a bad Back injury at his job in 1982.  Jay was a "God send" as we were already wore out dealing with State Industrial.  Jay was incredible!  His knowledge was never ending in all ways.  He went thru it all with us.

Battling everyone to protect and care for us and our 2 young Son's.  It took mega year's to see it all to a end, including him taking on Social Security for Mike's Benefits, and winning Mikes Pension from the State!  Jay battled and accomplish getting both done and secured for us.  Jay stuck with us thru it all!

He is a very Intelligent Attorney.  A very Caring and Compassionate Man.  I can not imagine what it would of been like without his being right there for anything we needed.
We can not recommend a better Firm then Jay Kinney's.  You and your Family could not be in better hands then his.
Sincerely,
Michael & Mary Pitts

It's been my great pleasure to be a very satisfied and cared for client at Kinney law group .
Jay Kinney is a consumate expert with more than 35 years experience in the letter of the law for personal injuries at work .  My complicated case has been personally handled by Kinney law group for well over 10 years resulting in very well managed medical care ,  benefits in the form of a very positive settlement with a large local government entity and peace of mind for me knowing I am very well respected well taken care of.   I am one extremely happy client .
You absolutely will be pleased with the representation you will receive from Jay's firm .
I unabashedly recommend Jay's expert and kind representation for anyone hurt on the job .
You really can't do better .   I'm so happy I asked for his help ,  I've never been treated better .

Mr. Jay Kinney - Attorney - Yes we put 5 stars, and yes this office is that good. My husband and I have known him over 30+ years - whenever something needs legal attention  ,  Mr. Kinney  is called . Now the Kinneylawgroup  we trust and are glad to see this addition for more people to have access to !  Here you can have answers that you can rely on . Mr. Jay Kinney and his office have wisdom + follow through on each detail , in short  when a person needs legal help or advice both my husband and I recommend only one attorney's office , the Kinneylawgroup  !

I worked with Melanie for almost three years and I couldn't have asked for a better lawyer to have to help me threw the process of everything she is very up front and helps you understand everything that is going on. Melanie is very kind and caring about your case that is happening and tries to make the process as easy as she can I would definitely recommend her to anyone that needs a lawyer if you are looking for someone that is thorough but also kind compassionate and caring she is the lawyer for you! She truly takes her time to listen to everything you have to say and explain everything I cant thank her enough for everything she has done for me and my family.

Working with Melanie with my family's case has been amazing. She has became part of our family. We have worked with her for almost 3 years now. She has always been clear with every process we had to go through. She really cares about her clients and wants to make sure her clients get justice and feels at peace when their cases are closed. The people at Stritmatter Law care about their community.

One of the best decisions I have made is hiring Stritmatter Law, Brad Moore and his team are incredible to work with. I was treated with so much kindness and compassion they kept me in the loop every step of the way. What I did not expect is the genuine care they put into my case. I felt heard and cared for throughout the entire process. Furhad took the time to get to me as a person before and after my accident. They worked around my busy chaos of a schedule to gather the information they needed and took all the heavy lifting off my plate so I could just focus on healing and getting back to my business. It was such a good experience in what was one of the hardest years of my life. I was happy just to be supported however they secured every single penny available in my settlement, that was an incredible surprise. I am over the moon impressed with this team. Definitely hire this firm you will not regret it.

I can’t say enough great things about Mo Hamoudi and his amazing team. Mo is engaging, kind, and truly cares about his clients. He kept us informed every step of the way, made everything simple and stress-free, and actually made the process enjoyable. His support staff was just as wonderful—professional, responsive, and always on top of things. After a disappointing experience with another firm, finding Mo and his team was the best decision we could have made. Highly recommend!

Gemma and Andrew at Stritmatter did an incredible job with our case. they kept us in the loop with the entire process, and went above and beyond on research and working to get the best result possible. If you want a professional lawyer to handle your case with care, go to these guys!

Stritmatter Law is a great firm! Mo was incredible. Very patient explaining each step of the process, really good about giving updates on where things are at and is a real bulldog for his clients. His team of Kristin and Rory are also amazing. Very happy with the expertise and service! Highly recommend.

After having a difficult experience with another firm, we turned to Mo Hamoudi at Stritmatter Law — and it was the best decision we could have made. From the very beginning, Mo came in with passion, compassion, and a genuine commitment to our case. He immediately gave us confidence that we were finally in good hands.

Mo was thorough, professional, and incredibly responsive, always taking the time to explain every step of the process. He truly cared about us as people, not just as clients, and fought hard to ensure we received the outcome we deserved. His dedication and compassion made a stressful situation so much easier to get through.

We are beyond grateful for Mo and the entire team at Stritmatter Law. I would highly recommend Mo Hamoudi to anyone who needs an attorney who will truly fight for them while also showing empathy and understanding.

I could not of ask for a better team of people to be on my side. Every one of them go the extra mile to get the job done and get results. Gemma, Andrew, Jamie. All great. Highly recommend. Truly believe we Walked out with better results than we could have found anywhere else!! They absolutely care and will help
Supportive, effective, and epically compassionate.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your wonderful review! We're delighted to know that you found our team supportive and compassionate during your experience. Your kind words truly motivate us to continue providing effective service. If there's ever anything more we can do for you, feel free to reach out!

reviews.text:
It is a fact of modern life that if you are injured under certain circumstances,  the only way to be fairly compensated is to hire a personal injury attorney..
Brad Moore came highly recommend to me by an attorney friend, and I am so thankful I was able to have Brad and his team represent me.
The process is a long and arduous one.  Brad was always available to answer questions, even when he was on international trips he took the time to respond in a timely fashion.
Brad and his team went overboard to be kind and helpful,  and after all was said and done, I was fairly compensated for my injuries.
In this society,  where there is so much anger aimed at the legal profession,  it is wonderful to know that there are honorable, kind and trustworthy attorneys.  Brad Moore is such a person.  You will be lucky if he takes you on as a client.
reviews.ownerResponse: We're incredibly grateful for your thoughtful review! 😊 It means a lot to us that Brad and his team could provide the support and care you needed throughout the process.

reviews.text: Ed Moore, an attorney with the Stritmatter Law Firm would tirelessly on behalf of my wife Betsy and myself to guide us through the very long process of a medical malpractice suit. Ed was attentive to our needs and understanding of the mental and physical trauma we experienced. He helped us through each step of the process, gathered professional witnesses, and prepared a rock-solid case that led to a very satisfactory settlement. I highly recommend Ed Moore and his firm for legal services.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words and positive feedback. We are thrilled to hear about your satisfactory experience with our legal services. Our team is dedicated to supporting our clients through every step of the process, and your recommendation is greatly appreciated. We are glad to have been of assistance during such a challenging time for you and your wife. Please do not hesitate to reach out if you need any further assistance in the future.

reviews.text: Ed Moore was recommended by another attorney as being a top notch lawyer.  After losing our mother in a rehab facility, Ed represented us in a wrongful death suit. He did a great job of communicating with us throughout the 4 yr case. He valued our opinions and judgement but made excellent recommendations throughout the process. Ed has been thoughtful, kind, compassionate, and determined to get the best outcome the whole way.  He has been very supportive as well.  I would unequivocally recommend him as the finest honest attorney I have ever met. His cost were fair and didn’t penny pinch us in any way. I can not thank him enough!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your thoughtful and kind words. We are deeply grateful for your trust in us during such a difficult time. It's heartwarming to hear that Ed was able to provide the support and guidance you needed throughout the process. We always strive to uphold the highest standards of service and compassion, and your feedback confirms that commitment. Please know that we are here for you, should you need anything in the future.

reviews.text: Gemma Zanowski represented me years ago for a not at fault car accident that resulted in surgery. She was passionate about advocating for my rights to compensation and medical care coverage and successfully negotiated an out of court settlement, in which I received the highest limit of compensation. From day one, she made me feel comfortable, supported, and empowered. She was incredibly easy to work with- thorough, efficient, easily accessible, incredibly knowledgeable within her field, and to boot she showed empathy and understanding towards me during a really hard time. She made what I thought would be an intimidating process as easy and stress free as possible. Fast forward to now and I have been in another not at fault car accident resulting in surgery. Gemma has encouraged me to advocate for myself and yet again successfully navigated me through the insurance settlement process. I cannot say enough wonderful things about Gemma. She has truly gone above and beyond for me through these past couple months and I owe her my deepest thanks. I am thankful for an outlet to provide my highest recommendation without reservation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience with us. We are thrilled to hear that you felt supported and empowered throughout the process. Our goal is to ensure that our clients feel comfortable and informed while we advocate diligently on their behalf. It's wonderful to know that Gemma was able to assist you effectively and that she provided the empathy and understanding needed during a challenging time. We appreciate your recommendation and are grateful for your trust in us. Please don't hesitate to reach out if you need any further assistance in the future.

reviews.text:
My wife and I were involved in a rear-end collision in August, 2023.  The car was destroyed several times over, and we could have been killed, but miraculously our injuries were not life-threatening .  Ray Kahler, of the Stritmatter Firm, agreed to represent us, and he devoted the same level of attention to our case as he would to a case that was worth hundreds of thousands of dollars.
Ray was most helpful in identifying soft-tissue injuries that can develop months after an accident.  In particular, he noted that my carpal tunnel injury, which turned up months after the collision, was likely caused by the hyper extension of my wrist when my hand grabbed the door handle at the  moment of impact.
I am a university professor, and before retiring, I taught legal ethics at the University of San Diego for more than twenty years.   One of the ethical maxims I stressed with my students was the importance of client centered representation.  Mr. Kahler fulfilled this maxim to a T.  He discussed every aspect of our case with me and my wife, and he gave excellent advice born of years of legal practice.  I recommend Ray Kahler without qualification.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your wonderful review! We are so glad to hear that you and your wife are recovering well after your accident. Our team takes great pride in providing each client with the utmost attention and dedication, regardless of the circumstances. It's fantastic to know that Ray's efforts in identifying your injuries were helpful and that his advice was valuable to you. We truly appreciate your recommendation and wish you both continued health and happiness. If you ever need assistance in the future, please don't hesitate to reach out.

reviews.text: Our experience with this firm and the attorneys that worked with us was amazing.  They understood how sensitive and private our situation was to us.  The legal process can be cold and drawn out.  The years these people put into our case will never be forgotten.  We never felt like a number or case file.  We were treated with respect and dignity through the entire process.  Our questions were always answered quickly and with detailed explanation.  When we would get frustrated and feeling defeated, they continued to work to protect us.  Hours and hours of research were put in to give us the best possible outcome.  This did not go unnoticed by us and we will forever be grateful for each person who gave of themselves in so many ways to give us the protection we could not provide to ourselves.  We learned so much about the legal system that we did not know.  The most disturbing part of this process is the knowledge that other legal counsel can lie, manipulate the evidence and be just plain disrespectful.  This law firm was able to maintain all their integrity, always working with honor and true admirable poise while conducting business.  We truly hope that we never need their expertise again in this manner but anyone who does will be in great hands with them.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words, Mike. We are thrilled to hear about your positive experience with our firm and attorneys. Your satisfaction and trust mean the world to us. We are honored to have been able to support you through this sensitive time and provide the best possible outcome for your case. Please know that we are always here for you should you ever need our help again. Take care.

reviews.text: Utterly and painfully incompetent. Refuses to do the bare minimum in due diligence and will leave you broken and in debt. A pitiful excuse for a practice

Ray was very easy to work with. He was thoughtful, patient, understanding and thorough.  With a very difficult situation, he made me feel supported with his follow through and prompt communication.  I would highly recommend his services!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us, Brandon! We're delighted to hear that Ray was able to provide you with such excellent support during a difficult time. Your recommendation means a lot to us!

reviews.text: I wish I could give them more stars . They truly went above and beyond for my family. Andrew and his team are absolutely amazing. They don’t treat u just as a client they treat you as family. They kept in contact with me and went over everything with me so that i understood what was happing during my whole case. reviews.text: The attorneys at Stritmatter were top shelf.  Karen Koehler and Furhad Sultani, the two attorneys were kind, meticulous and provided excellent representation.  Katie Green, the paralegal was on top of everything and was a conduit of information for me. The whole team guided me through a long and difficult process with the utmost care and compassion.  In addition, I was incredibly impressed by Karen during mediation.  Karen's experience was first and foremost.  She knew the judge and was familiar the opposition counsel.  Karen and Furhad made an all day ordeal palatable and the result was far better than anything that I was expecting.  This is where I found out why Karen is referred to as the "Velvet Hammer".  You want Karen on your side!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words. We're proud to have been part of your journey to justice.

reviews.text:
I cannot express enough how grateful I am for the exceptional legal support provided by Melanie Nguyen from the law firm of Stritmatter, Kessler, Koehler, Moore. Facing the aftermath of a devastating accident that threatened to upend our lives, my family and I were overwhelmed and unsure of where to turn. Melanie's unwavering dedication, expertise, and compassion truly made all the difference.

From the outset, Melanie demonstrated a deep understanding of our situation and a genuine commitment to securing the best possible outcome for us. Her tireless advocacy and attention to detail were evident every step of the way, providing us with much-needed reassurance during a time of immense stress and uncertainty.

In addition to Melanie's outstanding legal support, I must also commend Rory, (paralegal to Melanie and my shoulder to cry on ). Her responsiveness and empathy throughout this journey. Her updates and support were invaluable, and I am forever grateful for her kindness and understanding.

Together, Melanie and Rory went above and beyond to guide us through one of the most challenging periods of our lives. Their professionalism, dedication, and genuine care exceeded our expectations, and we feel incredibly fortunate to have had them by our side.

As we move forward, I am filled with gratitude for Melanie and Rory's unwavering support. They have not only helped us secure the compensation we deserved but also provided us with a sense of hope and reassurance for the future.

I wholeheartedly recommend Melanie Nguyen and the team at Stritmatter, Kessler, Koehler, Moore to anyone in need of legal representation. Their exceptional service and support have truly made a difference in our lives.

Thank you once again, Melanie and Rory, for everything you've done for us. You have our prayers, deepest gratitude and respect.

My best regards,

Tim
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for sharing your heartfelt experience with Melanie Nguyen and Rory. We are profoundly touched by your words and grateful for the trust you placed in our team during such a challenging time.

reviews.text: Furhad and his team took my car accident case in 2020. It was a messy case with multiple cars involved, stubborn insurance companies, and exorbitant medical bills in a post-covid environment where legal cases were extremely backed-up and behind schedule. Furhad was so friendly, relatable and thorough throughout my case, making sure I understood each step. He was also an encouraging and grounding presence during stressful points in the case like my deposition. He was always updating me with any new information about the case. I really appreciated his diligence in demanding action from insurance companies in a system designed to drag its feet and tempt you to give up. The results him and his team achieved for my case were FAR beyond what I expected and I’m so grateful I chose them to represent me. Karen was also an invaluable person to have on my side at this firm. She was extremely knowledgeable and is obviously highly respected by mediators and others in the legal system here. So happy to finally put my car accident behind me and not be robbed by insurance companies. I could not have done it without them.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your experience with Furhad, Karen, and our team. We appreciate your trust in us to navigate such complex challenges and are happy you are thrilled with the results.

reviews.text: Our 26 year old son was shot and killed by an Auburn WA officer on May 20, 2019. The time was drawing close to our 3 year statute of limitation to file a wrongful death case. Our family was at a rather low point at this time while we prayed continuously for a miracle and waited patiently for several investigations to be completed only to have nothing transpire from them. Then, I received an email from Gemma Zanowski. We had first met Gemma at our meeting with the Snohomish County Prosecutor where we would learn that charges would not be filed against the officer. We were so thrilled that Gemma had reached out to us and we asked if she would review our wrongful death case with her law firm? They agreed to take us on as clients and to represent us. Gemma was the answer to our many prayers. What a Godsend!! I cannot say enough kind words about Gemma! Aside from being a great lawyer, Gemma is a truly amazing genuinely caring person! Gemma is a rock star and super hero in our books for remembering our family and reaching out to us when our outlook was rather bleak. We had such an awesome team of lawyers working on our case. This team worked tirelessly on our family’s behalf. Krysta is an amazing paralegal that was laser focused on gathering information no matter where it was hidden; she left no rock unturned. Melanie is so smart, fearless, and strategic. Ed is a wealth of law knowledge and a deeply rooted spiritual person, which I was just in awe of! Furhad is an awesome people person that made you feel comfortable, always accessible, and just easy to speak with. It was not by chance that this law firm came into our lives when they did but rather a design from a more holier sphere. Our family entrusted our team of lawyers to work and fight on our behalf while allowing us to pick up the pieces that were shattered along the way and return to some form of normal life. They listened and believed us. They guided and helped us along the legal path of fighting injustice. They were professional, always accessible and upfront while being transparent with their findings. I can say on behalf of my family that Stritmatter Kessler Koehler Moore was the BEST LAW FIRM that could have represented us. I would recommend this law firm to all my dear family and friends. If you want the best legal representation, go with the best! No one else could have done what you did for us and for that our family will forever be grateful to you all. Thank you to infinity and beyond! May God bless and keep you all in his care.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are profoundly moved by your heartfelt review and grateful for the opportunity to represent your family during such a difficult period. Thank you for your kind words and for entrusting us with your case. May peace and strength be with you, and may your son's memory continue to inspire and guide us all.

reviews.text: My four daughters and I were very fortunate to have had the Stritmatter Kessler Koehler & Moore Firm represent us when we lost my husband suddenly in an accident. I am not sure that there is another firm out there that is as vigilant, knowledgeable and compassionate as this firm. Karen, Lisa, Kristin and the ENTIRE team at the firm took great care of us during this extremely emotional and confusing time. We were faced with geographical challenges since the lawsuit and the firm was in Washington State while we live in New York, but thanks to modern technology and zoom, that challenge was actually not an issue at all. Karen and Kristin treated me and my girls as if we were their very own family, always looking out for our best interest and making sure that we were comfortable with the process as it moved along. In the end, they were beyond successful at securing future financial security for my family since the loss of my husband, and I am forever grateful to them all for that. While we were extremely blessed to have had them as our attorneys, we are even more blessed to now have them as our friends.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Kim, we are deeply honored to have been able to represent you and your daughters during such a profoundly difficult time. Knowing that we could provide some comfort brings us immense satisfaction. We cherish the relationship that has developed between us and are grateful to be considered friends. reviews.text: I was in my intern year of residency when I was hit by a car, and both my arm and will was crushed. I was in already excruciating debt for med school and now facing another hundred thousand of medical bills.  Not to mention managing 80 hour work weeks and loads of documentation with one functioning arm.  I knew I needed a good lawyer. Brad Moore and his team believed in me and my case from the moment we met, as I believed in them.  And thanks to his team's determination and meticulous data gathering, I not only got enough to pay my medical bills but also for my pain and suffering. I could not be more happy with the result and will be eternally grateful.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for sharing your experience, Haley. We are truly honored to have been able to help you during such a difficult time. Your kind words mean a lot to all of us here at The Stritmatter Firm. We are grateful for the trust you placed in our team and are thrilled that we could achieve a positive outcome for you. If you ever need any legal assistance in the future, please don't hesitate to reach out. Best wishes to you on your continued recovery.

reviews.text:
I started with Gemma at another firm after a car accident. Since this wasn’t my first rodeo I needed someone good because I was screwed over by another firm previously (their lawyers got 12,000 and I got (4,000 for over 10,000 in damages and 10,000 in hospital and treatment bills). I found her because a Criminal Attorney referred me to her past firm. I started working with an attorney there and he introduced Gemma telling me she would play an important part in my case. However her light shined brighter than his as she was very communicative anytime there was any update at all. If there was no update she would still let me know. Gemma is very strong headed and disciplined in the best way. She’s transparent in everything about your case and outcomes. She really knows what she’s doing and I highly recommend her if you have been a victim and need justice and have faced Finacial damages. I started with Gemma in 2018 or 2019 and it is 2022 and I just received my second settlement of $XX,XXX.  Total settlement before attorney fees was $XXX,XXX
Gemma is a shark and has the best legal staff behind her. Furhad is some one I worked with and is exceptional in enthusiasm and organization. Gemma will follow up consistently with you if she needs something.
Because you are reading this seeking out an attorney I have some pieces of advise, sign with Gemma, trust the process and be patient. It takes a long time for these cases to come together with all the BS other insurance companies and their attorneys put you through.

reviews.text:
After suffering a catastrophic motor vehicle accident, we needed significant help. Emotions were high, and the thought of what would happen next weighed heavily on our family. Keith and Ray were experts in shepherding us through the complicated legal aspect of the lawsuit. Our lawsuit involved five different law practices and over ten different claimants. The complexities of our case were high. Keith and Ray were excellent at navigating the system and keeping us involved with every action.
Our children suffered complicated medical injuries and emotional trauma that required our constant attention.  We were absolutely overwhelmed with that, and words cannot express how much of a relief it was to simply hand over medical bills, paperwork, and insurance conversations to the team.  Thousands of questions arose over this process and Keith and Ray always promptly responded.  Having their support gave us the freedom to focus on my family’s healing.
We exchanged emails, had in-person meetings, and once the pandemic hit full steam, meetings were scheduled on Zoom. Keith and Ray were responsive to every request and question that we had. Every time we talked to them, they took massive amounts of stress and anxiety away from us. Ray and Keith fought hard to represent us professionally. They were able to secure the necessary funds that we needed to succeed in raising our family after their medical complications. They were able to guide us in a dark time in our life. We wish that this situation does not happen to anyone else, however, if it does we fully recommend them!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your experience with us after the catastrophic motor vehicle accident. We are grateful for your kind words and are glad that we could support you and your family during such a difficult time. Our team at The Stritmatter Firm is dedicated to providing expert guidance through the legal aspects of lawsuits and ensuring that our clients feel supported and informed every step of the way. Your trust in us means a lot, and we are truly honored to have been able to assist you. Please know that we are here for you and your family whenever you need us. Thank you again for your recommendation.

reviews.text:
For a very long (five years) time, the Stritmatter law firm represented us in our personal injury lawsuit against Washington State and Mason County for our nearly fatal car wreck. We asserted that the State and County failed to make a simple improvement to the intersection making it much safer, until after  the crash occurred. Laurie spent four months at Harborview Hospital critical/intensive care, and she suffers traumatic brain injury, aphasia, and limited mobility that impact her daily living.

Throughout the duration of the lawsuit, Ray Kahler, Keith Kessler, and Brian Ladenburg kept us regularly appraised, skillfully and thoughtfully guided us through depositions and mediations; as well as realistically assessing the merits of our case.  Also reassuring and helpful were the paralegals and staff.  They always were supportive, understanding, and helpful in coordinating meetings, assessments, and document procurement.

While the entire ordeal was very stressful (especially for Laurie), the entire law firm (even Paul himself) made it bearable.  Without their personable support, Laurie would not have been able to endure the complexity, delays, and emotional impact. For that and the favorable outcome, Laurie has made considerable improvement.  With the settlement we have been able to move into a retirement community with a continuum of services that will provide us the assurance of lifetime care.

We are very grateful for the representation and support and would/will welcome any opportunity to refer potential clients to the Stritmatter firm.

Gary and Laurie Hammons

I am very grateful for contacting the law firm Stritmatter Kessler Koehler Moore to resolve the issue I had dealing with auto insurance company.  At first, I was trying to represent myself and resolve the auto accident claim with the insurance company of the person who caused the accident. However, they were undermining my injury and pain to the point that they didn't even acknowledged it.

Finally, I decided to contact a lawyer, Lisa Benedetti, at the law firm  Stritmatter Kessler Koehler Moore.  She was vey gracious enough to take my case to help me out in dealing with the insurance company.

Lisa was very thorough and very deliberate performing her job to bring satisfactory result. On addition to the medical reports, she interviewed me to have basic understanding about my health issues that were resulted because of the accident. She presented to the insurance company the damage this accident caused to my health until they grasped the seriousness of the issue.

Each time I had called to request any update of the status, she responded to me with assurances that I would be compensated for pain that I went through.

I really appreciate the work Lisa and Elodie Daquila, the Paralegal, put forth to resolve my case to a satisfactory conclusion.  Thank you
Good day😊😊

Unwilling to help when offered to in my ongoing struggles to fight sheriffs misconduct

Apparently since the cops didn’t actually break my arm or something they are not interested. Advised it’s a precedent setting case. She hung up. Too bad so sad my money is not good enough for you huh?

The right and wrong is not the issue it seems it’s the money or my lack of it possibly?

Inga and Mr Levinson are the best and they are very easy to talk to, provide detailed information, and explain things well. I have recommended him to multiple friends and family members, and they’ve all had great experiences working with him.

Doug Levinson was great! I called him after a bad car accident, I was anxious, stressed and overall nervous about the whole situation but he helped ease That. He explained the whole process from the beginning and answered any questions I had. The whole process was easy for me, he did all the work and the communication from his office was great. I would highly recommend and though I don't hope to get in anymore accidents but if I do I know exactly who I will be calling.

I used Scott's services for the first time, for a relatively minor car accident. He took my case when others wouldn't, and I received far more in that settlement than we expected.

Fast forward about 10 years, and I reached out to Scott on a personal level, asking for advice.  He has always been willing and able to provide references for other areas of law.  This time, it was for a lawsuit with a local hospital.  Scott, and his wife, were present for us for the rest of our daughters life, and have been there for us ever since.  Scott takes the time to know the people he represents, which is why I've continued to come back to him for help and advice.  You can't go wrong with Scott.

reviews.text: Scott consulted with me following a head injury sustained at work. I was significantly concussed during the time of the initial consultation and my cognitive functioning was very impaired.  Scott was incredibly patient and compassionate with my slow thinking and speech, able to elicit pertinent information from me, and conveyed information to me in a fashion in which I could understand.  His advice steered me towards good decision-making and ultimately led to the best outcomes relative to my health and legal situation.  Scott’s follow-up showed that he truly cared about what happened to me going forward.  I strongly recommend Scott Carness to anyone who is looking for a proficient, compassionate, and highly effective attorney.

reviews.text: Working with Nathan Trudeau was such a smooth experience. He made my stressful situation feel simple and manageable. He kept me informed the and answered any questions I had. On top of that, he got me better outcome than I originally thought I would get. I’m super thankful for his help and thankful for this firm.

I have no idea why this law firm is so highly rated. If I could give 0 stars, I would. I spoke with “Brad Johnson” himself. He sounds burnt out and was incredibly unprofessional, condescending and offensive. I also never received a return phone call which was ensured 48 hours prior to recontacting his firm. Unfortunately, I will never get that 11 minutes back from that cringey phone call but save yourself the time and call a different law firm.
They don’t even listen to your story

Do not, and I repeat DO NOT use this law firm!!!!! They were absolutely horrible to me the minute I sent payment. My lawyer was Nathan Trudeau. He was not responsive to my contact requests. He sent a different lawyer to stand in on one of my court dates. On the other court date that really mattered he was 15 minutes late and made the entire court, including the judge wait. He was so rude to my treatment facility. He didn’t even know the facts of my case, I doubt if he even read it. I got deferred prosecution, which a public defender could’ve gotten for me easily. If I could save anybody money and time, please please listen to what I’m saying and do not go with this law firm.

I hired Heather Freeman to represent me for a protection order case and honestly, I was weary to even hire an attorney as this situation has been ongoing for years and I’ve felt like no one heard me. Heather and the Bradley Johnson team listened and walked me through it. We were approved the order and I can finally feel some peace. They did great and I would hire them again in the future.

This is the worst, most inept lawyer I could have hired. I started with a great lawyer named Aaron who listened, believed me and his goal was to get me the best deal possible. He left the firm and I was given over to Nathan, who was the exact opposite. He barely listened to a word I said, dismissed me completely, got me the absolute worst deal imaginable (one I probably could have even argued myself!), made almost zero effort and then ghosted me! I ended up with a bench warrant for failure to appear after he didn’t inform me of the hearing and then fell off the map. I called, texted and emailed, NOTHING! No response whatsoever! At my hearing the prosecutor said she tried to reach out to him and he didn’t respond to her either. Even the judge called his behavior unacceptable! They never withdrew from my case, they just vanished!! This lawyer completely screwed me over with absolutely horrible advice and representation and then bailed. Hiring this firm is the worst mistake I could have made and I’ve been paying for it for years now.
I was in a very scary jam and Amanda got me the best possible result for my case. She helped me through my anxiety and negotiated the best possible outcome for me

One more restrain case win! Bradley Johnson and Heather Freeman brilliantly won our Restraining Order case. Heather did an outstanding job working through the documents — she sifted through a massive pile of paperwork and handled all the leg work. We had an insane amount of documents, the kind you can't imagine sorting through in such a short time! Bradley is a high-profile advocate for his clients. He uses sophisticated tools when working with both his clients and the opposing side. He's manipulative in the best professional sense — smart, emotionally sharp, and knows how to apply pressure on both sides. He masterfully uses these qualities in client work and wields every tool available in the legal system with precision. His negotiation skills are top-tier. Bradley knows how to fight for your terms and conditions and win. If your case is messy and complicated like ours was — this is the best attorney you can find in WA!

Austin A from BJL was a pleasure to work with. I was very impressed with his knowledge and skill navigating my case and ultimately winning. 10/10 would highly recommend working with Austin if you’re facing DUI charges.

((EDIT))

I retained this firm in December 2024 to defend against a fabricated restraining order. The allegations were pure fiction, yet instead of mounting a strong defense, my attorney delivered nothing but lip service. When it mattered most, he was unprepared — literally sitting in his car, coffee cup in hand, reading from a paper without even looking at the camera while addressing the court. I was left embarrassed and effectively unrepresented.

This failure cost me nearly $25,000 for something I never did. The supposed “representation” was so careless that when the attorney called me back after the disaster, the only professional response should have been an apology and a full refund.

For context: I am still in ongoing divorce litigation where my ex fabricated an elaborate story, fled the state, and tried to weaponize false accusations. None of the alleged conduct even occurred in Washington, yet this firm refused to challenge the glaring jurisdictional issues or fight back with the evidence I had.

-since first in this review, Brad reached out to me a few days ago and because of the court system didn't allow enough time to plead my case in a proper manner because my spouse steamrolled the court with paperwork with all the false allegations Brad said he would write a letter to my current attorney hearing in Arizona, basically filling them in on his professional opinion of what transpired. this would've been helpful back when we lost the case back in 2024, but it may be helpful now I will update my review to reflect the added information when it's been finished.

He is the g.o.a.t.
Saved my life!!

Austin Ansingh was an absolute knight in shining armor for me during one of the hardest times of my life. I had just been arrested for a DUI, and I was so scared about what was going to happen and the possibility of jail time. From the very first meeting, he made me feel heard and supported. He was patient, kind, and never made me feel judged.

My case ended up taking over a year to be resolved, and through it all, Austin was steady and reassuring. He always took the time to explain things clearly and never rushed me, even when I had a million questions. What stood out the most was how much he truly cared—he didn’t just treat me like another case, he treated me like a person who mattered.

In the end, he found a resolution that I am so grateful for, and I honestly don’t think it would have been possible without him. Austin is not only extremely intelligent and talented as an attorney, but he’s also compassionate and genuine, which is rare to find. I’ll always appreciate what he did for me.

AVOID Bradley Johnson Lawyers! Called this morning at 10:30 AM and was treated poorly. I was trying to explain my situation, but she was talking down to me and was very disrespectful. When I asked her to let me finish, she brushed me off and tried to hang up. Unprofessional and completely uninterested in helping.

Senator Austin Ansingh was my lawyer that helped me get out of a very difficult situation. He is gracious, respectful, and very productive. His professionalism and knowledge resulted in the best possible outcome for me, an outcome that I would’ve never thought to be possible. Without his skills, I would have had a different life. I highly, highly recommend him! Thank you so much for everything!

reviews.text:
Update:  I was honest with this review and I stand by it (miscommunication and lost documents shouldn't happen), but I wasn't expecting a call from them to challenge me on matters listed here, specifically called by the person I named in the review.  Very uncomfortable to take the call while I was at work.  I was forced to hang up on her to go to a meeting.  So my other advice/warning - if you leave a poor review, be ready for them to challenge you on it and make you feel bad for doing it.

While I guess the outcome is ok, working with them was more stressful than the DUI itself.  Maybe it's just the Everett office, I cannot speak for the others.  Do not expect communication.  They will call you immediately to get you as a client and get your money, then you won't hear from them. If you're lucky, you'll get a call after 5pm the night before your court date.  The paralegal staff will not follow the case (or at least Courtney), they'll lose documents and I'm missing court right now because I was not sent the code to attend virtually, even though I got a text saying she'd send it.  But then again, the text also has the wrong date on it for court, so who knows.  I have been informed by others that I could have done the same with a public defender and saved $6,000 and likely had less stress.   And I was just told by another of their attorneys that there is no Everett office so not sure what the Wetmore address is, but apparently there isn't an office.  And apparently don't ask questions through their portal when the office won't answer your questions - they don't like that.  Update - Just another "miscommunication" as I was told, now I have to be in court in person in less than an hour after being told it was virtual.  Found out more documents were not given to the court.  Yeah, don't work with them.

Amanda Breslaw was my lawyer recently and she did an excellent job! She was always very prompt and professional with her communication and ensured I was well taken care of. She helped walk me through the entire legal process and explained everything to me along the way, in a way that I could understand, and was kind, caring and non-judgemental. This was my first encounter with the legal system, which felt very scary, but with Amanda’s help I was able to feel more comfortable and understand what was going on with my case every step of the way. Amanda also made herself available to me for any questions or other concerns that arose. She was also able to help negotiate for a favorable outcome for my case!  She is an outstanding lawyer and went above and beyond for me and I would highly recommend her to anyone looking for a lawyer in the Seattle area.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Ashley, Wow, what a review! We're completely doing our happy dance right now. We'll make sure Amanda gets to see these kind words. Best believe, it will make her day! She's pretty fantastic, non-judgmental and always ready to break down the legal mumbo jumbo - we're glad to hear you noticed. Remember, it's the Bradley Johnson way! We love when our clients feel comfortable, especially when dealing with the legal world for the first time. It can be as scary as a horror movie, but with your very own protagonist like Amanda? Ha! Case closed. Feel free to drop us a “Hello” whenever you’re in Seattle. Thanks again, Ashley! We’re here 24/7 if you or anyone you know needs a legal dream team.

reviews.text: I had Austin Ansingh as my first attorney I’ve ever had. I’ve never been in trouble with the law before, but, Austin stepped in and helped me through my DUI case. When I say he made this experience super easy, and stress free, is  an understatement. He did all the work for me, provided me with outstanding service, and answered any questions I had. Even when he didn’t have an exact answer, he would get an answer for me no matter what. The outcome for my case was the best case scenario I could’ve hoped for. He got my DUI dropped down to a negligent in the first degree with fines suspended and no additional jail time! Austin works absolute magic when it comes to this stuff. Not only all of this, but he is a super nice guy and is very understanding of your unique situation. If I recommend anyone for an attorney, it would be Austin every single time.

reviews.text: I had a pretty serious charge hanging over my head. Never being in trouble before, I had no idea how to go about selecting the right attorney. I called Bell Law LLC and he answered directly within the first couple of rings. He was incredibly professional and immediately took a personal interest in my case. I had not even made the choice to hire him yet and he already had and read my case file, and had spoken with the district attorney within the first couple hours of us speaking. He was professional, helpful, ambitious, and willing to handle me as if it were his own future at stake. I definitely would recommend.

Very professional service and outstanding results. I got results surpassing my expectations. They truly care about their clients. They always kept me updated during the various stages of my very sensitive healthcare fraud case and very knowledgeable and was always available to answer all my questions. If you are looking for a good fraud defense lawyer, I highly recommend Healthcare Fraud Group PLLC.
Kode law firm is the best in town they treat you like family not just a client.

I reached out to Kode Law after my grandmother had a fall on her outside apartment stairs. I also reached out to two other attorneys who told me I did not have a case. Preet and Sarah listened with compassion and immediately took on the case. Throughout the case, the apartment owner harassed my grandmother. Every time I contacted Sarah about it, she was just as upset as I was and handled it right away. They won my grandmother a large settlement. They were very easy to get a hold of and quick to get back. They answered all questions with clear communication. I highly recommend Preet who is a great attorney and Sarah who is an amazing paralegal.

I had a really good experience with Kode Law.  I got hit right before I found out I had cancer and needed surgery.  They took care of everything for me, no stress, and everything went fairly smoothly.

100% would recommend!

I honestly can’t say enough good things about Kode Law Firm. After my car accident, I was overwhelmed, stressed, and had no idea what to do. From the very first conversation, Preet and Sarah made me feel completely taken care of. They were so kind, patient, and genuinely listened to everything I was dealing with.

They handled my personal injury case quickly, smoothly, and with so much care. I never felt ignored or confused. They kept me updated, answered all my questions, and made the entire process so much easier than I expected.

I’m truly grateful for how supportive and professional they were during such a stressful time. If you’re ever in a car accident or dealing with a personal injury case, I highly recommend Kode Law Firm. They really made a difficult experience feel manageable, and I’m so thankful for them.
Amazing customer service Sarah helped me a lot with my incident and was really nice. I’m really satisfied and would recommend coming back if needed in the future.

Kode Law Firm has been absolutely wonderful to work with! I was in an accident where I was not at fault, and before hiring them, my wife and I tried to handle everything ourselves. It was incredibly frustrating — no auto shop could take our car for at least three months, and the other driver’s insurance wouldn’t cover a rental until our car was in the shop. Since we only have one car and both commute to work every day, this was a huge challenge.

After several people recommended finding a lawyer, we did some research and decided to hire Kode Law Firm — and it was the best decision we could have made. They took care of everything for us: securing a rental car the very next day, resolving issues between the auto shop and the insurance company, and even handling complications with our own insurance regarding PIP coverage. We never could have managed all of this on our own as smoothly as they did.

On top of that, they were able to secure a settlement that was much larger than we expected — truly life-changing for us. I can’t recommend Kode Law Firm enough!

Preet, Dey, Sarah and the rest of the Kode Law firm team have been absolutely amazing to work with. When I was in a car crash I was absolutely dreading having to talk to the insurance company. This is when I decided to seek out representation. Everyone at Kode Law went above and beyond to help me. The team took the time to explain how the process works, they always provided honest feedback and were extremely kind to myself and my wife. I always felt I could trust them and that they had my best interest at heart. I honestly would not have been able to handle the stress of speaking with the insurance companies. Preet and Dey especially worked diligently on my case to make sure that I was represented well and was able to get the medical care, car repair and a large settlement check that will be life changing for my family. If I ever find myself in this situation again I will absolutely be going back! If you are considering getting representation look no further as I cannot recommend them enough!
Nothing but great things to say about Kode Law, worked with them on 2 separate occasions. They are very professional, prompt and knowledgeable in work they do. Settlement was worth the waiting.
First of all, thank you for everything. They were very kind the whole time, they took care of everything.

it has been a great pleasure working with this company.  they are very meticulous in their processes and inform me of all possible problems that we might get into with the case. Now my case is settled with me being highly satisfied.  i would highly recommend this company to anyone.  But one of the things that you have to be aware of is truly being honest with your existing medical problems.  this will help them greatly with your case

They told me that the insurance company only offered them a $2,500 settlement (which would’ve left me in more debt after paying them and medical fees) and that we would need to go into litigation (they increase there fee when cases go into litigation by the way) but when I called the insurance  claims department myself the amount I was told was way more than what I was told by this law firm.
