reviews.text:
I recently had an incident that left me in need of a personal injury lawyer. I have never been through this type of thing before and was not quite sure how to proceed. I went online and googled personal injury lawyers and looked for ones that specialized in my type of case. I received responses from several firms and was not feeling very comfortable. One firm was too pushy, the next was not very responsive, then came Khan. I received a phone call from Terry (sp?) at Khan. From our initial phone conversation, she was polite and professional and sounded like she had a genuine concern for how I was doing so I scheduled an appointment to meet with her. I was a bit nervous when I went in because I have never had to hire an attorney or firm before, and like everyone, had heard very very few good things about attorneys and their firms.

When I arrived at the Khan office in Tukwila I became a bit more nervous. Don't let my nervousness or the outer appearance of their building make you feel uneasy. As soon as I entered the building I was warmly greeted by Terry. She took me into her office and we discussed the details of my case. Terry was able to quickly put my mind at ease. She showed none of the stereotypical sleeze that attorneys and lawyers are labelled with. As I already mentioned, she seemed to have a genuine concern for me and how I was doing. Not only that, but her knowledge of my topic was perfect. She also had a surprising knowledge of the area where my incident occurred. Not just the city, but even the exact building. Apparently she had frequented the same place in the past.

By the end of my meeting with Terry I can honestly say that I felt/feel good in my choice of law firms. Terry's legal knowledge and expertise are great, her communication skills are amazing, as are her patience and understanding.

We are just getting started with my case, but I will let everyone know how it went when it is over.
Amazing law firm. I was involved in motor vehicle accident and Attorney Khan and Paralegal Abdi helped me resolve my case very fast. I would highly recommend this law firm!

Very friendly, caring, knowledgeable, great communication. Worked very hard for me and got me a fair settlement from my car accident. I have found a law firm I totally trust and will use it again, if needed. I recommend  you too if ever needed Khan Law Firm.
Thanks Abdi.

I was hit by a driver coming out of a 7-11 while riding my bicycle.  The driver claimed that I hit her and her insurance company initially denied my claim.  I was unable to work for 2 months, had numerous hospital and medical bills, and was in rehabilitation for about 6 months.  I was becoming a little concerned about Kahn Law after the case dragged on for nearly two years so I went down unannounced to see what was happening with my case.  I was blown away when I learned that the key investigator knew my case much better than I did. My case was complicated and had stacks and stacks of medical records which he seemed to have committed to memory.  I was also impressed with his strategy to maximize the settlement and to maximize the payout to me.  It took about another three months after that meeting to finally receive my settlement, but it was well worth the wait. It was much much bigger than I could have imagined.
the insurance company has been giving me the run around for 1 month then I hired KLF and Abdi has assisted me with my property damage swiftly!
Thank you Abdi for helping me resolve my property damage and injury case.

I, a Florida resident, felt properly lost trying to pick up the pieces after being cheated by a Washington used car dealer, but with Morgan's help, I had what I needed to get this issue resolved.

Morgan Lake spoke with me on the phone extensively. He made sure that I was not only aware of my options, but clearly understood each of them. He gave me action steps which I have followed to great effect. Lake Law is a 10/10 law firm and Morgan Lake is a 10/10 attorney. He is a class act.

reviews.text: The gentleman I spoke to on the phone wouldn't stop talking past me long enough to actually answer the questions I was asking.
reviews.ownerResponse: Seth, that is not fair. I was absolutely trying to answer your question when you hung up on me. I think you need an attorney to help you get them to listen to you, but we do not handle such matters. I realize that wasn't the answer you were looking for, but that is the answer. Presentation and knowing how to deal with the IRS is everything. A lawyer knows how the IRS wants to see it. They do have some obligation to view documents, but that comes with many qualifications. As an example, they likely don't have an obligation to go through 1500 pages of unmarked bank statements to find all of your business expenses. Better to think of a way to present that to them because the bottom line always is, if you cannot come to an agreement, it will be you that owes the taxes. Also, a tax attorney can tell you if you just have a bad case. If you are making a bad legal argument, all of the backup in the world won't change their opinion. Finally, bad communication can sabotage your efforts. Sometimes, a person might not understand what the IRS even wants and just gets more frustrated with them. At the end of the day, they are just people doing a job, and they usually aren't as emotionally invested as the taxpayer. It is not bad to have a person that can take a step back and make the argument without a lot of emotion, anger, and frustration. At this stage, you need somebody that can cut through all of that and determine if you have a strategy this late in the game. At some point for everyone, if you have another miscommunication with the IRS, you will owe the tax. It doesn't even matter if you were right or wrong. I realize telling you that you need an attorney when you just want somebody to answer your DIY questions can be annoying, but that is because the answer is irrelevant in some ways. It is like asking a doctor if you should stop trying to remove your appendix if it really starts to hurt. The answer is, you need to talk to a surgeon before you plan anything else. Since I don't perform the work you need done, you can assume I say this from a position of having no financial incentive to do so. I also ask that you be respectful to that person and listen to what they have to say, as opposed to mapping out your strategy to them. They do this for a living. You might be intelligent and know what you feel is right and wrong, but they know the reality of the beast you will be dealing with. A lot of people think it seems easy, until they are holding that final bill from the IRS. Best of luck to you.

After I had a bad fall that resulted from a big dip in a walkway to a restaurant, I needed a way to help defray my out of pocket medical expenses. Dann was so kind, and explained everything that needed to be done very well. He was also extremely patient as he had to wind his way through the ownership of the property to find their insurance company and then spend countless hours working with them. He was able to make it work with the insurance company so I was reimbursed and also received additional funds that will help me continue to care for the long-term effects of my injuries. The property owner even fixed the dip so this won't happen to someone else. Dann and his office were very easy to work with, welcoming and got through the difficulties of this case well. I would definitely recommend them for anyone else in my situation.

Kevin is a great attorney, who's very knowledgeable in his profession. He took the time to get to know me and tailored my defense to specifically meet my needs from a defense attorney. If you find yourself or someone close to you in of a true professional please give Kevin Trombold a call.

Kevin helped me out quickly and professionally with an issue I had. His office staff is his real secret Lemanie responds quickly and professionally to customer inquiries and seems to balance Kevin's clients needs like a consumate professional. I was so pleased I recommended him for a reluctant fried that had a DUI and he ws able to help her keep that off her record and get the case dismissed.  There is one thing I would change about Kevin but I wont mention it here. He is a professional competent attorney.

I wish I had the words to express how great a lawyer Kevin Trombold is but how great a person! Kevin has been my lawyer since April 2021 for my  case. Yes he did an amazing job as an attorney but that is what lawyers are paid for and supposed to do right?! The reason I say that is it takes A LOT for me to write a review on anything, anyone, business or anything. I have to be way above and beyond either pleased with something or soooooo disappointed in some way. From the day he took my case he was so personable and made me feel like we would get through whatever came next as a team. I never felt judged or like I was just another case. Not only did he handle every court case, appearance, paperwork or whatever came up but his office staff was constantly checking in with me and reminding me of all the things I had to do and keep me on track with the MANY deadlines.

The biggest thing that impressed me about Kevin was he was there for me, still there for me, long after my case was settled. What I did not know was that there are still many court dates, check ins, paperwork and just questions that come up after your case is "settled". He has been at every single court appearance I have had to make since then while I am still on probation, 4 more years of that and I have no doubt if I need him or his advice he will still be there. To me he and his staff blew my expectations out of the water! In the best way! 😁

If you or a loved one are ever in need of a lawyer's help you owe it to yourself to at least talk to Kevin about your situation. It will be the best decision you ever have to make during a stressful time in life. His help made one of the worst times in my life go as good as it possibly could go !

Bryn McCoy

Kevin Trombold did an AMAZING job assisting my family recently, and I highly recommend his services. Kevin was prompt, professional, understanding, and extremely skilled. Thanks to Kevin, our legal challenge was handled quickly and with the "best case scenario" outcome. Thanks again!

Kevin provided the absolute best legal support and guidance through the defense of an unwarranted motion filed against me. He was incredibly professional and knowledgeable and stayed focused on the facts and the law while at the same time being sympathetic to my emotions through the entire process.
Kevin is a great choice for an attorney he was very helpful every step of the way and was able to provide me with a great outcome. I’m glad I found him thanks again Kevin!!!
Kevin will get you the results you want. Non judgmental, great communication.

I called today and spoke to a lady about getting documents for a post conviction. I've been having a hard time getting documents as a public citizen. I've tried months to get public records, as I explained to the receptionist. Long story short, I never got to talk to a lawyer about the help on getting the documents. Instead she hangs up in my face and wished me good luck. Very Unprofessional and very rude... I wouldn't recommend this company not due to the lawyers or representation. But because the receptionist was very rude and uninformative. A very simple task that I was willing to pay for. Horrible front office..
reviews.ownerResponse: Sorry to hear about your frustration.  We are a private law firm and not the clerks office. You are not a client of ours and we don’t have your documents. Many people find success getting their own documents from the clerks office, which will have your file. In fact, many court files are available online now.

reviews.text: Guy was super nice and very knowledgeable
Outstanding firm, Kevin went above and beyond in terms of representation and outcome. You are in great hands here and I highly recommend.

Both Kevin and Melanie are 5 stars for sure. I was hesitant to show my name but i want to make sure if you ever find yourselves in my situation, not to look further . You want this firm to represent you!
kevin and his paralegal melanie will take care of you, made going through court so much easier than me, well worth the price

How truly fortunate I was to have Kevin Trombold and Melani Briganti to represent me. I was in court for almost 3 years.I was discouraged and did not feel I would get justice.Kevin listened and together we were able to get a differed prosecution. I started doing AA and this saved me as I was given a chance to wrong a right.Judge Chess was so fair in listening to my cases and giving me a second chance.Thank you

At 52 I found myself in need of legal counsel. Never did I expect to have to deal with such a scary and stressful event like that at this point of my life. Within an hour’s time a lifelong friend and another attorney friend (neither of whom know each other) both referred me to Kevin. He and his assistant Melanie were very responsive as well as compassionate to my situation. True empathy. He actually called me while he was on family vacation (on Thanksgiving) and spent 40 minutes talking with me!

Best part, he produced an expeditious, full dismissal months before trial was set to begin. If you find yourself needing someone to defend you, Kevin is your guy. I did a ton of research before I hired him (after the referrals). That assured me that he knows his way around the courts and has a tremendous reputation with not only defense attorneys, but prosecutors as well.
Kevin is SMART and kind.  His admin assistant Melanie is efficient , professional,  very responsive.   No complaints !   Hope you don't need a lawyer, but if you do-- Pick Trombold !
Kevin is a good guy and melanie is great as well both awsome to work with thank you guys!

Kevin and Melanie are the best!
Kevin has the respect from his peers and treats others with respect and care.

Kevin was 100% engaged with me throughout 3 seperate cases that spanned 2 years due to the pandemic.

His communication and ability to make you feel at ease during some of the most tumultuous times is extremely polished.

Not only did he get favorable outcomes in each case, he did it with the utmost professionalism. I highly recommend Kevin to defend you if/when you find yourself in a position of need.

Jon D
Kevin and Team are just what you need when you have a problem. Legal advice plus wisdom.

I had found myself in a very serious position having been accused of a very serious crime.  I contacted Kevin Trombold and having never been in any kind of position like this in my past I was very scared and nervous.  Kevin was very professional and walked me through the best course of action and how things should go if everything worked out in our favor.  Even though it was a very long process and we had to jump through many hoops everything worked out just as he said and all of my problems have since vanished.  I would strongly recommend Mr. Trombold and his team to anyone that finds themselves in need of a great attorney.

Also there were no hidden fees.  Mr. Trombold quoted me up front exactly what it would cost and the numbers he gave me were exactly correct and there were no additional fees as time went on.

Kevin I can't thank you enough for everything you did for me.
Great law firm i highly recommend them!
A very, very ,very good lawyer and his assistant. very good service experience. Five-star recommendation.
Kevin Trombold is a miracle worker.  I wouldn’t let anyone I care about go to anyone else when facing DUI charges.

Kevin made my case extremely painless, quick and easy. He got me what I believe to be the best possible outcome and all in all my experience working with him and Melanie was extremely positive. They are both kind and attentive, and quick with their responses. I never was nervous or had any doubts working with Kevin as my attorney. I would recommend him to anyone.
Kevin Trombold got me a better outcome than I thought was possible. I’m so glad that Kevin represented me!
Excellent representation. And a really professional firm all around. I have and would again recommend Trombold Law.

Kevin helped me navigate myself from choppy waters to calm seas.
Priceless help!

Peter M.

Kevin barely showed up and "refered" me to a friend of his for an "evaluation" that I could have had done for free or wayyyy less than 1500 anywhere else, all in all cost me $8k for him to show up 3/6times, not remember who I was or who my fiance was (he confused a friend of mine with me for him they look nothing alike) which also almost if I hadnt said anything would have been a no show, did not provide me with council just asked what I wanted, his assistant did majority of his work God Bless Melanie!, he showed up sooo late to one of the court hearings I panicked, and basically I believe had too large of a case load so he tried to deal with my case as quickly as he could to make some easy money. ***One thing that stuck with me was him talking to the prosecutor about me while I sat behind him, they were laughing about a past charge I had that had been dismissed and he said "who gets charged with....as a crime anymore." The prosecuter laughed and said he hadnt seen that charge in years. Then they continued discussing my file loud enough I could hear them and the 2 people next to me could as well. Unprofessional in my opinion*** I felt too many times he would make it sound really like he was going to help and then he would get an offer and tell me I should consider it...even though it was a bad one. I ended up w a plea and it cost me time and more money...I thought I was just taking the lesser charge but it still came with items I did not want and though I agreed and signed off on the paper, what Kevin told me didn't match what I thought I signed, and I ended up with alot more things to do that I was trying to prevent. I would save your money on this one. He seems like he has alot going on and didnt seem to be devoted to my case or even me...at one point asking me if I had a drug charge\paraphernalia?!?! Um no.....but thanks! Smh
TLTR: DO NOT WASTE MONEY HIRING TROMBOLD, DO NOT GO SEE HIS "FRIENDS" FOR EVALUATION, AND JUST GET A PUBLIC DEFENDER BECAUSE IN THE END THEY DID THE SAME AND ONE COST ME NOTHING!" THE OTHER COST ME $ AND TIME I CANNOT GET BACK.
reviews.ownerResponse:
DM K, I'm so sorry to hear that you are unhappy with the outcome of your case. I'm not allowed to discuss the details of your case in public but I do remember a really great outcome that I'd love to discuss with you privately, if you want to call us. We value your opinion of us and want to make sure you completely understand what happened with your case and what we did for you on your case. I can't stress this too much, we value how you feel about our representation. Please call.

We worked diligently on the facts and law of your case. Additionally, we always strive to work closely with treatment providers so that we can make sure that our people, if appropriate, get the help they need. Yes, we do develop friendly professional relationships with the treatment providers. I'm of the opinion that it helps my people get better treatment outcomes and we are able to use those better outcomes to improve our negotiations with the prosecutors. It seems like a double win for my clients. I'm sorry you don't feel that the treatment evaluators and providers were helpful. I'm sure they helped us obtain the good outcome we delivered. Please call so we can discuss this.

I'm not sure what you mean when you say that I didn't show up. I was the attorney that negotiated your case and obtained the great result. There are many hearings in the criminal court procedure that are simple continuances. Those are essentially administrative in nature and don't have anything to do with the ultimate resolutions. I'm sorry that I failed to explain the administrative procedures sufficiently.

Again, please call so we can make sure you understand everything that happened in your case.

reviews.text:
First off I do not write reviews. My experience with Kevin Trombold's office and team exceeded my expectations and lead me to sharing.
The experience was professional and straight forward, All  of my questions were promptly answered, I never had to wait for a response or ask multiple time for information or help. I never felt stressed or lost with Kevin representing me with my case.
I would recommend Kevin Trombold's Law office, they helped me feel human in a system that can help make people believe they are not.
Kevin Trombold is an invaluable resource when it came to protecting your rights in a courtroom. Kevin is diligent and a hard working attorney you can trust.
Very appreciative that Kevin and Melanie successfully negotiated my case, and in the most timely way possible.  Highly recommend them!
I have worked with Kevin and his team for over ten years. They are professional and always put the client first. My clients have nothing but great things to say about his work!

Such terrible unprofessional behavior. Reached out to them regarding an initial case, filled their intake form. They promised to get back to me in 1 week or two. I checked in after two weeks or so, was told they would get back to me I waited months and  nothing, crickets, no response at all. Tried to call, no picking up. Terrible.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your feedback. We value everyone’s time and understand that each claim and its circumstances are unique. While we’re not always the best fit for every case, we work hard to respond to all inquiries with care. We understand your experience didn’t meet your expectations and we appreciate you bringing this to our attention.

reviews.text: Hello Sergio Garcidueñas, I want to thank you for all your support and professionalism in handling my case. I truly appreciate your help. Thank you so much to you and your entire SGB team; you're the best! Blessings!
Very professional yet fun staff.
I never consulted with an attorney the intake specialist thought i lived and the case was in a different state and refused to help seemed more like disability discrimination to me

I literally never thought that having to deal with lawyers could be such a positive experience. Sergio, Alder, and the rest of the crew at SG&B treated with respect from day one, and they made sure that I was thoroughly informed, and comfortable with each step of the process.
Sergio literally got my wife and I a life changing amount of money; and while I would gladly trade it all to never have been injured in the first place, it’s a lot easier to live with, with some money in the bank.
I hope I never need another lawyer, but if I do, my first call will be to Sergio.

If you're looking for an outstanding attorney, look no further than Sims Weymuller at Schroeter Goldmark & Bender.
Sims is everything you want in a lawyer: knowledgeable, responsive, a clear communicator, patient, and tough when it counts. When legal matters arise, you don’t want just any attorney—you want the very best.

Be smart. Hire Sims at SGB. You’ll be glad you did.

Was referred to this firm by multiple people/ lawyers.  I shouldn't have even wasted my time. Got more of a story about how they sympathize for my situation but basically because I'm a federal employee I'm not entitled to the same rights of protection as the general public, according to them.  This is even with a judgment from the county court in my favor in regards to the matter. They just simply couldn't help with the employment matter. I suggest looking elsewhere for legal help.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your feedback and experience with us. We value everyone’s time and understand that each claim and its circumstances are unique. While we recognize that we may not have been the best fit for your case, we appreciate you taking the time to reach out to us.

reviews.text:
As a court reporter with 40+ year of experience working with top-tier attorneys across the state and nation, I knew right away when deciding to pursue litigation on behalf of two sisters who had been badly abused and neglected and fell through the cracks of proper child protective care that Rebecca Roe and Sergio Garcidueñas-Sease at the Law Office of Schroeter Goldmark & Bender would be the perfect people to represent them in their search for justice.  Also, Ben Gauen, Virginia Mendoza, and Alison Mabbutt were a part of this stellar team.

These attorneys and their staff members were all extremely sensitive and discreet in every aspect of navigating the litigation process and worked diligently to gather necessary information from over 30,000 pages of documents that were produced relating to their case, which also included talking to countless witnesses.  In the end, through their zealous advocacy, they negotiated what all believed to be a very fair and generous resolution for the sisters. The sisters are incredibly grateful to Becky, Sergio, and the rest of the team. Thank you for your excellent representation, infused with kindness and a personal touch.  Let the healing begin.

My life was destroyed after I was horrifically attacked due to landlord negligence.  I was really afraid for my future and didn't know where to turn. Initially,  I sought help through other attorneys and was denied.  When Schroeter Goldmark & Bender agreed to take my case, I finally felt a sliver of hope. They continued to fight for me diligently for years. Even when they could have easily given up after a judge wrongfully dismissed my case.They provided continual support,  encouragement,  assistance and comfort throughout this lengthy and arduous battle.  Ultimately their perseverance,  tenacity, determination and commitment resulted in a significant settlement in which I am able to comfortably look forward to my future instead of living in fear of it. I am eternally grateful to Rich, Sergio,  Lindsay,  Luke, Allison and all other associates at SGB for replacing my desperation with celebration.
Cheers friends, this drink's for you!
Still waiting for an answer weeks lster

If this is not the best employment law firm, I can't imagine what is. Before I contacted SGB, I had already contacted about 10 law firms and got responses from some, but none could work with me. I was ready to give up when I got a response from SGB, specially Andy Boes, who went on to represent me, and Lindsay Halm. The team was skilled, very detail oriented, and caring. Not only did they help me successfully negotiate a great exit deal with my old company, they encouraged and helped me look at the bright side of things. I'm not exaggerating when I say they restored a lot of my hope in humanity.  If you have a case, I highly recommend SGB.

What a pleasure it was to work with the team at SGB! I filed a suit for discrimination against the Fire Department I worked for. My initial consult with Becky Roe was great and she reassured me immediately that I had a good case. I then had the pleasure of working with Julie Kline and Chen-Chen Jiang which was such a blessing. This team was incredibly communicative and attentive to my needs.

They worked so hard to get every single detail and we ended up walking away with a settlement that I was happy with. I was grateful for their help and support through this emotionally exhausting process.

I highly recommend Schroeter, Goldmark & Bender. We are especially pleased with all the work that Sergio Garcidueñas-Sease and their team have done for us.
I was able to rest easy knowing that they had all the details of our case handled. I could continue to focus on supporting my family and especially my son on his healing journey without the added stress of dealing with all the insurance companies.
Their patient, kind, and professional manner were appreciated and they took special care in explaining the process and procedure in terms that both my teenage son and I understood.
I am grateful for them, their team, and to their former colleague Lorena for the referral.

Everyone said my case was not winnable! They were wrong , 7 figures wrong!
Thank you, Schroeter Goldmark & Bender!

These professionals truly care about their clients and getting them justice. They are masters of their craft and made sure our family was taken care of.

We had an extremely heavy, long, and complicated civil suit and Sergio & Jamal not only listened but they were invested every step of the way from start to finish.

They settled our case, saving our son from having to go through the trial process, and were able to make sure we got enough funds to provide adequate medical care for our son.

I am SO happy and thankful to have had picked this firm to represent us, you will not be disappointed.
They need a phone system that works
Big

I had a very positive experience w them I was going thru a very personal suit Tom Breen Rich and Alison Mabbutt were so sensitive to my issues they made a safe environment for me to share what was going on Tom Breen fought tirelessly for me. We almost got beat out by the statute of limitations but Tom worked really hard for me and we settled for an amount that changed my life I can't thank my team of angels enough they were professional caring they gave me a voice and showed me people do care thank you so much tp Rich Tom Alison and Cathy

I hired Sergio Garciduenas-Sease for an auto accident claim.  Sergio met with me and my spouse and we discussed our case.  Sergio was very professional and laid out the process very clearly.  Sergio was very upfront about expectations regarding my case and I was very appreciative of that.  Sergio worked very diligently for me and kept me apprised of each step he was taking.  I was very impressed with Sergio's work, given we were in the middle of the Covid-19 pandemic.  In the end Sergio was able to get us a settlement that was better than expected.  I would call on Sergio again and refer him to others for assistance.
Would never recommend to someone that actually wants their lawyer to work for them. Useless and unprofessional.

I have worked with the attorneys at Schroeter, Goldmark & Bender on several medical malpractice cases involving injured children. I am always impressed with their knowledge and experience of the law, as well as their professionalism and commitment to their clients' interests. They are nationally respected trial lawyers, and I am always happy to recommend them to families looking for counsel.

I needed advice on a personal injury case and a friend recommended SGB. I am so glad that I went in. The attorneys that I met with took their time and answered all of my questions without making me feel rushed, even though it was a free consultation. When I am ready to move forward, I will be retaining them and recommend them to anyone in Seattle needing representation.

Raj, was absolutely amazing. He communicated every step of the way on the process of my case. He answered all the questions I had and helped me understand my case better. He was helpful in any other questions I had about insurance coverage. He went above and negotiated my medical bills so I can have less to pay. If you need an attorney for your case look no further than Raj.

I was referred here through a friend/coworker and they were very thorough, thoughtful, and kind. Explained everything I needed to know to put myself as a priority, in order to get what I needed done. Would definitely recommend to a family or friend, from my experience.

I was in a car accident that wasn’t my fault. The injuries I sustained from this accident, is why I hired Wiener & Lambka. From my initial meeting, the team at Wiener and Lambka handle all communications with my insurance company, and the driver at fault insurance company. Raj worked on my case the last few years, and up to the final closure.
I appreciated his continued updates on my case, answering my questions, via email, phone calls, which gave my only focus to heal as much as I could.
Given my extensive medical file. Both insurance companies paid the maximum settlement each policy coverage had.

I had an insurance claim that I filed and the insurance company did everything they possibly could to not pay the claim and basically in the end they did not pay it out. I knew they were in the wrong so I looked for an attorny and had 3-4 turn down my case. Wiener & Lambka took on the case and within no time they got me the full insurance claim amount and even got the insurance company to pay their attorny fees. I very highly recommend their services.

Raj was very helpful. Raj, wherever you are, I believe that the heart does… go on.
Thanks for your help. We need more attorneys like you mister Sir!
James Lambka was a great advocate for our family. I appreciated the thorough and timely service we received.

Raj took on my personal injury case after another attorney had it for a year and ultimately decided to not move forward with it. I was frustrated , angry and disappointed for the loss of time and hope. I contacted Raj, who worked on a case for my parents. He worked extremely hard to get the outcome that was desirable for me and my family. I will absolutely recommend Raj and his team to any of my friends and family. Thank you so much for helping me!

James Lambka took on my insurance case when no other attorneys out there would, and won the case with ease!

He made our experience, so smooth and communicated with us as good as anyone could.  He also recently helped me out best he could with some other issues that had nothing to do with making any money but he was still very supportive. Appreciate this firm and look forward to working with them anytime!

#FredTheJeweler (Since 1976)
James Lambka was great to work with. Communicated the process very clearly and kept me well informed. Highly recommend.

James Lambka, ethical, forthright and determined. I felt well represented by his firm. The office staff always took my call and had answers when we needed them. But mostly I appreciated a  sense of ease in the face of an otherwise intimidating process.
GTD.

I was involved in a car accident that was not my fault.  I had not been in an accident of this magnitude before.  It was not a super accident, but my car was totaled and I had quite a bit of soft tissue injuries.

I feel so fortunate that I was referred to the Weiner and Lambka Law Firm.  From day one, Bruce Weiner immediately made me feel comfortable and I knew I was in great hands.

Bruce let me know my options, and what kind of time frame I was looking at legally.  He spelled out each step, what I was to expect, and he was spot on.

At our original meeting, I found out Bruce had previously worked for the insurance companies, but switched to representing individuals in need.  This let me know he knew what the insurance companies were looking for and how they work.

His entire team were really helpful too, when needed, to help me with my law suit and the entire process.  I am waiting for the final findings, but know I will be very pleased with he outcome.

I would fully recommend the Weiner and Lambka Law Firm to anyone in need of a qualified law team.

This place!!!! If your really hurt, DO NOT use these guys. I got rear ended by Shuttle Express company van going 45 without breaking priorto impact. I was 8 weeks pregnant and fractured my C 6&7 vertebrae. Almost lost my baby due to placenta detaching from the force of being hit. Then almost bled to death less than a minute after the birth. the placenta was embedded from healing for 9 months after the wreck. Then got sick from the blood transfusion. Almost died AGAIN. Then to top all that off, I'm stuck with life long problems and constant pain. Went through all that and they only got me 3,000.00. I hardly had any medical bills. My health insurance coverage 90% of it. Do not use these guys. They said they would be with me the whole way... what a joke. They didn't help me one bit. Don't waist your time with this place. They just want your commission. This place could care less if your life has fallen apart. I get that Shuttle Express has lawyers to make this lawyers job harder but... Isn't that the whole reason you go to an attorney!!! This place is horrible!!!

James Lambka and Wiener & Lambka and staff have been a professional and positive resource in their communications, follow-up and most importantly representation of myself and my family and our case.  A difficult and challenging case that other attorneys refused to take, James Lambka took it on with knowledge , expertise, compassion and integrity.  Myself and my family have been blessed and fortunate to have found Wiener & Lambka to represent us.  I would highly recommend and refer Wiener and Lambka, and specifically James Lambka.  I trust and respect him.  He was patient and kind and took great time and care in addressing issues and concerns and explaining the processes of our case.  James secured a favorable outcome for myself and my family, during a time of heartbreak and stress, I can't praise and thank him enough.
Sincerely grateful,
D. Rose
First class! Bruce was phenomenal, even drove to meet me at a location that worked best for me. Great communication! 10/10 recommend.
Excellent knowledge and confidence to get the best results possible.

I was rear-ended in a work place accident and found myself in need of representation. Working with Bruce and his team was an amazing experience; their professionalism cannot be overstated. Their knowledge of the law and how it uniquely applies to your case will help you settle quickly without a drawn out trial. I hope I'm never in another accident but if I am, I know who to call.

Being involved in an automotive accident can be a pretty confusing and stressful situation. Bruce will help you through out the process and advise you what you need to do to reach the outcome you deserve. He was able to meet me on my lunch break at my workplace to explain the process, answer my questions or concerns and what is in YOUR best interest.  Their emailing system updates you as your doing your physical therapy and rehabilitation... You can contact him anytime by phone or email and he will respond quickly within 24hours. Most attorneys will duck or dodge your calls and sometimes have their receptionist filter your calls. Bruce has been very polite, professional, understanding and straight forward. He will not sell you a dream, and he will meet your expectations. I still receive postcards around the holidays from there office and feel like they actually care about there clients.

Wiener & Lambka were able to resolve my situation but most important, Mr. Bruce kept me informed of my options. I hope I don't need to use their service again but if I do I can rest assured that I will be in good hand.

I have worked on hundreds of cases with Bruce professionally and personally throughout the past 20+ years. He is professional, educated, energetic, driven, communicative and honest. I value his opinions and information. His team is a great representation of him and easy to work with. They keep you informed every step of the way. They always respond quickly to calls or emails. They go above and beyond to help solve problems. I recommend this firm to everyone I know. They take the hassle out of dealing with life's unpleasant incidents.

I would highly recommend Atty. James Lambka to anyone needing legal representation on personal injury cases.  James and his team are very kind, professional, understanding, and considerate.

I received prompt responses from James with any questions I've had regarding my car accident.  I really do appreciate the honest legal advice and referrals he has given me whenever I needed them.  Thank you so much James!

Professional people! They did an excellent job with my case. I will recommend them to my family and friends.
They always answered my emails and calls; I never felt left out. Thank you guys!

If you're looking for an insurance claim attorney, I recommend this office.
They are professional lawyers who really know what they're doing and give you their full attention, answering all your questions.
My case with the insurance company for the woman that rear ended me went from "our client had no fault in this accident" to me receiving a fair settlement!!! Ty

Bruce and Co. handled a complicated multi-party case with relative ease, taking a major weight off the shoulders of my wife (who was hit twice in a month, with our young daughter in the car and went through treatment while pregnant with our second daughter) and I. We switched to Bruce after a very poor experience with another law firm, which might be to blame for the mess Bruce and Elina inherited.

The team was responsive and helpful! Four stars due to some persistent errors with spelling of names and a couple of smaller missed bills — but again, it was a complicated case and we came out the other side happy with the services rendered to us. I'd call Wiener & Lambka again if I ever needed future representation in a similar matter.

3 words to describe W&L: Get Things Done!  This is my 2nd time hiring W&L and both times I was blown away at the service, response and care from the team.  Unfortunately, both times came from auto accidents that were not my fault, but fortunately, after healing, W&L took care of me on the financial side.  I have recommended them several times and will continue to do so.  You will be pleased with the experience and professionalism they offer.  Both times I worked with Bruce W and he went above and beyond in answering calls, texts, emails and even meeting me out of his way.  I hope to never call them again but if life hands me another lemon, I'm contacting W&L every time :)
called for a consultation and was very rudely interrupted till I hung up. no thank you!

The person that made my experience acceptable is Tina Thurston.  Without Tina to respond to my emails and do the research necessary the culmination of a four year long ordeal would probably not be coming to and end even now.  I cannot say enough about her pleasant and helpful attitude, her immediate response to emails and general projection of
efficiency and caring.  She is an amazing attribute to this firm.

Bruce Wiener... What can I say about Bruce Wiener? He's FANTASTIC! Bruce and his team worked tirelessly for over a year on my case, and kept me informed every step of the way. This was my first major accident, and I can say with full confidence if I ever have another, my first call will be to the Wiener and Lambka team. Insurance companies are tricky, don't try and do it alone! Because of Bruce's hard work, I was able to focus on recovering, not haggling with insurance. Seriously, call them!

I would highly recommend Wiener and Lambka. James and Tina were always willing to take the time to answer and explain any questions and were always looking out for my best interest. I appreciate everything they did to help me in my recovery after a traumatic car accident.
Highly recommend Wiener & Lambka. The staff is very professional and helpful. Already have recommended them to friends and will continue to do so.

I have been working with Wiener & Lambka for the past 5 years, after someone ran a red light and totaled my vehicle.  Tina T., who is an attorney in their firm, has been extremely helpful for me, and has gone the extra 10 miles to do her best to get things to work out to the best possible outcome.
I've never been involved with any lawsuit before, and Tina and Andy made this incredibly easy. They answered and re-answered my many questions.

Wiener & Lambka is a GREAT law practice.  Working with them was seamless and hassle free.  They took care of EVERYTHING, and I was free to recover without much worry about my case.  Their staff was always helpful, attentive, and very responsive to all of my needs and concerns.  I would certainly recommend my friends, family and even strangers on the street to use them for any of their future legal needs.  Thanks again Bruce and Lelani! :-)

They're a great firm! My case went so smoothly all because of Atty. Andy Herman and his team. They're great at communicating with you and will help you in the best and efficient way. Definitely referring them to all my family and friends! I suggest that any victims who were involved in vechicular accidents, go to them!

I was in a car accident 2 years ago in Oregon where the laws differ from here in Washington. I only had liability insurance and did not have money to pursue my medical needs. A friend referred me To Wiener & Lambka. I gave them a call and Mr. Lambka drove to my area the very next morning where we discussed my case. He found a Chiropractor in my area that would allow me to be billed for my medical treatment and for that I am grateful.

Through the process of getting me back to health, his office always maintained contact with me and kept me updated on my case. The legal assistant Tina Thurston was the most helpful! She always answered any of my questions and her communication with me was impeccable. Anytime I sent an email I could expect a response back from Tina within minutes.

When it came time to settle my case I wasn't quite pleased with the amount I was receiving. Wiener & Lambka worked hard and diligently to ensure I was fairly compensated. This office and the people who represent it are not your typical personal injury lawyers. They were genuine and compassionate about my case. Their main concern was me getting my health back to 100%.

In summation Mr. Lambka came across as intelligent, effective, friendly, and genuine. An excellent people person and well versed attorney is a hard combination to find. I would highly recommend their services to a friend, or family member.

I was injured in a three car accident back in 2007, unfortunate for us, we were the middle car. I believe my accident was settled in 2011 and we had applied for relief from my underinsured motorist at that time. My mother had become seriously ill and had two significant surgeries just under a year apart and I was unable to devote the time needed to pursue the claim. I periodically touched base with Wiener & Lambka and felt my claim was no longer viable because of the time that had passed. I continued to seek medical attention as needed, however, this seemed to be a way of life and we would just deal with things the way they were. I was contacted in late 2013 to close my "still open" underinsured claim. I am so thankful for their assistance in rectifying this matter. I was overwhelmingly pleased with the outcome and their personal attention to my recovery and settlement. This was by far the best experience I've ever had with an attorney's office and I would highly recommend their service to anyone in need of honest, thorough and diligent service. Thank you again!

Wiener & Lambka represented me after I was rear-ended in an accident, and then when I was hit a second time within a year. This led to a pretty complicated case with numerous parties and insurance companies involved. The team at W&L worked hard to ensure I would receive an acceptable settlement and they ultimately were able to resolve both cases together and I ended up receiving more than I initially anticipated. Bruce Wiener is very pleasurable to work with and is able to articulate complex issues in ways that his clients can easily understand. I also worked with Andy Herman who stayed on top of the complex case and was a great advocate for me. I felt confident in his abilities and he was able to bring all the parties together and find an acceptable resolution. As others have mentioned, Tina Thurston was a pleasure to work with and she was incredibly quick to respond to my questions. With such a long and drawn out case I could get impatient and frustrated at times but the team always did an excellent job of reassuring me that progress was being made on all fronts and walk me through what was happening with all the complex moving parts of handling two cases simultaneously. I'm very pleased with the final outcome!

I hired Bruce after a drunk driver hit my vehicle, resulting in some pretty severe back pain. I had to go to a doctor, chiropractor, and massage therapist get relief. Bruce and his team went to bat for me the moment I hired them, guiding me throughout the personal injury settlement process, which resulted in a settlement far above the value I had originally expected. His deep understanding of the insurance companies' inner-workings paid off to my benefit. As a bonus, he and his paralegal were always quick to answer my many phone calls and emails. Not to sound stereotypical, but they truly went "above and beyond" to help me out, and I will hire them again if needed.

I had no prior experience with personal injury litigation before being referred to Weiner & Lambka by someone else who’d had a positive experience with them.  I AM SO GLAD I was randomly referred their way because, they’re in short, awesome.  In long, they rock because of:

-Availability/Responsiveness:  Questions or issues about my case?  A call to the attorneys/office was not only welcomed, but encouraged.  James Lambka’s assistant – Tina Thurston – should be entered in an e-mail-response-time-competition because she may possibly be the fastest (yet thorough) corresponder ever,  and a very personable one at that!  This accessibility to counsel also helped my feeling of…

-Being Valued:  Though I’m sure my case was not the largest/most-at-stake case this office has encountered, the staff sure made me feel like it.  Never did I get the feeling that my case was diminutive or low on the list of priorities, but always one that deserved utmost attention and care.  I am still personally overwhelmed by the way James went over and above the call of duty to make sure my end award was fair in his eyes.  I believe it was truly James & Tina’s care for my case that earned my immense…

-Respect:  James is honest yet shrewd, thorough yet concise, and compassionate – yet empowering.  Both he and Tina worked to mastermind/coordinate the best possible outcome for my case.

Though any life experience that requires litigation is probably not a pleasant one, I can't say how grateful I am to have had these folks on my side.

I endorse this lawyer. Bruce Wiener is a strong advocate for his clients.  Bruce is smart and has a genuine passion for his clients and their causes. Bruce's paralegal Lelani Mertens is amazing! She was pleasant, helpful and very knowledgeable.
In our time of need, Bruce Wiener and his team of professionals were there. His genuine concern and compassion far exceeded our expectations.

The first half of my case was very discouraging on multiple levels.  That being said, Bruce did a great job and was straight forward with me the whole time.  Ultimately, my settlement was much greater than I could have hoped for and I am very thankful for that!

I first reached out to Bruce Wiener as soon as I learned that I would need spinal surgery after a car accident I had 3 years ago.  From the get go, Bruce and his team were very responsive and quick to answer any of my questions (which I had a lot, since I'd never dealt with a case before.)  I was always pleased with the thorough explanation of documents, timelines, and legal jargon that I otherwise would have been clueless about.  Bruce was able to give me clear and good advice and I am so grateful that a friend of mine recommended him.  I feel that through the almost 3 years of communications we built a great professional relationship and I am confident in his capabilities to provide excellent service to his future clients.

I am very happy with my service at Wiener & Lambka!  My questions were always answered promptly and everything was explained very thoroughly, so that it was easy for me to understand.  Bruce is a very nice man, who presents himself very well.  I would refer this law firm to anyone who needs an attorney!

Failed to provide promised advice on a critical issue at all, let alone by time promised. Firm didn't understand how to deal with a correspondent issue between LNI and Unemployment. Abandoned representation for a specious reason leaving me in the lurch just when I needed it. I could have possibly taken care of this all myself better and been in a position superior to what I was left in after their consignment.
It sounds like they've done some good work in the past but this is odious and damaging enough I will have to complain, possibly even more.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for sharing your experience, Dana. We understand how difficult and frustrating the claims process can be, however when the circumstances of a matter don’t allow us to move it forward, we work to communicate that as thoughtfully and responsibly as possible.

We’re sorry to hear that your experience didn’t match your expectations, and we appreciate the chance to learn from your feedback.

reviews.text:
Was put in touch with Emery Reddy, PC through a mutual friend.  I am so glad I was able to talk to them and have them review some legal documents from my former employer. There advice was timely and extremely helpful in guiding me in my decision to eventually sign the documents that were mutually beneficial.

I would highly recommend their services to anyone needing legal advice as an employee.

Thank You!!
reviews.ownerResponse: We're so glad that you were able to get some clarification and come to a resolution, Philip! Thank you for contacting us and if you ever need help in the future, please let us know.

reviews.text:
My experience with Emery & Reddy has been amazing from day one. Each and every person working on my case display high level of customer service. My paralegal/case manger Kaleena was the keystone to the case. Attorneys Reddy/Arthur made sure that I received the best possible outcome, and they delivered. Look no further if you need a employment attorney.

Thanks,

Scot-
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for leaving such a nice review, Scot! Kaleena, Patrick, and Karolina were honored to work with you and are thrilled for your positive outcome!

reviews.text: My experience with Emery Reddy was very professional. I truly appreciate their attention to detail and going above and beyond explaining the complexity of employment law. If you are looking for an attorney look no further, you won't regret it. Let Emery Reddy take the wheel.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your 5-star review, Scot! We are so happy to have been of help!

reviews.text:
I was very happy with their handling and eventual settlement of my case. I lost the ability to complete my career due to injury which caused me to have a permanent partial disability.
Emery Reddy handled every issue that came up quickly and to my benefit ensuring that I was treated fairly at every step of the L&I process, and eventually negotiated a settlement that was fair and equitable.
Our rights and responsibilities as Workers under the law following a serious work injury are so complex, I would never have been able to navigate this process without their help. I faced a number of steps and hurdles over the past two and a half years of this process. My attorney Karolina, paralegal Kati and caseworker Rachel, along with the rest of the Emery Reddy staff were there for each and every one, ensuring I understood what was happening, why it was happening, and that I was treated fairly and professionally in every respect.
Choosing Emery Reddy as my representative was one of the best decisions I have ever made.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Scot! We are so happy to have been able to help you through this process and we wish you nothing but the best moving forward!

reviews.text: Emery Reddy law when only the best will do. Karolina did an amazing job. Rachel laFonte goes above and beyond.  Absolutely amazing team. THANK YOU.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for leaving such a kind review. Karolina, Rachel, and the rest of the team are so happy for you!

reviews.text: Currently after 50 weeks,  I have returned to work with my employer, and have had an impairment rating with my doctor. I am hopeful that Emery Reddy law firm can now do the heavy lifting, and work their magic. To date, I have not had a face to face meeting with any of their attorney's,  but I look forward to it. This law firm has represented me for close to a year and a half. All correspondence has been through emails and phone calls. How many employees, who are seniors, are put at risk of injury, or infact are injured, because they are expected to have the physical abilities of younger employees? I know my employer  has approximately 15,000 seniors nationwide who have been subjected to the same daily workplace expectations I encountered, and it is not acceptable. I would encourage others not to go it alone but seek legal representation to navigate the complex laws concerning workplace injuries.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review! We are so glad that Kendra was able to provide assistance during your intake. We wish you the best with your claim.

reviews.text: If you’re injured on the job in this state you are at the mercy of the state l&i or the private insurance company that insures your employer, the best decision you can make is to get great representation from a highly respected law firm that specializes in l&i laws. My experience is unique because it involves both private and state insurance from two different on the job injuries. As soon as I retained Emery Reddy the insurance companies had to deal with my attorney who is well versed in the law. From there on I had the professional representation that everyone should get to protect themselves in this state. Emery Reddy has and still is doing a very outstanding job of protecting my rights.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thanks for sharing your experience, Frederic!
We truly appreciate your thoughtful feedback and are honored to have supported you through such a complex situation. We’re glad our team could provide the representation and protection you needed. Thank you for trusting us!

reviews.text: Awesome team all around! From the first call to set up a consultation, I truly felt heard. I was contacted back much quicker than I expected, and after discussing my situation in more detail, I was signing paperwork to get the ball rolling on my case. I provided all the necessary information, and we reached an agreement faster than I could’ve imagined. The entire process was straightforward, smooth, and stress-free. I couldn’t be happier to have found and worked with Paul, Eli, and the rest of the team. They helped me when I was starting to feel defeated, and I’m so grateful for the weight they lifted off my shoulders. I’ll definitely keep them in mind for any future needs and gladly recommend them to friends and family.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Hannah. We are so pleased that you had a great experience and are thrilled for your positive outcome. Should you ever need assistance in the future, please consider our firm again.

reviews.text:
Spectacular! I am a man of few words, but why  speak when you have the very best at your disposal to represent you. Patrick, Karolina, James and Kati, and the rest of your staff, I'm totally grateful and beyond appreciative for your support, time, expertise,  professionalism and the results thus far which have been phenomenal.
Enough can't be spoken in regards to the talented staff. There is no finer. Anyone who has an legal issue and need results, I highly recommend that you contact them without hesitation nor mental reservation. What are you waiting for?  Call them, it's the right choice! I did

Well, look who's back, me, for you, the  folks in need of, not just representation, for your workers comp case, but, the finest representation for your case, available, and here's just a few simple reasons why, 😉 you, yes, those of you, whom have suffered an injury on the job, and were not sure if you had  Alto,  Soprano,  or Tenor, to come out of your when you got the letter, like I did, saying, you are cut off, no more compensation, bear in mind, still injured, and sufferingfrom excruciating pain, and Under the Dr's care, and even though they knew that they were wrong, well the independent Med examiners, who lied, saying, he's fine, and we're done, I called Emery-Reddy, and they brought the Chorus, actually the symphony,  in its entirety!
Numerous times, when the cut-off switch was hit, it was like wth is going on this time, and a phone call to my Team,
Well already on it, decision reversed, medical continues and your pay Mr P.

I can go on with enough material, from my case, where this law firm stood by my side, with the utmost confidence, said don't, get too alarmed, ok,  no worries Mr. P., when I'm madder than Will Smith was, when he slapped the !!!! out of Chris Rock on  tv. They took care of me, my case, for 13 yrs, fighting, and made it known, our  client is our priority, and we will see that he is treated fairly and justly.

I am so proud to say, we're still in this together, and yes the firm, where some family members of mine, on a ride trip  in the car listening in, to a couple of conversations with the ultimate attorney, Karolina, said, she talks to you like she's family member, like she's your sister. If she weren't constantly saying, Mr. P., we would have thought it was your mother or sister, an aunt giving you, as a family member, good advice, and consultations

So, Patrick, thank you, for the time you spent analyzing my case, Katy, for your true diligence, you are,  truthfully speaking, on point,  and James, ( You're A Bad Mutha), (shut your mouth, taken from the movie Shaft), man, you did some heck of negotiating, on my behalf, and,  last,  but not least, you see folks, I am a believer of saving the best for last,   Mrs Arthur, I am forever grateful to you, Ms. Lady, let's just title you, Number One

In closing, I leave you with this
If you're looking for a team to fight with you, as in on the same team, they may, I don't know, but I do know if you want someone who will fight like an Orca, defending her newborn, call them up, ask for Mrs Arthur!!!

15 years and counting for your representation for me

THANK YOU SOOOOOOO VERY MUCH
May God continue to bless each and everyone of you!!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Eli. We have truly enjoyed working with you all of these years and are so happy that you trusted our team's guidance and believed that we were always acting in your best interest. Your words mean so much to us!

reviews.text: A friend and myself got in contact with Emery | Reddy for a rights violation issue in our workplace and to say they went above and beyond is an understatement. They negotiated everything and even came out with a check for me (which I was not anticipating at all) ! Can’t thank them enough for everything they did and hearing us out when some others wouldn’t. Forever grateful 🙏🏻
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words! We're truly honored that you and your friend trusted Emery | Reddy to help you during a difficult time. It means a lot to hear that our team made a meaningful difference and exceeded your expectations. We wish you all the best!
Thank you for your 5-star review, Curtis! Our team always enjoys our time with you and couldn't be happier to help you with your claim!

reviews.text: Paul is an absolute rockstar! He treated us like family and fights for what is right. He truly cares about his clients and offered us his full support while fighting for what we were owed from a very large corporation. Thank you Paul!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review, Logan. We really appreciate you taking the time to share your experience. Paul and his team were honored to help you with your case and wish you all the best moving forward!

reviews.text: They held my case for almost 3 years. And then abruptly notified me that they could no longer assist me, and to go to someplace else. They failed to contact me regularly. The lawyer, when I spoke to him, originally stated that I had a wonderful case.And they were going to win this for me, and they did pretty much nothing
So unhelpful.  The intake to decide if they wanna to help is a joke

Their "free consultation" is a joke. Seriously if you don't have time to deal with a new case then say so up front! Don't make me waste time talking to intake people and sending you a slew of documents to just have you come back and say you don't have time.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your feedback. Our firm offers free case reviews rather than free consultations. We request documentation to thoroughly evaluate each matter before deciding on representation. We understand it can be disappointing when we are unable to move forward, and we appreciate you considering our firm.

reviews.text: 4 days to let us know that they can’t take our case due to a large number of cases that they have right now. Do not waste your time with them.
reviews.ownerResponse: We're sorry to hear you were disappointed with your experience. Our team reviewed your case and responded within the 48-hour time frame we provide all potential clients. While we would like to help everyone who contacts us, we carefully evaluate each case to determine whether we’re the right fit—both in terms of legal scope and capacity. We understand how frustrating it can be to seek help and not receive the outcome you were hoping for, and we sincerely wish you the best moving forward in finding representation that’s right for you.

reviews.text:
Emery-Reddy "fights" for you!

They both, Advocate and Champion Workers Rights successfully.

Today is April 1, 2025...and no, this is NOT an April Fool's joke.

I have direct experience with this Business/Law Firm, Emery-Reddy, and Timothy Emery. Current moto, "We Help Workers", for me has been the truth! They can. They do.

Having worked together in several legal matters, it may behoove you to give them a try for any Employment or Worker Rights issues you might have encountered.

Emery-Reddy has definitely "helped me". Best wishes and Good Luck in whatever legal matter(s) your considering them for!
I was impressed by the work put into my claim.

If I could give Emery Reddy a million stars, I would! I have a super complex case, and they stood by me and figured out a way through every single hurdle we came across. They never failed me once. A very special thank you to Kati, and Karolina, for being so very patient with me during stressful times, and for always being so prompt in responding to my emails, phone calls, and any inquiries I had(there were alot!),and for being such a comfort in their professional explanations to things I was unsure about. This firm is top of the line, and I would recommend them to ANYONE! Thank you all SO very much for being who you are!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much! Kati and Karolina were so honored by your words. We are thrilled that you had a great experience and we are always here should you need us!

reviews.text: This team helped me so much. I would recommended every time.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Andrew! We really appreciate your review and for sharing your positive experience with others!

reviews.text: I highly recommend Paul, Tim, and Kendra, who were outstanding to work with. From my initial contact with the firm to litigating a successful outcome, the team was there every step of the way. They truly eased my stress with their exceptionally professional and promptly responsive approach throughout the entire process. I am incredibly grateful for their dedication and hard work. Their timely responses and attention to detail were exceptional. I couldn't have asked for a better team.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review, Tami! We look forward to working with you on your case.

reviews.text: I'll try my best in getting my point across. Finding an employment attorney is difficult right now. I thought I lucked out using Emery Reddy..seem simple process at first but had the rug ripped out from under me while still recovering.. signed papers, sent documentation on time (best I could give my situation), and stayed in contact. If the firm is spread thin and doesn't have the resources, than stop taking new cases and giving people false hope. When you feel already discriminated against, emotional distress and overwhelmed, the last thing you want is not trusting your attorney.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for sharing your experience with us. We understand how challenging it can be to navigate legal matters, especially during a difficult time, and we are sorry we were unable to continue working on your case. Due to our current busy litigation schedule and the high volume of cases we’re managing, we occasionally have to make the difficult decision to focus our resources where we can be most effective.

We appreciate the time and effort you put into working with us and understand how disappointing this outcome may have been. We wish you the best as you move forward and hope you find a resolution.

reviews.text: On their website they say they will fight for you. They aren't lying. I had one of the most difficult L&I death cases to prove and had my last lawyer drop me because they didn't think they could win it. I got denied then I got Emery/Reddy I got denied again but what did they do? They fought for me. They fought again for me and I finally am going to get what my husband worked so hard for his whole life and what he deserved not just monetary wise which is so needed and blessed but they saw he deserved it and as his spouse I deserved it and they did everything they could until they did when others gave up. Thank you from the bottom of my heart. You all are angels.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words! We are grateful for your appreciation and understand how patient, courageous, and strong you have been in your fight for your late husband. Thanks to your dedication, we have been able to bring light to an outdated law, and we are hopeful that it will change for people in similar situations moving forward to prevent what happened to you from happening again. Your legal team would like to recognize your perseverance — we understand how long and hard you fought on your own, and we are glad you didn't give up and ultimately contacted us. We wish you the very best moving forward and are happy to have helped you get the compensation you and your family deserve.

reviews.text:
Just signed the documents to be represented by Emery / Reddy Firm. Even though my case is a bit complex; I feel confident and reassured, my case will be treated professionally. Kendra; the intake specialist answered all the questions I had at the time; and I felt I could call anytime, if need more to be answered. Easy and straightforward document process. I feel like a weight has been lifted, after dealing with my employer and their insurers on my own for some time. I only wish I’d chosen representation from the start; so I’m looking forward to a resolution of my claims. There’s always a first day for everything; and I feel this is a good start.
Thanks, Kendra.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review, Judson. Kendra said that it was a pleasure speaking with you and that she appreciates your kind words. The Emery | Reddy team looks forward to working with you and assisting you through the conclusion of your claim.

reviews.text: A resounding 5 stars for Timothy Emery of Emery Reddy Law Firm! Navigating legal matters for the first time in my career, I couldn’t have asked for a better experience. Tim was exceptional—prompt in his responses, incredibly knowledgeable, and provided clear, actionable guidance that gave me total confidence in my next steps. His professionalism is matched only by his genuine commitment to his clients; he took the time to understand not just the specifics of my case but also my personal goals. I can’t recommend Tim highly enough. If I ever need legal support again, he’ll be my first call!
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Erin. Thank you for your review and your very kind words about Tim! Our firm is honored to have been of assistance to you and if you ever need us again, we'll be here!

reviews.text: Mr Tim and everyone at this law firm has been amazing and professional. They have an eye for things I had no idea were very important. They are also the only law firm to ever help me, as I am someone diagnosed with Autism. Most law firms I have spoken with have shooed me away due to my Autism but not this law firm. I realize not everyone will have the same experience I have had with Emery Reddy but I recommend to give them a chance and to have everything ready when you talk to them.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for sharing your experience! We are so happy to hear that your experience made you feel helped and heard. Our team is so pleased to be able to work with you and we wish you all the best moving forward.

reviews.text: In my initial intakes, I felt rushed and, like my time, was not appreciated and got the good ole referral to the bar association that can be googled. I had a follow up phone call with one of the associates that made it clear that they have a high case load all the time and that they really do value the time of injured workers who call but they can't take every case or might not be able to give appropriate time to that case which someone else could. I appreciated the phone call from the associate who reached out to me and told me she is making changes to address the way I felt by speaking with intake associates. I would recommend going to a firm that isn't searching for a "perfect case" or has a huge work load that way, your time is valued.
reviews.ownerResponse: It was a pleasure speaking with you, William. Thank you so much for your time and revised review. Should you ever find yourself in another situation where you feel that we might be able to assist please reach out.

reviews.text: I cannot recommend Timothy Emery of Emery Reddy Law Firm highly enough. From the moment he took on my case, Tim handled everything with a level of urgency and discretion that immediately put me at ease. His expertise in employment law, particularly Washington state law and regulations, was evident throughout the entire process. Tim’s professionalism and attention to detail were unmatched, and he navigated my case with the utmost care. Thanks to his diligence and skill, we were able to reach an outcome beyond what I had hoped for. I couldn’t be more satisfied and grateful for his hard work. If you need an attorney who genuinely cares about your case and delivers outstanding results, look no further than Tim Emery.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for sharing your experience, Miles! Tim and his team were happy to assist you with your claim and we wish you the best moving forward!

reviews.text:
I had an excellent experience with Emery/Reddy  Law Firm. From the moment I reached out, their team was incredibly supportive and attentive. They took the time to listen to my situation and clearly explained my rights and options.

My attorney, Tim, was not only knowledgeable but also genuinely caring. They guided me through the entire process, ensuring I felt comfortable and informed every step of the way. I was impressed by their thoroughness and dedication to my case.

The office staff was friendly and responsive, making communication seamless. Thanks to their hard work, I was able to achieve a favorable outcome. I highly recommend Emery/Reddy Law Firm to anyone in need of employment legal assistance. They truly advocate for their clients and deliver results!
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi, Nicole! Tim, Cailey, Alec and the rest of the Emery | Reddy team have really enjoyed working with you and are truly honored by your review. In sharing your positive experience you encourage others to advocate for themselves and stand up for their rights. Thank you so much!

reviews.text: The waste your time then do nothing. Pick someone else.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are sorry that you had a negative experience. During our intake process we try our best to gather as much relevant information as we can to share with our paralegals and attorneys to review which is why it can take several days for us to reach back out. Unfortunately we cannot accept every case but are always happy to refer you to someone else who may be able to. We wish you luck moving forward.

reviews.text:
I had the pleasure of being assisted by Kendra Frye recently. I am currently dealing with a life altering injury claim with Labour & Industries. I have struggled with dealing with my claim independently and getting answers and assistance. I had reached a point where I felt I could no longer mentally cope with my injury and deal with the frustrating demands/shortcomings of L&I.
I contacted multiple law firms, of which 3 returned my call. One of which offered no assistance and said my frustrations are typical and I basically need to continue to endure the experience. Kendra however listened to my concerns and validated what was happening. She passed on my information to the team and in a couple of days called me to say the team wants to take on my case. That they are willing to take over and handle dealing with L&I for me.
I cannot tell you what hearing this meant to me. I felt I could breathe again and put my focus where it needed to be, on my recovery.
Thank you Kendra, I will be forever grateful for your assistance!
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Joanna! Thank you so much for reaching out to Emery | Reddy for assistance with your claim. We are so pleased that you had a great experience with Kendra and are honored that you chose to share your experience with others!

reviews.text: Just like so many other reviews it is true, they will not take your case and will just waste your time. Horrible basic service, all through a paralegal. Very disappointed

He clearly and concisely answered my many questions and concerns and immediately put my mind at ease with his expertise and confidence. Without hesitation, after less than one week, he had resolved my matter. I cannot express the gratitude and thankfulness I feel for the attention and integrity Mr. Emery devoted to this matter. I highly recommend Emery Reddy and absolutely recommend their assistance and services. Should the need ever arise for legal assistance again, I would not hesitate for a moment to contact them. Thank you Tim.

reviews.text:
Do not hire Emery Reddy!
Apparently all these guys cared about was their income from my injury and loss. The lawyers wouldn’t talk and they had a new paralegal probably every week!  hmmmm, I wonder why they had such turnover!?!
I was injured and my car totaled. 100% the other driver’s fault. I hired them to negotiate a settlement and not go to court. They did nothing and did not communicate with me so I thought they dropped my case. Then suddenly they filed suit in my name without even letting me know presumably so they could get a higher % of my payment. The lawyers reviewed my medical records, misunderstood the medical terminology, and wrongly accused me of having a previous surgery and therefore not fully supporting my case. They thought I was not really injured but still have pain and limited movement even a decade later! I had to keep on them to get them to negotiate a settlement to just cover my initial medical cost and loss. I do NOT recommend these guys to anyone!

The team at Emery Reddy displayed a high level of professionalism and demonstrated a deep understanding of the legal complexities surrounding my case.
