Additionally, the level of personal attention and care I received from the entire Emery Reddy team was remarkable. They treated me with respect and empathy, making me feel like more than just a client. This human touch made a significant difference during a challenging time.

I wholeheartedly recommend Emery Reddy to anyone seeking legal representation. Their combination of legal expertise, professionalism, and commitment to client success is truly commendable. If you're looking for a legal team that goes above and beyond, Emery Reddy is the firm for you.

reviews.text: excellent, quality, professional…. has your back ! Thanks Karolina

This law firm is a joke . Super unprofessional. They took my case and NEVER kept me informed. I contacted Emery Reddy PLLC almost 4 YEARS AGO for a wrongful termination employment matter. I was told by the attorney Patrick Reddy and Amanda after an initial consult they wanted to represent me and take my case. I signed all the representation documents, attorney client forms and sent all necessary documents needed to successfully move forward with my case. A demand letter was drafted and sent to the company and I was told they would contact me with an update. A month or two later I received an email on On Jun 30, 2021 that basically said they reached out to the company's in house councel and they woul let me know when they had further updates.

I contacted the firm several times for an update after this but was always told someone would get back to me and no one ever got back to me. I assumed the case wasn't worth their time and they just stopped working on it... Almost 4 years later I get a few random emails from the firm asking me to contact them to talk about my case...I seriously thought it was spam.

After I posted this review about my experience, I received multiple emails from  Patrick threatening  me/  demanding I take my review down or he would say I lied…LOL! There are MULTIPLE reviews identical to mine so I am not the only one that had this experience.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Brittany – we are saddened by your false review. We worked very hard for you, and you unfortunately fell out of touch with our office. You admit to this in your review. I wish we could have helped you, but we can’t help people who do not respond. Imagine going to court and never having talked to your lawyer because you didn’t return their calls and you missed your scheduled appointments. We are also saddened that Google will not allow us to post returned mail we received or a recording that your voicemail is full and we can’t leave a message. We have asked Google to remove your post because it contains attorney-client privileged information.

We tried emailing you several times to remove the false posts (the only thing true about your review), but just as when we represented you, you never responded. We are proud of the free legal work we did for you and truly wish you the best in your future endeavors.

Sincerely,
Emery Reddy

I was referred to Eric after being involved in a near fatal car accident in 2018. I suffered multiple injuries and there was significant damage to my vehicle. Both Eric and his paralegal Hillary were very caring and empathetic of my situation and handled the case quickly and professionally. They responded immediately to my emails and phone calls, and answered all of my questions throughout the process. My car was as good as new in less than a couple of weeks and I was reimbursed loss of use immediately. In the process I was also introduced to a great team of physicians who helped in my recovery. Eric fought tooth and nail with the insurance adjuster so that I was compensated to the extent that I was made whole again. I was very impressed with the service Eric and his team provided. Dealing with the repercussions of a car accident can be very stressful. I highly recommend Eric and his team if you find yourself in this scenario.

I was in a boating accident and hired Eric as my lawyer. There were sensitive aspects of my case that were handled incredibly professionally by Eric and his firm-I was very happy with my experience. VERY EXCELLENT LAWYER!!!!!

I hired Eric Nelson to replace another lawyer who was not handling my car accident case well at all. I've had to hire a lot of lawyers in my life, and Eric by far has been the best I've had the pleasure of working with. He has a very pleasant, soft spoken demeanor, very caring and sensitive to your case, and personal needs. He listens very well, ALWAYS stays in communication if something new arises, makes himself personally available to speak if you call or email him with questions, and is incredibly reliable. Eric is easy to talk to and always knows what's going on with your case at any given moment. I've never ever had difficulty getting to speak personally to Eric, or his assistant Hillary, who is also very reliable and great to work with.
Eric really worked diligently on my case, and saw that I got the absolute maximum award on my case possible (Something I absolutely have not gotten with other lawyers), and am very satisfied with. He knows how and where to be able to negotiate, or do his job to maximize your case award, in ways that other lawyers do not know, or do not want to care to take the time to do. Eric treats you like a real person, in fact even talks to you with a warm, soft,  friendly tone of voice, so that you genuinely feel like more of a family member of his, than a client. Most lawyers try to rush talking to you, if they'll even let you speak to them, and treat you like a number, but Eric was the complete opposite; he treats you and your case with a high degree of personal attention, and you can really trust that he has your best interest at the forefront of his priorities. Lawyers in general have not been something that I have ever found to be easy to work with, trust, get ahold of or even speak to, but Eric Nelson was a major exception to the norm.
I'm incredibly satisfied with the service that Eric Nelson provided me as my car accident attorney, mostly because of how pleasant he was to work with, how easy he was to talk to, the warm and polite way he treated me, how patient he was, how hard he worked on my case, his attention to detail, constant knowledge of the specifics and details of my case at any given moment, and the overall manner in which he treated me like a close friend or family member, NOT a number, or stranger, or burden. In addition to the way he treated me, he truly did maximize the award I got from my case, far more so than other lawyers I've hired. Most lawyers in my experience just try to get you in the door, and quickly out with a small award, and treat you like a number, as they rely on hiring tons of clients, getting them small awards and relying on their volume of clients to sustain their business instead of maximizing the client's award, or getting them what they deserve. Eric was the absolute opposite. His level of personal care was extremely high, I was never ever treated like a number, and he wanted to get me every penny he could, and for this I am very thankful.
If you want a PLEASANT experience with a lawyer who's going to exceed your expectations, treat you warmly, always make himself free to talk to you whenever you call,  and absolutely get you the highest award possible for your case, then I HIGHLY recommend Eric Nelson to be your lawyer. I guarantee that if I have another personal injury or car accident case that I need legal representation on that Eric will be the first person I call, and I will HIGHLY recommend him to friends and family.
Overall, I was incredibly impressed, and incredibly satisfied with every element of the service that Eric provided for me while working on my case. He is by far the best attorney I've hired, and like I mentioned, I've had to hire a lot of attorneys in my life, who practice a variety of areas of law, and in different parts of the country, but Eric has definitely been my favorite for all of the reasons I've mentioned.
Trust your gut and hire Eric Nelson if you need his type of legal representation.

His experience speaks for itself, but what really sets Ed apart is that he cares. That combination of deep expertise and real human warmth is hard to find in any profession, let alone law.

reviews.text:
I had been fired by my employer the day I returned from FMLA leave and offered a small severance of just a few weeks pay to walk away. I knew I was being illegally fired and discriminated against as a person with multiple disabilities. I sought to find a lawyer to help me negotiate a more appropriate deal for my employer’s actions against me. I had a solid case, and still after calling about 10 lawyers, I was having trouble finding someone who would take on my employer.

Just 15 minutes after speaking with one of Ed’s associates, on a Friday evening, I received a call from Ed himself who was more than ready and happy to work on my case! He prepared and sent over an excellent counter offer so quickly and was very thorough with reviewing all the case information in just a couple days!

As my employer proved to be a difficult company to tangle with, Ed was always confident, ready to fight, meticulous and methodical. No tricks or scare attempts wavered his confidence in fighting for what’s right even as my ex-employer said “go ahead and sue us”

Over the next ten months Ed brought in another excellent lawyer to assist with my case and made sure that every move made was always in my best interests. He was always keeping me updated and informed and was so patient in answering my questions, helping me prepare for a deposition, and finally with settling the lawsuit for a hefty sum of money.

He’s a wonderful, friendly and charming person, and even more impressive as a lawyer! I am so happy that I had his partnership in the fight against discrimination and couldn’t have chosen a better lawyer to trust with my case.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for this wonderful review. We're honored you trusted us with your case during such a difficult time. Ed and our team take great pride in fighting for workplace justice and employee rights. Your perseverance throughout the process was inspiring, and we're delighted we could help secure a positive outcome. Success stories like yours remind us why this work matters. We wish you all the best moving forward.

I could tell that he would be able to organize my case expertly, and he knew what he was doing. He explained everything to me in detail, and simplified my case for me to easily understand the options. I knew I was in good hands immediately! Next I spoke with Vera, and she is obviously an expert in employment law, but more than that, she is an expert in strategy. She explained what our options were, and we discussed the best way to proceed. She was correct about each step and approach. She knows when to be aggressive, and when to negotiate.  I have had to use an attorney a few times in my life, and none of them compare to Vera’s natural ability to leverage the law. Knowing that this team had my back was more than a relief, and I was so grateful that I called them. They kept me informed throughout the entire process, and patiently relayed options that we agreed would be the best way to move forward. In the end, they expertly navigated a best case scenario for me and I  could not be happier. Call this team, they genuinely care about getting you the best outcome and will work to make it happen!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words!  We are happy we could help you with your employment matter. It was a pleasure working with you!

reviews.text: Vera Fomina to put it simply is AMAZING.  She is reasonable, fair, and thorough.  She clearly explains the pro's and cons.  She remains calm, confident, and strong.  I could not have been happier with the outcome or my interactions with her.  She did everything she would do & more.

Vera brought her A game in our wrongful termination suit resulting in a great outcome. She asked the right questions and saw the points of leverage at every interaction. She had persistence and patience throughout. I’m glad she was on our side.

reviews.text: Thank you so much, attorney Raymundo, for my hit-and-run case. I am also very grateful to Roberto Salas and John Interserse for their excellent service and their boldness in resolving my difficult case.

Thank you so much, attorney Raymundo, for your help in my son Brandon's case. He was run over due to his employer's negligence. Thank you for your miracles, and thank you to Roberto Salas and John Meyers for their expertise in the case.

Four years ago, I was in a very serious car accident when a police officer hit me. A friend referred me to a lawyer, but I didn't feel safe or comfortable with them because they just had me sign something and then I never heard from them again. It was a very serious and complex case, so I decided to search on my own for many law firms where I would feel safe and supported. I eventually found Reymundo Bishop Legal. I took the time to read all the client reviews and noticed that most of them had positive things to say. I decided to schedule appointments with them, and from the first day until now, four years later, I can personally vouch for them as an incredible law firm, professional in every sense. For four years, they were always attentive to everyone, communicating with me frequently without me having to reach out, and when I needed to talk to them, they were there. Today, I have finished my legal process, which at first felt incredibly difficult and complex, and I can say that I finished it with excellent support, with a big smile on my face, and above all, with the peace I always wanted to have after such a difficult process. I wholeheartedly thank attorney John Meyers for his excellent experience in the field. He is one of the best—professional, reliable, and above all, attentive to each client's needs, providing personalized service. I also wholeheartedly thank attorney Roberto Salas. He was the cornerstone of my entire case. From day one, his confidence and clarity made me feel I was in the right place. Then, by speaking to me in Spanish and communicating with me in detail, he always made me feel confident. Even in my most difficult moments, Roberto was there not only as a professional attorney but, more than that, as a friend who understood me and reaffirmed that I was in the right place. There are so many things I want to say about how incredible John and Roberto were, but the only thing I can say with certainty is that they are the best. I wholeheartedly recommend them. They are a blessing.

Nicia Torres and her team are extremely competent and professional. She is dedicated, highly qualified, and truly willing to go the distance to fight for her clients. The entire office treats every client with care and compassion while consistently working to achieve the best possible results in every case. I highly recommend her services.

reviews.text:
I have never had a legal case before so I don’t know how it compares to another lawyer. But Bishop Legal did recently win a settlement for me regarding an accident in which it was very clearly the fault of the other driver. My van was barely moving when suddenly a huge pickup truck slammed into me from the opposite lane and caused my van to twist around full it was facing the opposite direction. Air bag went off, and my van had so much body damage along side and rear that it was declared “totaled”. My injury was not life threatening but required a few months of physical therapy for me .
The other driver admitted on the scene to their own careless driving, and the accident report clearly stated it was his fault.  but then they stalled on paying my insurance company for the vehicle loss until that company sued them. I decided to file a lawsuit for my lost time and the difficulty of replacing my car (rentals and mechanics, needing to buy a used car of lesser value due to the suoer high used car market of that year. I was glad when I got a referral to Bishop Legal who agreed to take my case even though it wasn’t millions of dollars. It took a long time due to slow cooperation from the other party but I think the settlement we were able to get was probably fair compensation and I sure was not able to get any adequate response from the other party on my own.  I worked with Alex who was consistently and clearly communicating with me at each stage.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for taking the time to share such a thoughtful review. We’re really glad we worked with you as our client and that we were able to help you navigate a difficult and frustrating situation, especially when the other party was uncooperative.

Your case is a great example of why we believe every client deserves strong representation. We’re pleased with the settlement reached and that having legal support made a real difference for you.

We truly appreciate your trust in our team and wish you all the best moving forward. If you ever need assistance in the future, we’re here to help.

I recently contacted Herschensohn Law with questions after a car accident, and attorney Zach Herschensohn personally recorded a detailed voice memo in response. He clearly explained when it makes sense to hire a personal injury lawyer, what to watch out for when dealing with insurance companies, and how to protect my rights if symptoms appear days after the crash. I really appreciated how straightforward and practical his advice was, and he broke everything down in a way that was easy to understand. It was also reassuring to hear directly from an experienced attorney who took the time to address each of my questions instead of giving a generic answer. Based on this interaction, I feel informed, supported, and confident that I could trust Zach and his firm to handle a personal injury claim.

Zach was able to break down a complex issue regarding commercial fishing and maritime law into easy to understand terms. He not only explained how the statutes applied, but the history behind them and how they came into being.

While searching for a personal injury lawyer in my area, I came across Herschensohn Law Firm. I reached out to the them with questions and concerns I had and to my surprise, Mr. Herschensohn actually replied with a long detailed voice memo, going above and beyond to answer all my questions, without giving me a sales pitch. He was very real and honest and won my business.

Zach was very personable and thorough. Weaving his personal experience in with relevant information to answer my questions left me with a good idea of who he is and how he would represent me in a personal injury case.

I spoke to Zach regarding whether or not I would have a claim.  He answered my questions immediately, thoroughly and knew exactly what I would need to be able to file a personal injury claim.  It helps to have someone in your court and Zach is that person.  I would highly recommend Herschensohn Law Firm based on the strong leadership of Zach, their three lawyers and their support team!

After reading the great reviews of Hershensohn I contacted him to see if there's a statute of limitations on medical malpractice cases and unfortunatley there is.  Zach was very kind and knowledgeable and seemed like he truly wanted to help, but unfortunately I was too late.  I'm in Kitsap County, and he said yes, he does represent clients here.  If I ever have the unfortunate situation of needing represented I'll defintely call him again.  I really appreciated his time.

I called law offices and no one responded or wanted to help me. I spoke to one Attorney and he said he would take my case if I provided him information and when I did give him what he needed, he dropped me.

My back pain wasn't getting better and I had to pay for medical expenses out of pocket.  I contacted Weier Law Firm and they scheduled a time to talk with me.

I remember my first phone call with Attorney Paul Apple, he was professional and took the time to hear my story and what I was going through.  Paul asked me to provide him a few things and that was it, his team handled the rest.  I was relieved that he took my case, he said "focus on feeling better, that's all I want you to do, we're going to take care of everything." As the case progressed, Paul was thorough and explained every step in the process as well as the expectations. I'm beyond grateful for Paul and his team, their services were outstanding.

reviews.text: These guys turned me down without even talking to me first. I was fired for no reason. Then not paid while on paid leave then I was fired 3 days after I say I'm going to file an l and I claim. Then my employee fights my unemployment so I'm denied that. I appeal and I win my appeal so how do I not have a case. I have gone through hell and I nearly lost everything because I have been paid in months. I guess that doesn't qualify for a case. I probably should have given 1 star. If things change I'll change me review.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for sharing your experience, and we are incredibly sorry for the hardship you have faced over the last few months. We know how vital that unemployment income is, and we are very glad you won your appeal.

That said, there is often a misconception that winning an unemployment hearing equates to having a strong case for employment claims, such as wrongful termination. Unfortunately, that is not how the law works. To win a civil lawsuit for claims like discrimination or wage theft, the evidence must meet a completely different and much stricter set of legal standards than what is required to receive unemployment benefits.

Even though we could not take your case, we recognize the difficulty of your situation and wish you the very best in your financial recovery.

reviews.text:
Was wrongfully terminated using retaliation and intimidation tactics.  I was deposed in a case against my boss for same behaviors, then fired.  Crosner Legal rejected my case without even having an intake call with me.  Unethical and lazy representation.

If they make decisions this way...what will they do when it gets tough during the case.

I would encourage folks to seek out another attorney...one that is going to hear a potential client out before making a decision.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Saperstein, thank you for sharing your thoughts. We appreciate that seeking legal help during such a stressful time is not easy, and we understand that you are disappointed that we could not take your case.

Regarding your feedback on our intake process: We receive a high volume of inquiries daily. To be respectful of everyone's time, our team reviews the detailed information provided in the initial submission first. If the specific facts do not meet our firm’s current criteria for representation, we notify the individual promptly. This is not done out of "laziness," but to provide a quick answer so you can continue your search for the right counsel without unnecessary delay.

We realize this was not the outcome you hoped for, but declining a case is an ethical decision we must make when we believe we are not the right fit. We wish you the best in finding the representation you deserve.

reviews.text:
Navigating the aftermath of an accident can be an overwhelming and stressful ordeal, filled with uncertainty and concern for both personal well-being and the complex logistics that follow. When I found myself in the unenviable position of filing an accident claim, I was fortunate to encounter a company whose professionalism, empathy, and expertise transformed a daunting process into a manageable, and even reassuring experience.
From my very first interaction with Gaylord Claims, the company impressed me with their responsiveness and thoroughness. It was clear that their priority was not only resolving my claim but also ensuring my comfort and understanding throughout the process. Throughout the journey, communication was consistent and clear. Updates were provided regularly, and I was always kept in the loop regarding the progress of my claim.
What truly sets Gaylord Claims apart is their commitment to a customer-centric approach. At no point did I feel like "just another case file." The team demonstrated genuine empathy, taking the time to check in on my well-being and address any concerns I had about the process or my recovery. They understood that an accident can have repercussions far beyond the immediate physical or material loss, and they strove to provide reassurance, guidance, and support at every turn.
I cannot recommend this company highly enough for anyone facing the aftermath of an accident. If you are seeking a trustworthy partner to guide you through the claims process, advocate for your interests, and treat you with respect and compassion, look no further. They have earned my highest praise, and I am grateful for the peace of mind and justice they provided.

Excellent Service from Gaylord Claims

Gaylord Claims made the entire process smooth and stress-free. Their team was professional, responsive, and genuinely helpful every step of the way. I felt supported and well-informed throughout. Highly recommend!

I have no clue how Gaylord Claims has these high reviews beside that they must be buying them or encouraging fake reviews from friends/family. To avoid doxing myself, I won’t go into details but they are absolutely unprofessional on so many levels. They are not lawyers and I was relieved to switch to an actual lawyer to handle my case after dealing with these people for far too long.

**Update 08/05**
This is NOT a fake review. This is a review from someone who wants to maintain a certain level of privacy. The way that you’re responding to my negative google review  is very telling of how you manage your overall google reviews. To be clear, I’m sure you *can* be good at what you do but from my experience and other’s I’ve spoken to, this isn’t the general consensus. Trying to obtain service from your company is not a risk I would’ve taken if I had known of this beforehand.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We have no client named Leah Kitt, we have never had a client named Leah Kitt. This is a fake review!! I've requested Google to remove this single review posting...and they will do it. We work with Styles Law to charge 25% and we are good at what we do...and proud of it!! So we will make sure the "fake" reviewer...goes away :)

Update 08/07/2024...my name is Jason Gaylord and I'm the owner of this company. Whoever this “anonymous” person is they never reached out to me with a complaint or frustration with our service. Instead of being honorable and voicing any type of concern…they created a "fake" profile to protect "themselves" while feeling comfortable defaming my company. They also talk about knowing other clients of mine who are dissatisfied? A general consensus? Really? Sounds a lot like a competitor not a real reviewer. If you're real...my email is jason@gaylordclaims.com and I encourage you reach out to me and offer feedback on how we can do things differently or better. Otherwise I assure you your review will be deleted within 30 days.

reviews.text: I contacted Grady Martin back in 2012 for help in Workers Comp case. After short preparation representing myself I appealed the BIIA decision to Superior Court where I was awarded additional $16K of my wages. Despite he didn’t want to represent me the first time before I left his office he promised to take the case when financial part will be taking care of. So taking his early promise as an honest one I called him again in the same claim but different issue to heard then get in writing that he “is unable to represent… at this time” again. But “fell free to contact me again if you situation changes” he wrote in his letter. After I thought my situation changed significantly I called him to retain representation in same workers comp case, but this time he made definitive sound that he will not represent me. I think it is multi structural phobia and deep prejudice mix with criminal mind. Saying so I’ve to pointed that lawyer who may see fraud and doesn’t act upon should be not only question, but also hold responsible.

They all were more than happy to take my money - but none really were interested in diving in or digging into the details of the case which was at the heart of the matter.

Ms Long immediately put me at ease in our initial consultation. She could completely relate to my experiences as a mother, being mother herself. She genuinely could relate to my situation and was interested in the details and understood how they played an impact in my case. What more, she impressed me with her depth and breath of knowledge where woman fall through the gaps where the law is concerned.

Her compassion, support, and empathy made it easy to share difficult personal details without feeling judged, guilty, or embarrassed. She called out and highlighted events and actions that took place with my case no one else saw which reassured me that my case was in good hands.

I highly recommend contacting Kendra Long if you’re facing and/or confronted with any liability matters that disregard your rights as a woman - especially if you’re a single working mother. She is amazing and will go to the mat to fight for you.

I was served with a civil action the day after Christmas, which created an extremely short and stressful timeline with two holiday weekends before having to appear in court. This was the first time I had ever been served with anything, and it came out of the blue following the end of a very short personal relationship. I had never been involved in anything like this before, so I took the matter extremely seriously and had a lot of anxiety about what to expect.

Even before I formally hired him, Albert spent a great deal of time over Christmas weekend talking through my situation, helping me understand what was happening, and walking me through my potential options. That early time and attention made a real impression and helped me feel confident that he was the right person to help me navigate what was ahead.

Once we moved forward, Albert helped me stay focused, understand the process, and advocate for myself during a very compressed and high-pressure period. Having his guidance during that window made a meaningful difference, especially when emotions and uncertainty were running high.

In the end, he helped achieve a favorable result, with the case being dismissed. I appreciated Albert’s professionalism, calm approach, and steady presence throughout a challenging experience, and I’m grateful for the support he provided when it mattered most.
Alberto is a great person; he helps you a lot with any problems you have and is very professional. I recommend him 100%.
Mr. Guadagno and his team are the best. Never met an attorney that is so kind and caring. Highly recommend him and Alex. Thank you!!!

I hired this law firm for a restraining-order case in 2022 and paid $5,000. In my experience, the representation was extremely minimal; mainly paperwork filings, with no real challenge to the opposing party’s false and contradictory claims.

The other party’s statements included serious inaccuracies (for example, alleging I was “stalking” while I was verifiably overseas, and claiming to have hired a “private investigator” without producing any report or proof in her court filings). I provided my attorney with documentation that disproved these claims, but it was never used or mentioned in court.

I expected a defense that would highlight factual inconsistencies and protect my reputation. Instead, the case was handled passively, as if the goal was simply to move it through the system. I felt unheard and unprotected, and the final outcome didn’t reflect the evidence I had.

This review reflects my personal experience and opinion only. I’m sharing it so others understand the level of engagement and advocacy I received.

Mr Guadagnos  knowledge of the law and sharp negotiations skills was what i needed in my case. Mr Guadagno went above and beyond showing genuine empathy towards me and my case during a very stressful and many restless nights. I highly recommend Mr Guadagno and his team, my overall experience 10 out of 10.

Whether you're seeking legal representation for the first time or considering a change from previous counsel, I highly recommend Mr. Albert Guadagno.

When I began my search for an attorney, I compiled a list and even used a service to help identify potential candidates. However, many of the options presented did not align with the specific expertise I needed. Understanding the seriousness and complexity of my situation, I knew that having the right attorney—someone thorough, experienced, and strategic—would be essential.

Mr. Guadagno took the time to carefully review all of the documentation I provided and brought a depth of legal knowledge and courtroom experience that made a real difference in my case. His ability to understand the nuances of the law and present a compelling argument ultimately led to a favorable outcome—a successful denial of the petitioner’s claim.

What sets Mr. Guadagno apart is his dual experience as both a prosecutor and a defense attorney. This well-rounded perspective gives him an exceptional ability to anticipate and respond to a wide range of legal challenges with confidence and clarity.

If you're unsure of whom to trust with your legal matter, I encourage you to contact Mr. Albert Guadagno. His professionalism, insight, and results-driven approach speak for themselves.

I had the privilege of working with Albert Guadagno and I can confidently say that they are an exceptional legal professional. From the very first consultation in 2023, Albert stepped in and took the time to listen to my concerns and explained everything clearly, ensuring I understood all my options and next steps moving forward.

What truly stood out to me was his attention to detail, responsiveness, and dedication to my case. Even after 2 years, Albert kept me updated regularly, answered my questions promptly, and always approached everything with integrity and professionalism. Thanks to Albert, I felt safe-guarded and the outcome was a breath of fresh air.
I highly recommend Albert to anyone in need of skilled and compassionate legal representation. He truly goes above and beyond for his clients, and I am incredibly grateful for his services.

After reading the police report I knew I would win the case as the report didn’t match the what the video had shown. I told Mr. Guadogono to get the video and I could show him that I had not committed the infraction I was charged with. Mr. Gagging told me some story about how I couldn’t watch the video based on something about the prosecution. He told me that he had seen the video but did not want to go into detail about what he had seen only that he had this under control. Long story short he had not seen the video nor even asked the DA for this evidence that would have saved me. This attorney did absolutely nothing to help my case. I’m sure a public defender would have gotten this dismissed. Attorney told me how I was wrong for getting myself in a position where I could be charged for this. He then berated me by saying he wasn’t the one who did this, or who said that. If he wood have done his job the way he was supposed to I works have gotten off. Since he never saw the video, how does he get off saying anything about me being in the wrong place at the wrong time? I find out after my case that if I asked to see the evidence from which I was being charged with I have a right to see it. I asked to see the video and this attorney did not allow me to see it. Again my case would have been dropped.

One other thing, this attorney gave me transcripts of a current DV case he’s on with victims and defendants names. This transcript of the accounts are very private and personal. What if this was your case he let slip through his fingers and end up in someone’s email inbox? If you want I will take a snapshot of it and post it to another rating.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi James,
I regret you are disappointed with the settlement of your workers’ compensation claim. Unfortunately, workers’ compensation benefits are financially limited and do not include any recovery for pain and suffering, or loss of enjoyment. Furthermore, the value of a claim is further limited by the strength of the medical evidence. With respect to “hidden costs”, please understand that pursuant to the State and Federal Rules of Professional Conduct, clients are always responsible for costs. I am happy to more fully discuss the reasons for the outcome of your case and the associated costs at your convenience. Please also recall injured workers have 7 years from the date of the closing order to file for reopening in the event claim related conditions objectively worsen. This could result in additional future benefits.
Please feel free to contact me directly to more fully address your concerns.
Kind regards,
Christine

reviews.text:
The complicated road to justice and fairness can be long and confusing. In my own case I found I was up against two powerful adversaries who have decades of experience in putting up roadblocks to my receiving just and fair compensation. I was in fear of losing my way, getting lost on this road and never finding justice or fairness.
I made the decision to retain the services of Foster Law to help guide me on my journey. Immediately I felt the fear start to subside. Their professionalism, knowledge of the law, and compassion for my situation were and are outstanding.
Christine Foster has the wisdom to surround herself with the best group of people I could have hoped for to champion my complicated case(s).
My inquires as to the status of the roadblocks presented by my adversaries as well as legality concerns with the case(s) were answered in a timely, informational, and professional way.
I have seen the fearless stance, tenacious follow ups, and professional manner in which my Champions face off with the  giant corporations that oppose me.
I have no doubt that if you decide to let Christine and her dedicated associates represent you that you too will find your way along the sometimes complicated and confusing road to justice and fairness.

The people at Foster Law went above and beyond what I expected as they helped me with my case. Thank you, Christine, for taking the time to really understand what I needed in order to get the settlement I deserved. Want results? Call Christine!

reviews.text: 3 weeks I was waiting answer from them. After 3 weeks they told me that they are not going to take my case because.... they DON'T HAVE TIME!!!! Really? I lost 3 weeks. I am sure that L&I is happy.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Man on the Map.  I'm sorry that we were unable to assist you.  Unfortunately, it can take weeks for us to receive the claim file from the Department.  It is so frustrating. Once we receive a claim file, however, my office can usually review it within a couple of days and get back to a potential client. It's always best if a potential client provides us a copy of the claim file and medical records.  Litigation is expensive and risky so we want to make sure we have as much information as possible before getting involved in a case. The Rules of Professional Conduct also require us to ensure we have a viable legal basis to pursue a claim.  Again, I regret we were unable to assist you as your legal representative.  Best wishes - Christine Foster

reviews.text: The start of my case was a bit slow, which could have been from changes in their paralegals, but once Rebekah started helping out things started moving quickly and efficiently. I was abroad during some of the time, but they were willing to work with my schedule and call me to make sure they had all of my statements and correct info on file. Rachel was unsure what the final amount would be in my settlement, as the major company kept lowballing our returns. Maybe it was the long case, but Rachel was able to secure a significant settlement for my case in the end. They also helped settle my doctor's fees, which while abroad was hard to contact. I appreciate all the hard work Rachel and Rebekah had to do. Would recommend!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the review Joya! We agree that Rebekah is an amazing addition to the team. Glad we could get a positive result for you and make the insurance company pay up!

reviews.text: Excellent personal service from Tony and his staff! Knowledgable and thorough.

Mr. Otto and his team are amazing. My case was a tricky one. But through the entire process mr. Otto and his team gave great care and concern to my situation. In the end I came out on top and actually received more of a settlement then I had anticipated.

I've known Tony for 8 years.  He has shown himself to be an individual with extremely high moral and ethical attributes.  Even in personal situations, he is the type of guy to dot every "i" and cross every "t".  He is also an eloquent writer and speaker who cares deeply for the people he represents.  If I ever need a lawyer, I know who to call!

Mr. Otto is an outstanding attorney in every way.  He is professional.  He is highly skilled.  He is extremely knowledgeable in his field of law.  He is trustworthy, reliable, and honorable.

When my husband and I needed an attorney after having an unfavorable experience with another attorney, we asked our friends and acquaintances for recommendations.  Mr. Otto was the attorney who was recommended over and over.  We were extremely impressed and pleased with his representation of us in court.  He listens; he questions; he assesses; he recommends; he practices the ART of law.  If and when we need an attorney again, Mr. Otto will be the attorney we retain.  We trust Mr. Otto implicitly.

He was also was my attorney and I am shocked at the last review I read. He is a fabulous attorney going out of his way to be a honest fair attorney. His staff and him went out of there way to make sure my sister and I got the care we needed. I'm telling you facts. The facts are you will not find a better attorney in Tacoma Seattle or the whole N.W. I have not been put by anyone to write this I am just someone they helped. Thank you so much for everything you did do for me and my sister.  God bless you and your staff.
Jennifer Naylon

Our experience with Otto was the most Unprofessional and Pathetic we have ever had with a supposed professional. My 3 children and I were involved in an accident with a man who lived in Texas but came to Washington and borrowed his daughter's car and crashed into us.They both had their own insurances. Otto never filed against the daughter's insurance telling us that he did not know if he could file against the daughter's insurance because the father borrowed the daughter's car and it usually is the other way around, the child borrowing the parent's car. He would look into this and let us know what he found. 5 years later Otto still has no idea if he could have filed.Or he says that. We found out very easily we could have and it should have been the first insurance to file against. When he told my wife and I this it was 3 months beyond the time frame to file. Was that a lie? We have to believe it was,the first of many with Otto. How could an attorney with 30 years of experience not know this? He told me that he lost me out of a  possible large settlement because he did not file in time.He then steered the conversation elsewhere so I would not be upset. He is very good at making you very confused. He told my wife and I he was going to give us the whole settlement. Obviously because he knew he messed up tremendously. When it came time to give us the money he lied  again and said he did not remember. When confronted later he finally remembered and said it was contingent upon a lot of variables. LIAR ,there was no variables and I have a witness. My wife. He delayed 2 of my children's cases for a year with no communication to them at all during that time. When asked why the delay he blamed me. Saying there were issues between us. If there was why did he not let his clients know of this? How long was he going to delay them? Yet my third child in the accident asked him how he could work on her case during the same time frame that he said  he could not work on her siblings case? He went blank stared at the ceiling trying to think of a way out of this LIE and could not and finally said he was totally responsible for everything. Only when he got caught in his lie did he admit the truth.Do anything to make it right? NO WAY. He actually billed my 2 children for things during that same time frame he said he could not do anything. That is unethical. He admitted he did not do anything but he still tried to get money for nothing? SICKENING and PATHETIC.Our experience with this unprofessional person was HORRENDOUS. He lied to us so many times we do not know when he is telling us the truth. If he saw my children in the store is when he would tell them to call his office and set up a meeting as he had more info on their cases. Ridiculous. He tries to come across as your friend but the whole time we found him a deceitful liar. He did not keep his promises, he delayed our cases, he lied and deceived us all so much we will never use his services again even if he was the last attorney on this planet.
reviews.ownerResponse: This claim resulted in policy limits payments of all available insurance from two policies, to four claimants.  The defendant/at-fault-party was poor and could pay nothing from his own funds.  We even waived some of our fee to increase the payments to the clients.  Sometimes people just cannot be made happy, despite best efforts.

reviews.text: I had a great experience with Multani Law Group after my car accident. The team was professional, responsive, and kept me updated and informed throughout the entire process. They handled everything with the insurance company and all I had to do some focus on treatment and recovering. Got a very fair settlement with Jashan’s help. I truly felt like they cared about my case and my recovery. Highly recommend if you need a car accident lawyer!
Great experience especially being in Burien and contacting the office was very easy!

I had an excellent experience with Multani Law Group. From the very beginning, their team was professional, responsive, and genuinely cared about my situation. They took the time to explain every step of the process clearly and made sure I felt confident and informed throughout my case.

Communication was outstanding, and they handled everything efficiently and with integrity. I truly appreciate their dedication and hard work. If you are looking for a reliable and knowledgeable car accident attorney, I highly recommend Multani Law Group.

The team at Multani Law Group helped me out with great results for a car accident I had. After my consultation I didn’t need to do anything else but just recover. They communicated well, gave me updates and got results faster than expected.

Thank you for the five-star review. It means a lot to know our efforts made a difference for you.

reviews.text: My overall experience with multani law group was very amazing. Staff is very knowledgable experienced and trustworthy. I really recommend it to everyone.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for trusting Multani Law Group and for sharing your experience. We’re glad we could be of help.

reviews.text: I recently had the pleasure of working with Christopher Conley at Ryan, Swanson & Cleveland.  He is efficient, a great communicator and honest.  If I am in the unfortunate position of having to seek litigation advice again, I will undoubtably give him a ring.

I have had the privilege of working with Chris Conley on multiple occasions and he is an exceptional attorney.  If you need a great attorney for a crop insurance dispute, I highly recommend him.

Gary Heilig
Crop West Insurance Inc.

Eleven years ago, Amy Royalty was my lawyer when I applied for a Green Card, and the process was smooth. I didn’t hesitate to ask her for help with my naturalization, and it was the best decision for me.
The Ryan, Swanson & Cleveland team are amazing!
They are committed to providing excellent service, and I always felt supported by a knowledgeable and experienced team
The team consistently demonstrates attention to detail, responds promptly to communications, and remains attentive to client needs.
My Oath of Allegiance ceremony is scheduled to take place in ten days.
I am deeply grateful to the entire team, and especially to Amy.
I highly recommend their service.

There are few moments in life more daunting than facing a complex legal surprise when you least expect it. Our ordeal began when we moved into our “dream home” in Seattle, only to discover that it was unfinished and far below the standard promised.  When the construction team refused to address or resolve the deficiencies, it became an overwhelming and disheartening experience.  In the midst of this chaos, we found the team of Gretchen Hoog and Matt Audish at Ryan, Swanson & Cleveland. From our first meeting, they brought clarity and reassurance. Gretchen and Matt expertly guided us through our real estate ordeal, helping us achieve a successful resolution at a reasonable cost. They worked diligently to minimize the disruption to our lives.  Their honesty, efficiency, and the genuine care throughout the process sets them apart. They became trusted partners—advocating for our interests and helping us make the best decisions in the most economical way possible.
While we hope never to face a similar situation, we are 100% certain that Gretchen and Matt would be our first call if we needed legal assistance in the future. We wholeheartedly recommend their services. They are amazing!

I had a good experience with this law firm when my husband and I retained an attorney from them. She was easy to talk to and took time to explain things. I didn't talk to her as much as my husband did, but I did have two conference call with her and felt that she cared. She not just do it for a living. Some attorneys, like therapists, don't listen to you and make you feel like they care. She was different though, her name was Jo Flannery if you want to request to work with her.

Sometimes I feel like people lose patient with me in a professional setting because I am ESL, but Jo would break things down so I could understand everything. So if English is your second language, she could be a good pick for you at this law firm. They have attorneys with different specialty. I needed one for real estate and she knew all the laws very well.

I retained Jo Flannery roughly two months ago. She offered great counsel with a free consultation when I first met her. Much of what she told me was done succinctly and in a time efficient manner, but not like she was trying to rush me off the phone. And not as if she was trying to run out the clock either. This pleasant manner in which she spoke persisted even after I retained her for all paid phone consults as well. This detail matters. Here is why.

I have retained many attorneys in my life. Some, no matter how much they like or help you, speak to you in a manner that makes you feel like they want to get off the phone with you. That is not the case with Jo Flannery.

On the other end of the spectrum, some over explain things during consults that are billed by a timer. Or they speak too slowly. Or I had an insurance attorney at one point that would repeat himself. And while these criticisms sound harsh, time is of the essence when you are billed upwards of $400/$500 an hour. Jo's cadence and delivery of information makes her time worth what she charges while still giving you a feeling that she is speaking with you like a friend who is an attorney would.

Communication is excellent. I have had one of the best attorneys out of San Diego that could walk circles around prosecutors, but sometimes he wouldn't get back to you with emails. Sometimes he wouldn't return your call. He was very busy and did have a paralegal, but it was admittingly frustrating at times. That is not the case with Jo. Every email I have sent her was responded to or read and archived if no response was needed. If she is out of the office, an automated reply will tell you so.

Knowledge is on point. Some attorneys are very resourceful with statues, laws and penal codes, but off the top of their head, they may not be so quick to have the answers. Not once in the 4+ hours of communication I had with Jo did she say she needed to look into something or research for an answer. Surely there are times she may need to, she isn't a computer. But she certainly is knowledgeable and proficient in law.

Her background and experience was very relatable to the services I needed her help with. I was in a situation of needing to work with over half the condo complex I live in to retake the HOA board. She was available to help. Supplied proxy forms, letters and valuable information. She even attended the special meeting she helped us get the prior Board of Directors to schedule after they ignored our initial request.

Her availability is excellent. If you work long shifts during the business hours, she will accommodate you to schedule phone consults after hours. She is there for you when you need her.

The outcome I was striving for could not have happened without Jo Flannery at Ryan, Swanson & Cleveland. And I owe her much gratitude for what she helped me and over 40 of my neighbors accomplish. I couldn't imagine trying to correspond with the oppositions legal counsel. He was educated on Condo Law to a great degree and it would have been so difficult to win with his representation of the prior board. Which made it all the more satisfying when Jo ended up educating HIM on what he thought he knew everything about.

She will win for you.  When I first met her, she was honest with me and told me she doesn't have a magic wand or anything. But that doesn't mean what she does for you won't seem magical.

Almost a year ago I found my business in a position that threatened our financial viability due to the actions of a third party. I began the search for a new business lawyer and interviewed half a dozen firms without feeling as though they would be the right fit. Two minutes into my conversation with David Betz, I knew he was the perfect lawyer to represent our interests. Since then, Mr. Betz has become an integral part of our business operations. Not only was he successful in negotiating the original matter we brought him on for, but he has remained a close legal advisor and wealth of knowledge and advice. Mr. Betz communicates thoroughly, acts promptly, and approaches all matters with professionalism and expertise.

Christopher Young
Owner

Appreciated a timely and thorough response from this law firm on a commercial insurance matter for my company. Mr. Graff was a great resource and helped us navigate a complex legal issue adeptly. Thanks!
I worked with Ryan, Swanson& Cleveland on my green card case. My paralegal Allison and lawyer Marsha have been going above and beyond on my case and delivering outstanding work.

I am lucky to have been represented by Ryan, Swanson, & Cleveland twice now. Janet Cheetham and Jeng-Ya Chen are excellent attorney who have been helping me navigate the legal waters, and have twice now successfully assisted me in obtaining my visa. Their expertise and flexibility are impressive, and I highly recommend their services. Thank you guys!

Updating this to note that Janeyt and Jen also successfully helped me obtain a green card in phenomenally short time frames.

I had the pleasure of working with Marsha and Allison. They were the dream team - patient, responsive, informative and consultative with all our immigration needs. With their expertise, we were able to complete our case in record time. I am so thankful we partnered with them alongside Shannon and Robert which made the whole process seamless - I don’t think I’ve ever used this alongside a legal process but 10/10 will recommend them. Thank you team for your amazing work on our case - I am truly grateful for you all!
Retired from that great firm in 2000.

I'm a Canadian citizen who has been working in the US on and off for a dozen years. After I had some problems with a different lawyer, my father recommended that I work with Joel Paget. Wow -- what a difference! Joel and his team are completely on the ball, and he knows immigration law inside-out. They were also just a pleasure to work with.

Whatever hitches came up, including conflicting information from my employer's lawyers, Joel was right there to put things right. As soon as I started working with him six or seven years ago, I just knew that I could stop worrying about things and trust that Joel would take care of it all. He did, and could always see all the possible problems miles down the road and tip me off about how to avoid them.  Just this past week, we found out that the last bit of immigration work I've needed him for has come through successfully.

Also, every time I told him I was crossing the border, he urged me to take his cell phone number just in case. I really felt looked after with Joel.

Thank you, Joel! You're a true professional.

I had the pleasure of working with Janet and Allison. They made the entire process so easy and comfortable. I was given proactive and timely updates on every step of the process. They explained everything I needed to complete in very simple terms and gave me alternatives where they expected a hurdle. Overall it was delightful to work with them, I highly recommend them!

I worked with Jeng-Ya and Lara and I had an incredible experience. I left it to them from the very beginning and simply watch the process. They were in charge and led me to victory!  I was a F1 and file for AOS based on Dv lottery. I filled in February 2023 and received my green card in July 2023. ( Note: I started the process with KCC on my own and then my case was left to USCIS to handle since I did not want to go back to my country of origin. That is when I contacted the firm).
I must admit that the price is high but quality comes with a cost. I knew that this was an incredible opportunity and did not want to miss it because of a stupid/ small error. So, I sacrifice and close my eyes on the cost.
If you can afford ( or can fight to afford ) their services, I will say go for it!! They know US immigration!
They are HIGLY responsive to email and Jeng will even reply to an email I send at 10 PM sometimes. They will also see updates much quicker than me ( like biometrics appointment notice, interview, ...). They were always on point!

I can't thank Ryan, Swanson & Cleveland and his incredible legal team enough! They have truly transformed my life. Great assistance in obtaining my Green Card.

From the beginning, their professionalism and expertise were outstanding. Mr. Joel Paget and his legal team guided me through every step of my case with care and precision, ensuring I was well-informed and prepared. Their commitment to helping people create a better life is truly inspiring.

If you're looking for exceptional legal representation in Immigration Law, I highly recommend Ryan, Swanson & Cleveland. Their deep knowledge of Inmigration law and ability to navigate complex processes were crucial in achieving a positive outcome during my green card process. Their professionalism, diligence, and care for their clients are truly remarkable.

I am so grateful for working with an incredible immigration lawyer team from Ryan, Swanson & Cleveland in obtaining my green card. Janet, Jen, and Pamela provided invaluable assistance throughout the process, and I can't say enough thank you to them!

They took the time to understand the circumstances of my case from the very beginning and applied their approach/ strategy accordingly. Their attention to detail and thoroughness ensured that all necessary documents were prepared/ organized accurately and submitted promptly. They kept me updated on the progress of my case, promptly responding to emails and phone calls, so that I was in sync every step of the way. They patiently guided me through the entire application - including the interview walk through. Their expertise has made this nerve wracking process much smoother than I could imagine, and ultimately greatly helped to expedite my green card application process.

I genuinely recommend them to anyone seeking assistance with obtaining a green card or navigating the intricate immigration system.

I’ve worked with Abtin and Lara for my immigration case and the experience was amazing, totally above expectations. They answered all my inquiries within a day (and believe I had a LOT of inquiries), hopped on calls with me, noticed details I’ve missed myself in my package, working on my case in a very personalized manner and being very professional on the expedition process to get my case moving so that I don’t lose my work authorization. I ended up having my case approved much earlier than the expected time frame, by following the legal process with great precision. Would really recommend the firm to anyone seeking immigration service and consultation.
Not very friendly, bu·reau·crat·ic, nor very precise in their responses. I would use them for low importance tasks only.
reviews.ownerResponse: We take our client service seriously, and when we miss the mark, we like to hear about it. We regret that your experience didn't meet our high standards. Please contact Jason Miller, Director of Client Relations (miller@ryanlaw.com), so we can find the matter for which you hired us and work with you to rectify your concerns. Ryan Swanson has been providing highly regarded legal services in the Pacific Northwest for over 125 years, and we take pride in providing the best possible client service.

reviews.text: Applying for a Green Card can be a daunting process. Thankfully everyone from Ryan, Swanson & Cleveland, PLLC was very helpful. They made the process very smooth and answered all my questions. I would especially like to thank Janet, Jeng-Ya and Pamela who worked on my case closely and were there for me anytime I had a question. I was set up for success from the very beginning since they provided me with clear list of documents and checklists. Having been through this process I consider myself very fortunate that I got to work with them and they took all of the stress away from this process. I would recommend them everyday. Thank you!!
Great team, very thorough with their work and responds to any questions quickly. Definitely recommended!

We are very happy that we chose for our case the right team to represent us. Jeng-Ya Chen, Allison K Wilder and their immigration team are very knowledgeable, supportive and friendly. They always replied fast, professional and updated us on each step of our journey. We highly recommend them. We are very thankful and appreciate the outstanding service for quick approval of my application.

We have known and used Joel Paget and RSC's services for close to twenty years. He and his entire team are professional, warm & courteous, knowledgeable - and they ensured we were updated every step of the way. I highly recommend them.
Thank you Jeng-ya and team for representing my immigration application case! It’s such a smooth process working with you and super happy that the case is approved. Thank you!
Impressive experience working with the team, thanks to Jen, Janet, and Pamela!

Janet, Jen and their immigration team did a wonderful job at helping my family go through the immigration process to get our green cards. They are professional, very experienced and genuinely caring on our case. I think their team is THE BEST in town, so I highly recommend them to anyone!
Janet, Jen and Natisha helped with our case. They're very professional, responsive and super patient with my questions. I'm really grateful for their hardwork!

Jen, Janet, and Brenda are the amazing team I am so lucky to have working on my case. They are very responsive and helpful. I like that they are always assuring while being at the same time straight forward with me to give me accurate information. I thank them very much for being a wonderful team.

Jen from the immigration team is amazing and super helpful. She went above and beyond to help us with our case. We work odd hours but Jen worked around our schedule to make sure that we are prepared and ready for our interview. She explained to us very clearly and made sure that we didn't miss any important documents or anything that's needed before we went into our interview. She also responds fast and very professional. We had great experience with Jen and her team!

The receptionist Monique is the friendliest, most professional representation of a business. She was attentive and welcoming. She walked me through my need of the time and got me exactly where I needed to be. She is most definitely the best representation this business could ask for.

Brilliant team of people who helped us immensely in getting our green cards. Joel Paget, Jeng-Ya Chen and Samantha Taylor are great people and incredibly knowledgeable and professional. Supportive, friendly, professional and some of the nicest, patient and helpful people you will ever meet. They all know their stuff and are very professional and help achieve the outcome you want. Can't thank them enough for all their help.
Excellent team!!! Used their service for my own family and employees' visa and green card applications. Their dedicated professional service was the key for approval of all our case applications.
I had the opportunity to work with Ryanlaw's team for my permanent residence. I can't thank them enough for a smooth and worry free process. I'd recommend to work with Janet and Natisha
Awesome team, I had a great experience and strongly recommend them!
I had a great experience working with Janet and Jeng-Ya. They are knowledgeable, responsive and have good attention to details.

Joel Paget and his team at Ryan, Swanson & Cleveland guided me through my AOS and EAD/AP application from start to approval. They were extremely responsive, thoughtful, and informative throughout the entire process. I highly recommend this firm!

This firm, especially Janet Cheetham and Jeng-Ya Chen, provided me with amazing service and guided me through the process of getting my i751 completed and approved. They were very caring, helpful, responsive, and I couldn’t have asked for a better firm to represent me and work with. My application was approved very quickly and they made sure I was prepared and not stressed. Thank you so much!

We are very lucky to have RSC’s support along with our immigration journey.  Janet Cheetham and Jeng-Ya Chen groups  were responsive, patient and truly empathized with us. From the very beginning they were very reassuring, helped us look into all of the questions that we had, and was an important source of support and knowledge; all of this contributed to our optimistic attitude under such a volatile immigration climate and the positive outcome of our case. We highly appreciate their professionalism and their good hearts.

I can't speak highly enough of Ryan Law. We consulted Janet Cheetham and Jen for our green card case. Our case was, to say the least, complicated. Janet and Jen guided us through the daunting process of preparing for documents, collecting information, reviewing & submitting, and final in-person interview. They are very professional and knowledgeable about all the little detail that is often hidden to general public, and always guide us to the best solution. We want to give a special shout-out to Jen - not only she has been a tremendous help along the process, the most impressive part was her on-site interview companion. Her calmness and strategy greatly helped us articulate our case and land it with final approval. I'd recommend Ryan Law to anyone who seek immigration legal help.
Too expensive for what you receive.

We had a very successful and positive experience. I worked closely with Jeng-Ya Chen and Janet Cheetham on my green card application. Their team helped guide us through the complicated process. They can always foresee the possible outcomes at every step for my situation and always be prepared with the best solution. They were on top of every detail, and always willing and available to speak when we had any questions or concerns. Everyone was incredibly professional and did an outstanding job. Highly recommend!!!

If you need an immigration lawyer look no further than Joel Paget.

Let me tell you my personal story from 40 years ago.

I came to the United States in 1978 on a L-1 visa sponsored by my company, Safeco Insurance. In 1980, Safeco told me that they were going to get the best immigration lawyer to represent me to help me get green card so my family come live in the land of opportunity.

I remember meeting a young but talented lawyer named Joel Paget.  I will never forget my first meeting with him at Safeco Plaza.  His assurance and confidence was memorable.  I knew he would stop at nothing to get me a green card. He gave me such a peace of mind during a stressful time by telling it’s going to be okay and leave everything to him.

He kept me up to date on the progress and was always so positive and assuring even when I was denied the labor certificate the first time around.

I always remember the letter he sent me on 9/23/1981 (I still have that letter with me to this day) letting me know that "your approval date has finally arrived."  He had delivered on his promise.

Thank you, Joel, for all you did for me and my family. Our American dream may not have ever been realized if it hasn’t been for you.

They filed an EB-1 petition for me and the experience was nothing but fantastic. The persons who helped me were professional, responsive and surprisingly personable. I will rely on them to take care of all immigration-related needs that I might have in the future. I recommend them highly for anyone with the same legal needs.
Very helpful and professional

I highly recommend the services of this law firm.  As a Canadian mathematician consulting for a software company in Seattle, the company needed to get me a special O-1A Visa so that I could enter the United States.  Given the complexity of the O-1A Visa application process, the company hired Ryan, Swanson & Cleveland, a Seattle firm that specializes in immigration law.  I worked closely with Jeng-Ya (Jen) Chen and her team over a 4-week period to complete my 483-page application, and was delighted to receive my O-1A Visa two weeks after the firm filed my application.  I was so impressed with this firm's attention to detail, professionalism, and commitment to excellence.  I highly recommend their services, and do so without any hesitation or reservation.

reviews.text:
In February 2024, my wife was hit by another car while on her way to work due to an overtaking maneuver. Because my previous car accident case was handled by a Chinese female (paralegal) at a law firm called Barclay, and the outcome was very unsatisfactory (I suspected they embezzled my compensation, as they always evaded my questions about the details of the compensation), they handled it very poorly. I was worried about being deceived by a bad lawyer again, so I carefully searched for a lawyer online. Since my English is not good, I could only look for one with Chinese services. After about two days of searching, I placed my hope on Reed Yurchak Law Firm. The person who received me was a Chinese female, her name was Jill (she was a paralegal). Jill talked to me on the phone for an hour and a half about the entire incident, she gave me some advice. When I heard it, I realized I was wearing tinted glasses when dealing with them. I'm very sorry! Jill was really patient and explained every step in detail to me. Because Jill knew my English was not good, she helped my wife make an appointment with a doctor for treatment on the same day. I was really surprised and impressed because I saw what a professional paralegal should be like!
My car was totaled in the accident, and I wanted to rent a car because I needed to take my to the hospital. The other party's insurance company delayed me with various excuses. I immediately called Jill and told her about it. lawyer team negotiated with the other party's insurance company and they paid us $20,000 (my car was worth $11,000 at the time).
Then it was my job to take my wife to the hospital every day for treatment. Every week, Jill would call to ask how my wife was recovering and also inform us of the current progress of our case. This was completely different from the lawyer I had before!
In mid-May 2025, I received a call from Jill. She told us the amount of compensation the other party's insurance company was going to pay my wife, and I was once again surprised because it exceeded my expectations (I had privately asked many friends and also looked up the compensation amount online)!!! We happily accepted it. On June 2nd, we received the compensation.
I am really grateful to the Law Offices of Reed Yurchak and also to Miss Jill for her help. Jill is really a responsible and excellent paralegal. Thank you for your help. Thank you Again!

She informed me of the compensation my wife received from the other party's insurance company, which surprised me again, as it exceeded my expectations (I had also privately consulted many friends and checked compensation amounts online)! We gladly accepted it. We received the compensation on June 2nd.

I am truly grateful to the Law Offices of Reed Yurchak and to Ms. Jill for her help. Jill is a very responsible and excellent paralegal. Thank you for your help, and thank you again!

reviews.text: David Vogel represented me in a case in king county. Through his thorough and vigilant defense my charges were dropped. I have to say he was more than just my attorney. He was extremely caring and kind. Communication through my court proceedings was above and beyond what he had to do. He helped me with court requirements. He is just by far genuine and truly cares. I would recommend him in a heart beat to anyone. I am extremely lucky to have met him. Thank you very much David

Mr. Vogel was paid on an hourly basis. He is honest and incredibly efficient with his use of time. Careful not to charge fir things not necessary. Easy to work with, and he won the case! Highly recommended.

Mr Vogel helped me during a difficult time when no other attorney would even listen to my story. He cared about the details of the extremely complicated situation and ensured that I was giving him the correct information and  by listening to the details more than once (No one could remember every single detail of a case like mine, not even superman), gave me relevant advice of the appropriate Titles of Legislation that affect my legal position when other lawyers would only help me on a contingent basis all when I only had weeks to protect my statute of limitations after our initial conversation.

If he was not too busy at the time I contacted him, I would have definitely hired him and will definitely contact him when I need future legal help to see his availability and will even check his availability in the future for this case. His advice helped prevent me from having to exposing myself legally or hindering my ability to find alternative counsel on the issue which will all ensure that the offending party takes responsibility for their actions.

As for the people who have given bad reviews here I would suggest that you put yourself in the other persons shoes. Lawyers focus on what might make them loose the case when initially learning of it, they want to go through discovery on that first and you will get filtered based on that during intake. This could also happen while they are learning about the case after they take you on, they might forget things during this process and it will be easier for them to remember after they get past the initial investigation.

People are not perfect and you cannot expect them to be, this lawyer would at listen to things, go over them repeatedly so he could understand them and remember them, discussed what was wrong, took notes on what he thought was important to the case, referred me to suitable representation and told me he will help me as he can if I cannot find representation. This is all when other lawyers won't even spend the time to understand my situation, Washington is lucky to have him.

David Vogel was absolutely outstanding. It is clear that he cares for and goes the distance for his clients. He is professional, excellent with communication, and successfully won the case. I would highly recommend David.

He took this case on a contingency basis and stated we didn't have to pay anything yet ended up asking us for money. He appeared to be very unqualified in our case. We fired him.

When I was hit by an automobile driver in 2018, John Duggan was the only lawyer I called. I knew his name and reputation because I'd had friends who were also victims of automobile vs bicycle incidents. John called me back immediately, while he was on vacation, and agreed to take the case.

The day after the accident, while I was recovering from my injuries, the driver's insurance adjuster was on the phone trying to get me to make a statement, and it was a HUGE relief to direct him to talk to my lawyer.

The process of dealing with insurance companies when you are involved in an incident like this is complicated, and John and his team ran interference for me, immeasurably helping me navigate this process.

Finally, in the end, he and his first-rate team secured a generous settlement from the driver's insurance company that covered medical expenses and other losses, as well as providing compensation for the physical and emotional damages that go along with preventing one from pursuing their love of cycling for a significant length of time.

I highly recommend John Duggan to anyone who has the misfortune of getting hit by an automobile driver - with ZERO reservations!

There are very few instances in my life where I feel so compelled to write a review, but I hope this relays how amazed and pleased I was working with them. I hope that you never have to experience an accident like I did, but if you do, I do hope you have the pleasure of working with John Duggan.
