Four years ago, I was in a very serious car accident when a police officer hit me. A friend referred me to a lawyer, but I didn't feel safe or comfortable with them because they just had me sign something and then I never heard from them again. It was a very serious and complex case, so I decided to search on my own for many law firms where I would feel safe and supported. I eventually found Reymundo Bishop Legal. I took the time to read all the client reviews and noticed that most of them had positive things to say. I decided to schedule appointments with them, and from the first day until now, four years later, I can personally vouch for them as an incredible law firm, professional in every sense. For four years, they were always attentive to everyone, communicating with me frequently without me having to reach out, and when I needed to talk to them, they were there. Today, I have finished my legal process, which at first felt incredibly difficult and complex, and I can say that I finished it with excellent support, with a big smile on my face, and above all, with the peace I always wanted to have after such a difficult process. I wholeheartedly thank attorney John Meyers for his excellent experience in the field. He is one of the best—professional, reliable, and above all, attentive to each client's needs, providing personalized service. I also wholeheartedly thank attorney Roberto Salas. He was the cornerstone of my entire case. From day one, his confidence and clarity made me feel I was in the right place. Then, by speaking to me in Spanish and communicating with me in detail, he always made me feel confident. Even in my most difficult moments, Roberto was there not only as a professional attorney but, more than that, as a friend who understood me and reaffirmed that I was in the right place. There are so many things I want to say about how incredible John and Roberto were, but the only thing I can say with certainty is that they are the best. I wholeheartedly recommend them. They are a blessing.

We strive to provide excellent service to all our clients and appreciate your feedback. Thank you for choosing Fielding Law Group.

Hi Betse, thank you for taking the time to leave us a review. We are glad to hear that our team is helping you with your case and that you have had a positive experience with us. We appreciate your trust in Fielding Law Group and are dedicated to winning your case. Thank you again for your kind words.

reviews.text: Maria was the only one who would take my medical malpractice case. She went above and beyond fighting for my rights and compensation my husband and I deserved. I would recommend maria to anyone needing a lawyer for their malpractice issues.
Maria Diamond is a rockstar. We referred a client to her firm recently and she achieved an absolutely outstanding result. Excellent lawyer. Extremely knowledgeable. I hope our paths cross again.

Maria Diamond is one of the best medical negligence trial attorneys in the country.  Her knowledge of the law and medicine is more than impressive.  She delves into her client's cases and is always extraordinary prepared.  Moreover, Maria is a wonderful and honest person.

If you or a loved one needs an attorney, I strongly recommend contacting Maria Diamond and her team.

If you’re looking for a lawyer who is both thoughtful and tough, Blair Russ is an excellent choice. He doesn’t “candy coat” things—he explains your options clearly and directly. I’ve worked with many lawyers who seem self-serving and fail to consider the long-term consequences for their clients. Blair takes a more holistic approach. If you’re unhappy with something in your case, you can go straight to your lead counsel without feeling uncomfortable. They genuinely want to know what’s happening with you and your case.

I’m based in Toronto, Canada, and after reaching out to nearly 50 law firms across North America, I ultimately selected Blair Russ to represent me in a complex lawsuit filed in Seattle by a party in Argentina.

From the very beginning, Blair was exceptionally client-focused: communicative, caring, and personable. He meticulously handled every detail of my case, and thanks to his brilliant legal work, the lawsuit was dismissed.

I wholeheartedly recommend Blair to anyone facing cross-border legal challenges — he truly delivers.
Worked quickly to help us mitigate our issues on a real estate transaction

I have used Blair Russ on a few matters, and every time he has been very professional at every step of the way, went through my options and laid out the pros and cons of each decision. I have referred him to family and friends and will use him again.

Blair is a very logical, ethical, energetic and knows how to work on complex cases. He is amazing in court in front judge and opposite party with full preparations! He cares for his clients to help navigate, patiently explain and answer all questions! My business case was very complex with many intricacies which needed a lawyer like Blair! In the beginning he tried to understand my case, legitimacy, how I was deceived and done his analysis before taking my case. He put forward the right strategy to win my case! Big thanks to Blair for helping me to win this case as it was years of my efforts to not just let go! I highly recommend and respect Blair for his extraordinary work on my case! Thank you, Blair, it was not possible to win without your help!
Aric is great lawyer!

I never got the consult service I paid for, or communication regarding it, after several follow up emails on my end. I ended up putting several requests in for a refund (which I did  eventually get). I also asked for an 1099-contractor written contract, which I was told would be quick to do, as it is their "bread and butter." The lawyer wrote up a contact for an employee (not contractor), so then he had to fix that, and it somehow totaled 4 hours of work?! I'm out $950 for a contract that should have taken 1-2 hours tops.
Their attorneys will do anything to protect horrible doctors
William's law firm helped me with the cases he represented me in. His assistants, Celia and Juan, were very kind and helpful. I highly recommend them!

I would leave zero stars if possible! Tried to take my case to these people, and had the misfortune of dealing with Juan Gomez. Didn’t return my calls for more than a week, and then when he finally takes the time to call me proceeds to insult me because I don’t have all the paperwork he wants! Like I know the law and what’s needed! You are better off with other law firms. Stay away.
The assistant, Celia Predraza, was a pleasure to be around and helpful with my case. I highly recommend her.

I highly recommend this law firm. They treat their clients with great respect and truly fight for what is right. They also answer all your questions. Thank you so much, Celia Pedraza and attorney William.
I am very satisfied with the service I received and very grateful. My gratitude forever!

I thought they were good but a big disappointment.  They work with lawyers out of state , I higher them in Seattle and the lady who call me 2 times in a year was in New York city.  After not hearing from them in 6 months they called me to say my case was dismissed.  Bad service and poor communication.  Do yourself a favor find someone locally to avoid a headache.

Please do yourself a favor and do not hire these people. They will rip you off big time. They will take their cut before any adjustments and at the end their cut will be double of what you are getting and they will delay your payment as much as they can. That 33.9% is the biggest scammer I ever see.
I am grateful for the service they gave me and I recommend them.

Ricardo was amazing from the beginning! He was so responsive and very informational. He gave us great advice without us asking & wants to help people genuinely!

The case manager Madeline & her assistants were also very sweet & helpful! Overall, I would definitely recommend them to anyone.
Excellent service, it was a difficult case but they got me the best solution for my case. The attention is excellent. I also recommend it one hundred percent.

The service was terrible. They made me waste a year on appointments, preventing me from working. They said they could do so much for my case, only to abandon it after a year without any warning. That was my shock. When I got another lawyer, he said these good-for-nothings had botched my whole case, which is why it was so much harder. They made it even more difficult, and I'm still being billed for the place they sent me to. They just left me with debt and did absolutely nothing for my case. Ricardo is just a charlatan, like all the other lawyers in the film. He filled me with lies, and after a year, he said he'd said everything he'd told me without consulting any lawyers beforehand. A terrible firm.

I had such a great experience working with Ricardo! I was going through such a difficult time with an injury and the last thing you want to deal with is the legalities of an injury case. He was super knowledgeable and easy to talk to. I didn’t have to worry much about what was going on regarding my case. I fully trust that he was doing the best on my behalf. I recommend his services 100% to anyone who’s going through and injury case.
Ricardo provided a perfect experience, highly recommend!
Ricardo gave us great service! Would recommend!
Ricardo provided some awesome service. Well done.
Bad service, everything is a lie, at least they lied to me about everything, and they never wanted to give me a copy of what I signed.
Ricardo is very knowledgeable and would highly recommend going to him.  He provided me with an excellent experience.
ricardo the man. making the world a better place everyday! 🙌
Will never go to another Abogado, Ricardo did an exceptional job, SOLID 5 stars.

My case was handled by Ricardo Mosqueda, an excellent person.
He answered all my questions, and I was extremely satisfied with his service.
I highly recommend this law firm.
Ricardo is incredibly kind and attentive, always eager to help his clients.
Thank you for your help. 😊
Very reliable and good communication

They have great service and are very professional and efficient  Richard went above and beyond the help that I needed. I will definitely know who to go to next time I need this services! I recommend them a 100%. 👍

Ricardo was the person who helped us with our car accident case. They answered our call immediately and arranged a meeting to explain the next steps, all in our own language. 100% recommended for the entire Hispanic community.

Easily one of the best experiences I've had. I felt as though I was fully supported during a hard time. I've already recommended this place to several of my friends, be sure to ask for Ricardo as he made me feel very comfortable throughout the whole process. This place has for sure earned a 5 star rating from me (:
Amazing customer service throughout the entire process, Ricardo helped my parents a lot. I would definitely recommend him to friends and family members.
Amazing staff
A great help, answered all my questions and downloaded all the paperwork I needed and this was before I was even a client.
Very friendly & knowledgeable Staff.
My first time

I was so Great full  with their service.. I was very much satisfied with what information the representative assisted me with.. the people, attorneys, office clerks were so very patient, helpful in many ways,  where they were 100% in providing me with great advice. They answered my questions thoroughly and recommended me to do more than anyother places where I turned to for help. Protective towards my confidentiality. . Investigated all of the things that I was worried about  and questionable about.

These people are the best for legal advice and assistance when dealing with social security issues.  It's a wonderful and free resource.   They are friendly, knowledgeable and compassionate.  There were a number of years where I was getting SSI and it was a constant nightmare.  Every time I won my case, thanks to these people (except for when I had cancer and was unable to fight back).  If you are having problems don't hesitate to give them a call.
Helping me on my case SSI, SSDI..... Aaliyah
Best Social Security Attorneys for homeless and low Income folks without  contingency percentage.   They Rock!
Green grass
Provides excellent service to people in need.

If you are homeless and need to file for social security this is the place to go. You are treated with dignity and respect and they will help you apply and receive the benefits you deserve. They will be with you from beginning to end and help you any way they can. Honest, friendly and caring.
A free lawyer can help people with Down syndrome who are unable to work obtain government assistance after reviewing the patient's file.

These guys are awesome!  Marcos helped me out tremendously and was very quick to answer questions and took time to explain things where non lawyer people can understand it.  The office staff was always cheerful and do whatever they can to make you comfortable in a place that can be highly stressful.  I have nothing but good things to say about these guys.  They helped me so much!!!
Very helpful
The best

When my SS Disability benefit was cancelled in 2017 due to a clerical error in the SS system, I found it nearly impossible to penetrate their bureaucracy. I was advised by a friend to call SCLC. The phone call was answered by Marly. Her positive and reassuring manner gave me the confidence to move forward. A meeting with attorney Michael Martin led to the resolution of my claim, with benefits restored properly. 5 stars and a huge THANK YOU to Marly, Michael, and SCLC (plus a monetary donation I made online!).

Well, considering the fact that I need a lawyer Hannah Rosenberger at this office is the person you want to see. At least, she is the one that has been helping me for the past 3 months on my case and things look good. I would recommend this place to anyone who has been turned down for SSDI and needs a lawyer. Having to do it all over again I would get a lawyer the very first thing and these guys definitely are the ones you want to help you. I'll let you know how my case went but up until now I have received a phenomenal amount of help from not only Hannah but the rest of the individuals in the office.
Yes I agree with Justin thanks. This place took a long time to help me then no help ever came. Before the court date a week they wanted me to ask for more time. This place does suck. Thanks Justin.

This place sucks. I got a referral from 211 for this place. Told them when my court date was. They said no problem we can help. Gave them all my information. Told them again of my court date. 211 told them of my court date. They said no problem we can help a attorney will contact you. A week a half before my court date. They can't help the court date as too close. I did everything right. I contacted a month and a week before my court date. Just beware before contacting this place. They lied to me. Now I have to go to court with no attorney because they told me they would help me.

Very helpful folk.  Social Security issues; if your issue is with DSHS, you want "Common Ground", not SCLC.

But for all things SSA/SSI, these folks have answered anything I'd questions about, and are intent on helping where they can.  This is a non-profit organization.

Thank you, SCLC, for your help.

David S. Roth did an amazing job resolving my case. His professionalism, dedication, and clear communication made the entire process smooth and stress-free. He truly cares about his clients and goes above and beyond to achieve the best results. I highly recommend him to anyone who has been in a car accident and needs a reliable, experienced attorney to handle their case.

I have received a great service by them. They have helped me in difficult legal cases and made me get what I deserve. David Roth especially has been a huge help. I recommend him to everyone who needs any kind of legal services.

David and his team helped me and my wife with a car accident case professionally.   All the legal documentations, negotiations, and settlement were handled with great care and support!  I recommend the firm who needs help with car accident cases.
Quit without notice, left attorney taking over in bad position

David is incredible man he’s very understanding and empathize with your feelings. He knows how to explain things so you can understand , he also provide you with all your resources so that you can be very comfortable in the process. I am so grateful that he took my case and got justice for me. If you wanna win, call David he’s your man.

David Roth has helped our family 30 years ago and did it once again with even a bigger lawsuit. He is persistent and always have our interest at heart, and went out of his way to learn different and new ways to fight for us. David and his team went above an beyond to complete our lawsuit even after the settlement. We cannot be more grateful to have David on our side.
David Roth has helped my family and friends for over 8 years. The man is trustworthy and he not only has your back but also educates you during the process of helping you win. My guy!

David Roth and his team were amazing.They answered alot of my questions on the phone, via email and on our zoom calls. When I talked
to David, I was not disappointed. He was very patient, explained thoroughly and spent a ton of time working with me!

I had a car accident and I called to Mr. David Roth. I was unable to work due to this accident and I was financially damaged. David Roth took all my physical and financial losses from the other party's insurance. I advise you to contact Law offices of  David Roth if you have a car accident. All staff at this office are very kind and helpful to you.
Thanks to David Roth and his colleagues.
Zohreh

Mr. David Roth’s professionalism is unmatched.
From the beginning to the end of my case, he truly took his time and explained in detail, every aspect of my accident. Providing me with amazing and trust worthy health care professionals, that helped me to get back on my feet after my car accident in December of 2017. He was always making time for me to answer any questions I had in timely manner. He always listened to my concerns after the accident and made sure I had the right care. David is very intelligent and truly knowledgeable about personal injury cases. He has a wonderful, professional, compassionate and friendly office team that always knew my name.
David was able to exceed my settlement expectations by far. I most definitely recommend David Roth to my friends and family and anyone who reads this review, you will not lose.
David is the best and most dependable lawyer I've ever worked with. He is patient, works hard, and I recommend him to anyone who needs the best injury lawyer.
The best personal injury firm in Seattle
Nice place
Gavin Davis does an amazing job. Went for a car accident he stayed with it and exceeded my expectations.
Very professional and warm atmosphere.

I can recommend Weinstein and Caggiano without reservation.

I first went to another law firm who agreed to take on my mesothelioma case then did nothing of any consequence for over 1 1/2 years until I fired them.  I was put off and lied to.  They obviously thought they could figure it out as they went along, which was absurd.

I have had only positive experiences with Weinstein and Caggiano.  Their communication is outstanding.  Even when I sent an email in the evening, not expecting a response until the next business day, I received a quick response within a very short while.

They have decades of experience in mesothelioma cases and know exactly which firms to approach plus they were able to contact individuals who worked with my husband in the 70's for witnesses.

The settlements have been superb.  Communication is first rate.  I wish I had brought my mesothelioma case to them to begin with.

They have been excellent at what they do. Very impressive the amount of work they have done for us. I would feel confident referring them to anyone facing a similar  situation.  Very compassionate and understanding.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks DeLenda. We are sorry about what your family is going through. Mesothelioma is such a cruel disease and the saddest thing about this tradegy is that if these companies were just careful, this never had to happen. That being said, we are proud to represent such a wonderful family as yours.

reviews.text: Very helpful with getting my Dad's asbestos case files. They have all the information about the ships and are very knowledgeable with these cases. Always quick to respond to any questions asked.
Outstanding representation!

I’m writing this review through lachrymose eyes and a lump in my throat, so I’ll keep it short. What an unbelievable outcome to this case - I’m still a little bit in shock over the settlement amount reached. It was such a cathartic experience to bring closure to this and walk away feeling like we got such an amazing result. I want to thank both Brian and Alexandra from the very bottom of my heart, I cannot begin to express my gratitude for what you’ve been able to do for my family. Brian and Alexandra zealously advocated on behalf of my mother every step of the way to bring about optimal results; however, they were able to do so in a compassionate manner, being mindful and sensitive to the cultural/language barrier that presented unique challenges during critical points of litigation. Because of those awful and maudlin, overly mawkish mesothelioma commercials, I was reluctant to contact an attorney when my father first got sick. But I knew I had made the right choice when my mother embraced Alexandra upon first meeting her. Simply put - they are the gold standard in litigating mesothelioma cases.

Michael Zimmar is a fantastic personal injury attorney! I was in a very complex and unique car accident which left me injured. Michael was very thorough, persistent, and adamant when speaking with adjusters assigned to my case which allowed me to get the best settlement I could have asked for, more than any other attorney thought I could receive. Michael kept me updated with each step of the process as well as weekly check-ins with my overall health and helped me get the best treatment. He was also flexible with scheduling around my busy work and school schedule which I appreciated. I would most definitely hire Michael again and I would recommend him to anyone in search of a personal injury attorney!

I was referred to Michael J. Zimmar after sustaining multiple injuries from a slip and fall on ice. Michael's first and foremost concern was for my health, and recovery. In Michael's own words "Let's insure your health above all else". As I began to recover Michael handled all aspects of my claim.  During my period of recovery, I was not in the physical or mental to state to deal with the legal aspects and emotional toll stemming from my injuries and reliving the details of my fall. Michael handled every aspect of this case for me. He also kept me appraised on a weekly or bi-weekly basis. Not having to deal with multiple parties thanks to Michael, saved me from a great deal of stress. I highly recommend Michael Zimmar. Not only is Michael a very skilled attorney, but he also truly cares about the welfare of his clients, and insuring they are treated fairly. Jim B.

Michael was introduced to me by a colleague, who had spoken highly of his services. Being that this was my first experience requiring an attorney, I was especially critical. Michael was exceptionally detailed, determined, professional, and succinct. Needless to say, I felt heard and well represented by him. I strongly recommend his services to anyone seeking a personal injury lawyer.

I highly recommend anyone to work with Michael. He is professional and showed great care and compassion for me throughout my case. The case took a few years and he never failed to thoroughly communicate and update me as we went. He worked diligently to assure that we were able to settle at a place that I was pleased with. Michael also did a great job making time to work with me while I was home because I go to school out of state. I would recommend him to anyone and should I find myself in any other situation that I need an attorney, I will most definitely hire him again.

Michael Zimmar has constistantly exceeded our family's expectations for several decades. He is very professional, responsive, and has an incredible vocabulary. Best of all, he provides successful results! Thank you Michael!
Awesome lawyer. Good guy. Helped me as young adult after a car accident. Will be going back to him for all legal needs.

I highly recommend Micheal. I worked with Michael as my car accident lawyer for a case that lasted many years. Throughout the whole duration of the case he always communicated well, worked diligently and showed that not only was he representing me but really cared about my overall well being.
Thank you Michael for all your hard work, and being patient with us for all these 3 years and not giving up on our case.  Thanks you again..

Michael Zimmar is an outstanding attorney, and I would say that he is the best. I called Michael one morning to get some advice. He took the time out of his busy day to answer my questions. In addition he coached me on how to interview the attorneys, the potential cost, and other details. I am so very grateful that he took the time to go into the details. So when I say he is the best in Seattle and the greater South Sound area, believe me, because I have talked with the majority of those attorneys that have the expertise in the field for my issue. Michael returns calls promptly, he is kind and willing to share knowledge, and he is a fighter for his clients. I could go on but suffice it to say. You will have a long search to find someone better.

Michael  Zimmar briefly: honesty, integrity, reliability.
When you need a lawyer, Michael Zimmar must be your first choice. In my case he was and after my car incident he was my first choice and it was the best , what I could do. Immediately he responded, he answered my questions precisely and returned my calls immediately, regardless of the weekend or weekdays.
Since this time, I asked Mike for some advice or recommendations in different manners , he was always the same : quick, precise, reliable and always helpful. I referred Mike to my friend with a tricky problem , Mike has helped him and in some way he practically saved his life.
After knowing Mike for more than 30  years I can say that I am happy to have him around.
I will always refer Mike with my full confidence.

I was referred to Michael from a friend several years ago and have worked with him on a few different cases. The best part of Michael is that he does everything he can to take care of your needs. He listens to you, reviews with you to make sure he understands what you want, advises you and immediately is on your case. What I found amazing was that you come in working with Michael in a professional manner and by the time he has finished with your case by getting everything you wanted you feel like you have a new friend. Thanks Michael.

Great attorney !  Saved my bacon years ago during a divorce.  Always available and willing to listen.  I contacted him several times since on other issues which he has offered his advice.  I highly recommend him and he is always the first person I contact if I have any legal questions.

I hired Michael Zimmar after I was in a car accident.  He did a tremendous job negotiating a settlement for me.  His persistence, dedication, and commitment to my case was exemplary.  I would not hesitate to recommend Michael to anyone who needs a capable and dedicated personal injury lawyer.
- Sera Chern

My husband was referred to Michael after he was in a terrible car accident, and it was a fortunate referral. Michael worked hard to take care of my family in settling a complicated car accident case. I am so grateful for his expertise, dedication and diligence. He left no stone unturned and ensure everything has handled in the most professional manner possible. Very grateful to have had Michael in our corner!

I was in a motorcycle accident and severely injured. Mr. Zimmar was an incredible help through the whole legal process. Very detail oriented and attentive, I wouldn’t recommend anyone else for the job!

Michael Zimmar helped my brother and I through a difficult accident claim and in the end got results beyond expectations. My brother was hit by a car. Already suffering from Early Onset Alzheimer's Disease he was unable to handle his own affairs. I went to Michael for help. His patience and understanding greatly helped me to help my brother through the legal process to get the care he needed and to ultimately reach a significant settlement. Michael's careful work and his natural kindness made a real difference in my brother's life. Thank you very much, Michael!

Michael Zimmar deserves Lawyer of the year! I was referred to Michael by a close friend and when I made the first phone call it was the best decision I've made. Michael stayed on top of my case since day one until the very end. He is extremely professional and made sure to communicate with me through out the whole process. He went out of his way on multiple occasions to take care of me as his client, squeezed me in between appointments to fit my schedule. I highly recommend him to anyone that is in need of a Damn Good Lawyer. Michael is also an expert on motor vehicle accident cases. If it wasnt for him I would still be physically suffering from my auto accident. When explained what was hurting me, he knew exactly what was wrong in order for me to get the right treatment. I am now able to enjoy all the hobbies I did before the accident. I couldn't have done it without him. Thank you Michael for all that you do for me and my family!

He helped settle my injury claim after a car accident. He was very attentive to my needs and took time to explain everything he was doing for my case. He also took the time to mentor me when I was going through a rough patch in life which I really appreciated. He really cares... and I could tell it wasn't just about the money but about family as well. If I ever need legal advice or representation I will always come back to him. Thank you Micheal Zimmar for a pleasant legal experience.

Michael has been a excellent attorney for me. He is very attentive to every detail and is very good at communicating what is going on in the whole process of my case. I really appreciated his hard work and that he stuck with me through the whole process. I would highly recommend Michael Zimmar!

I work daily with numerous personal injury attorneys across the nation. There are 3 maybe 4 that I would entrust my family to. Michael is at the top of this list. Michael is not only an amazing attorney, but he is personable and seems to truly care about his clients. While he does greatly rely on his assistant, you will never find yourself brushed off to his assistant or another person in the office and will always find that he personally makes an investment in your case both with his time as well as his interaction. Michael worked with us throughout an almost 3 year duration after my husband was in an auto accident and injured. There were many frustrations with his injuries and healing has been a multistep process. Michael was with us every step of the way, giving encouragement and advice and at times, was just there to be supportive and encouraging, and yet never faltered from who he is (in other words, this was never a false support). I will give a word of caution, however. Michael is a realist. He will speak his mind and is strong-willed, which is perfect in any attorney who you ask to fight for you, but does not always mesh with every persons persona. Please be aware that he will ask you to do your fair share in your case, but this will pay off in the end as you will leave with a greater knowledge. Under the surface, you may even find a witt and sense of humor that is hilarious. Michael is an honest attorney. He rules by what is right and wrong and upholds his sense of credibility in all matters. He is honest and upfront not only to you, but to all his clients. I have worked with him multiple times (thankfully spaced far apart) and have never found this integrity to falter. He works for his clients and takes pride in his work and his wins. I would recommend at the very least a consult with Michael. I have found him to be an amazing person and someone who I am proud to have had work my husbands case and whom I know.

Michael Zimmar was recommended to my wife and I after we were involved in a head on collision while vacationing in Maui, Hawaii.We are both in our  early eighties and really needed competent legal help which  Mr Zimmar provided.  He was generous with his time, very patient  all of which resulted  a very satisfactory settlement for both of us.

I had a car accident that happened while working so I was faced with an L&I claim, dealing with the other drivers Insurance, my Insurance along with all of the medical providers that I had to go see and trying to go back to work playing catch up after missing days. Along with just trying to get healthy, I had no clue which direction to go so I found Zimmar law. Once I agreed to work with Michael i went to his office and dumped everything on his desk and he sorted it all out, he was very helpful in making sure that I understood every step with clarity, and most Importantly he made sure my personal health came first. Michael was available via email and phone and very responsive when I tried to contact him with questions, I would strongly recommend working with Michael in the future.

I worked with Michael after a hit and run accident. Accidents and dealing with them are so very stressful and time consuming. Michael patently and thoroughly walked me through the entire process; what to do, what to collect etc and did all the work on the backend for me to help be build a really strong case. The accident finally settled and I walked away with a nice settlement fee, much more than my other friend in the car settled for on her own (without an attorney). He’s been dealing with accidents for many many years and knows how to deal with all the pushy insurance people. Highly recommend meeting with him for a consult or using him to settle your case!! If I ever get in any other accidents I’ll definitely be going to him.

Where to begin! I met Michael after a construction accident at work. After multiple surgeries, I asked some respected people in the industry who they would hire as representation in a personal injury claim. Mr. Zimmar kept coming up. I reached out to him and I am so thankful he wanted to help! I can't speak on the compensation, but he helped me get a very large settlement. Don't waste your time wondering if you should hire Michael - rather, hire him ASAP! I have a friend for life in Michael who I currently call for legal advice on anything and everything! Michael is a guy who will help at all times. He's the best, period! Thank you Michael for helping my family get out of a very dark period of my life!

Michael was a pleasure to work with very educated and trustworthy. His interest in my personal improvement was appreciated as well. He is thorough and well versed in his practice. I would, and have, strongly suggest Michael and his team to anyone in search of an injury attorney.

Michael has been helping me and members of my family for over 20 years with various legal issues. He is a great person to have as an advocate in times where your life seems out of your control. His experience, candor and professionalism is of the highest caliber. Listen to him and you will prevail.

Michael has been my friend and attorney for over 25 years now, I've hired and consulted him on several vehicle related incidents over this period of time, I've also sent many friends and family members his way as well.  He's a very hard worker, has exceptional communication and does not waste time, he returns calls and emails promptly, and has always been very determined to provide the best legal representation possible.

Michael recently helped me after a car accident. With his hard work and persistence he was able to not only help me settle my claim but get me back into the world a better person. Listen to him and do what he asks of you because he knows what he is doing and he will do what is best for you. Sara Cruz

Michael Zimmar has represented my family for over twenty years. On each issue, his integrity, vast experience, professional demeanor, and expertise have brought about fair and just results. Because of this, I have referred my family, friends and acquaintenances to him for his wonderful help.
Attorney Micheal zimmar has been my friend and my attorney for 34 years ...that says it all... Because you don't keep friends or attorneys that long unless they're the best

Zimmar is my lifesaver
5.0 stars
Posted by Kellie May 3, 2018

I went to see Michael because he helped my father through a nasty divorce with my overbearing and demanding mother.
After I left my daughter's father, my dad suggested I see Michael because he was the only lawyer he found that went in to court, handled business and pretty much won every case upon entrance to the court room - he is that good.
